authors_text: Chen-Hsuan Lin,Chaoyang Wang,Simon Lucey
title: SDF-SRN: Learning Signed Distance 3D Object Reconstruction from Static Images
title_zh: SDF-SRN：学习从静态图像重建有符号距离 3D 对象
comment: Accepted to NeurIPS 2020. Project page & code: https://chenhsuanlin.bitbucket.io/signed-distance-SRN/
comments: Accepted to NeurIPS 2020. Project page & code: https://chenhsuanlin.bitbucket.io/signed-distance-SRN/
abstract: Dense 3D object reconstruction from a single image has recently witnessed remarkable advances, but supervising neural networks with ground-truth 3D shapes is impractical due to the laborious process of creating paired image-shape datasets. Recent efforts have turned to learning 3D reconstruction without 3D supervision from RGB images with annotated 2D silhouettes, dramatically reducing the cost and effort of annotation. These techniques, however, remain impractical as they still require multi-view annotations of the same object instance during training. As a result, most experimental efforts to date have been limited to synthetic datasets. In this paper, we address this issue and propose SDF-SRN, an approach that requires only a single view of objects at training time, offering greater utility for real-world scenarios. SDF-SRN learns implicit 3D shape representations to handle arbitrary shape topologies that may exist in the datasets. To this end, we derive a novel differentiable rendering formulation for learning signed distance functions (SDF) from 2D silhouettes. Our method outperforms the state of the art under challenging single-view supervision settings on both synthetic and real-world datasets.
summary: Dense 3D object reconstruction from a single image has recently witnessed remarkable advances, but supervising neural networks with ground-truth 3D shapes is impractical due to the laborious process of creating paired image-shape datasets. Recent efforts have turned to learning 3D reconstruction without 3D supervision from RGB images with annotated 2D silhouettes, dramatically reducing the cost and effort of annotation. These techniques, however, remain impractical as they still require multi-view annotations of the same object instance during training. As a result, most experimental efforts to date have been limited to synthetic datasets. In this paper, we address this issue and propose SDF-SRN, an approach that requires only a single view of objects at training time, offering greater utility for real-world scenarios. SDF-SRN learns implicit 3D shape representations to handle arbitrary shape topologies that may exist in the datasets. To this end, we derive a novel differentiable rendering formulation for learning signed distance functions (SDF) from 2D silhouettes. Our method outperforms the state of the art under challenging single-view supervision settings on both synthetic and real-world datasets.
abstract_zh: 从单个图像重建密集的 3D 对象最近取得了显着的进步，但由于创建配对图像形状数据集的过程很费力，因此用真实 3D 形状监督神经网络是不切实际的。最近的努力转向了在没有 3D 监督的情况下从带有注释的 2D 轮廓的 RGB 图像中学习 3D 重建，从而大大减少了注释的成本和工作量。然而，这些技术仍然不切实际，因为它们在训练期间仍然需要对同一对象实例进行多视图注释。因此，迄今为止大多数实验工作都仅限于合成数据集。在本文中，我们解决了这个问题并提出了 SDF-SRN，这是一种在训练时只需要单一对象视图的方法，为现实场景提供了更大的实用性。 SDF-SRN 学习隐式 3D 形状表示来处理数据集中可能存在的任意形状拓扑。为此，我们推导出一种新颖的可微分渲染公式，用于从 2D 轮廓学习符号距离函数（SDF）。我们的方法在合成数据集和现实数据集上具有挑战性的单视图监督设置下都优于最先进的技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SDF-SRN的方法，用于从单张静态图像中学习重建3D物体的有符号距离函数（SDF）。
AI.motivation: 从单张图像进行密集3D物体重建虽然取得了显著进展，但使用真实3D形状监督神经网络是不现实的，因为创建配对图像-形状数据集需要大量人工劳动。现有的方法仍然需要多视角标注，限制了其在真实场景中的应用。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种新的可微渲染公式，从2D轮廓中学习有符号距离函数（SDF），从而实现隐式3D形状表示的学习，能够处理数据集中可能出现的任意形状拓扑。
AI.result: SDF-SRN在合成和真实世界数据集上均优于现有方法，特别是在具有挑战性的单视角监督设置下。
AI.conclusion: SDF-SRN方法在仅需单视角训练的情况下，实现了更实用的3D物体重建，适用于真实世界场景。

As a result, most experimental efforts to date have been limited to synthetic datasets. In this paper, we address this issue and propose SDF-SRN, an approach that requires only a single view of objects at training time, offering greater utility for real-world scenarios. SDF-SRN learns implicit 3D shape representations to handle arbitrary shape topologies that may exist in the datasets. To this end, we derive a novel differentiable rendering formulation for learning signed distance functions (SDF) from 2D silhouettes. authors_text: Yu Zhang,James Qin,Daniel S. Park,Wei Han,Chung-Cheng Chiu,Ruoming Pang,Quoc V. Le,Yonghui Wu
title: Pushing the Limits of Semi-Supervised Learning for Automatic Speech Recognition
title_zh: 突破自动语音识别半监督学习的极限
comment: 11 pages, 3 figures, 5 tables. Accepted to NeurIPS SAS 2020 Workshop; v2: minor errors corrected
comments: 11 pages, 3 figures, 5 tables. Accepted to NeurIPS SAS 2020 Workshop; v2: minor errors corrected
abstract: We employ a combination of recent developments in semi-supervised learning for automatic speech recognition to obtain state-of-the-art results on LibriSpeech utilizing the unlabeled audio of the Libri-Light dataset. More precisely, we carry out noisy student training with SpecAugment using giant Conformer models pre-trained using wav2vec 2.0 pre-training. By doing so, we are able to achieve word-error-rates (WERs) 1.4%/2.6% on the LibriSpeech test/test-other sets against the current state-of-the-art WERs 1.7%/3.3%.
summary: We employ a combination of recent developments in semi-supervised learning for automatic speech recognition to obtain state-of-the-art results on LibriSpeech utilizing the unlabeled audio of the Libri-Light dataset. More precisely, we carry out noisy student training with SpecAugment using giant Conformer models pre-trained using wav2vec 2.0 pre-training. By doing so, we are able to achieve word-error-rates (WERs) 1.4%/2.6% on the LibriSpeech test/test-other sets against the current state-of-the-art WERs 1.7%/3.3%.
abstract_zh: 我们结合了自动语音识别半监督学习的最新进展，利用 Libri-Light 数据集的未标记音频在 LibriSpeech 上获得了最先进的结果。更准确地说，我们使用使用 wav2vec 2.0 预训练进行预训练的巨型 Conformer 模型，通过 SpecAugment 进行嘈杂的学生训练。通过这样做，我们能够在 LibriSpeech 测试/其他测试集上实现 1.4%/2.6% 的单词错误率 (WER)，而当前最先进的 WER 为 1.7%/3.3%。

AI.tldr: 本文通过结合半监督学习的最新技术，在自动语音识别任务中利用未标记数据提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督学习方法在自动语音识别中的未标记数据利用率不足，限制了模型性能的进一步提升。
AI.method: 采用带有SpecAugment的嘈杂学生训练框架，结合wav2vec 2.0预训练的大型Conformer模型，充分利用Libri-Light数据集的未标记音频。
AI.result: 在LibriSpeech测试集上达到1.4%/2.6%的词错误率，优于当前最优结果1.7%/3.3%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了半监督学习在自动语音识别中通过有效利用未标记数据提升性能的潜力。

search_text: Pushing the Limits of Semi-Supervised Learning for Automatic Speech Recognition 突破自动语音识别半监督学习的极限 We employ a combination of recent developments in semi-supervised learning for automatic speech recognition to obtain state-of-the-art results on LibriSpeech utilizing the unlabeled audio of the Libri-Light dataset. More precisely, we carry out noisy student training with SpecAugment using giant Conformer models pre-trained using wav2vec 2.0 pre-training. By doing so, we are able to achieve word-error-rates (WERs) 1.4%/2.6% on the LibriSpeech test/test-other sets against the current state-of-the-art WERs 1.7%/3.3%. 我们结合了自动语音识别半监督学习的最新进展，利用 Libri-Light 数据集的未标记音频在 LibriSpeech 上获得了最先进的结果。更准确地说，我们使用使用 wav2vec 2.0 预训练进行预训练的巨型 Conformer 模型，通过 SpecAugment 进行嘈杂的学生训练。通过这样做，我们能够在 LibriSpeech 测试/其他测试集上实现 1.4%/2.6% 的单词错误率 (WER)，而当前最先进的 WER 为 1.7%/3.3%。 本文通过结合半监督学习的最新技术，在自动语音识别任务中利用未标记数据提升模型性能。 Yu Zhang,James Qin,Daniel S. authors_text: Bjørn Magnus Mathisen,Kerstin Bach,Espen Meidell,Håkon Måløy,Edvard Schreiner Sjøblom
title: FishNet: A Unified Embedding for Salmon Recognition
title_zh: FishNet：用于鲑鱼识别的统一嵌入
abstract: Identifying individual salmon can be very beneficial for the aquaculture industry as it enables monitoring and analyzing fish behavior and welfare. For aquaculture researchers identifying individual salmon is imperative to their research. The current methods of individual salmon tagging and tracking rely on physical interaction with the fish. This process is inefficient and can cause physical harm and stress for the salmon. In this paper we propose FishNet, based on a deep learning technique that has been successfully used for identifying humans, to identify salmon.We create a dataset of labeled fish images and then test the performance of the FishNet architecture. Our experiments show that this architecture learns a useful representation based on images of salmon heads. Further, we show that good performance can be achieved with relatively small neural network models: FishNet achieves a false positive rate of 1\% and a true positive rate of 96\%.
summary: Identifying individual salmon can be very beneficial for the aquaculture industry as it enables monitoring and analyzing fish behavior and welfare. For aquaculture researchers identifying individual salmon is imperative to their research. The current methods of individual salmon tagging and tracking rely on physical interaction with the fish. This process is inefficient and can cause physical harm and stress for the salmon. In this paper we propose FishNet, based on a deep learning technique that has been successfully used for identifying humans, to identify salmon.We create a dataset of labeled fish images and then test the performance of the FishNet architecture. Our experiments show that this architecture learns a useful representation based on images of salmon heads. Further, we show that good performance can be achieved with relatively small neural network models: FishNet achieves a false positive rate of 1\% and a true positive rate of 96\%.
abstract_zh: 识别个体鲑鱼对水产养殖业非常有益，因为它可以监测和分析鱼类的行为和福利。对于水产养殖研究人员来说，识别个体鲑鱼对于他们的研究至关重要。当前对个体鲑鱼进行标记和跟踪的方法依赖于与鱼的物理互动。这个过程效率低下，可能会对鲑鱼造成身体伤害和压力。在本文中，我们提出了 FishNet，基于已成功用于识别人类的深度学习技术来识别鲑鱼。我们创建了标记鱼图像的数据集，然后测试 FishNet 架构的性能。我们的实验表明，该架构可以根据鲑鱼头的图像学习有用的表示。此外，我们表明使用相对较小的神经网络模型可以获得良好的性能：FishNet 实现了 1\% 的误报率和 96\% 的真报率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FishNet，一种基于深度学习的统一嵌入模型，用于实现无需物理标记的鲑鱼个体识别。
AI.motivation: 传统鲑鱼个体识别依赖物理标记，存在效率低、伤害鱼体的问题，亟需非接触式自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 借鉴人脸识别深度学习技术，构建标注鱼体图像数据集，训练FishNet模型并验证其在鲑鱼头部图像上的识别能力。
AI.result: FishNet在小型神经网络模型下实现1%误判率和96%准确率，证明了基于视觉特征的识别有效性。
AI.conclusion: FishNet验证了深度学习在水产养殖个体识别中的可行性，为行业提供高效无害的替代方案。

result: FishNet在小型神经网络模型下实现1%误判率和96%准确率，证明了基于视觉特征的识别有效性。
conclusion: FishNet验证了深度学习在水产养殖个体识别中的可行性，为行业提供高效无害的替代方案。
search_text: FishNet: A Unified Embedding for Salmon Recognition FishNet：用于鲑鱼识别的统一嵌入 Identifying individual salmon can be very beneficial for the aquaculture industry as it enables monitoring and analyzing fish behavior and welfare. For aquaculture researchers identifying individual salmon is imperative to their research. The current methods of individual salmon tagging and tracking rely on physical interaction with the fish. This process is inefficient and can cause physical harm and stress for the salmon. In this paper we propose FishNet, based on a deep learning technique that has been successfully used for identifying humans, to identify salmon.We create a dataset of labeled fish images and then test the performance of the FishNet architecture. Our experiments show that this architecture learns a useful representation based on images of salmon heads. Further, we show that good performance can be achieved with relatively small neural network models: FishNet achieves a false positive rate of 1\% and a true positive rate of 96\%. 识别个体鲑鱼对水产养殖业非常有益，因为它可以监测和分析鱼类的行为和福利。对于水产养殖研究人员来说，识别个体鲑鱼对于他们的研究至关重要。当前对个体鲑鱼进行标记和跟踪的方法依赖于与鱼的物理互动。这个过程效率低下，可能会对鲑鱼造成身体伤害和压力。在本文中，我们提出了 FishNet，基于已成功用于识别人类的深度学习技术来识别鲑鱼。我们创建了标记鱼图像的数据集，然后测试 FishNet 架构的性能。我们的实验表明，该架构可以根据鲑鱼头的图像学习有用的表示。此外，我们表明使用相对较小的神经网络模型可以获得良好的性能：FishNet 实现了 1\% 的误报率和 96\% 的真报率。 本文提出FishNet，一种基于深度学习的统一嵌入模型，用于实现无需物理标记的鲑鱼个体识别。 Bjørn Magnus Mathisen,Kerstin Bach,Espen Meidell,Håkon Måløy,Edvard Schreiner Sjøblom cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Jay Nandy,Wynne Hsu,Mong Li Lee
title: Towards Maximizing the Representation Gap between In-Domain & Out-of-Distribution Examples
title_zh: 最大化域内和分布外示例之间的表示差距
comment: Accepted at NeurIPS 2020 Workshop version: ICML UDL 2020, Link: http://www.gatsby.ucl.ac.uk/~balaji/udl2020/accepted-papers/UDL2020-paper-134.pdf
comments: Accepted at NeurIPS 2020 Workshop version: ICML UDL 2020, Link: http://www.gatsby.ucl.ac.uk/~balaji/udl2020/accepted-papers/UDL2020-paper-134.pdf
abstract: Among existing uncertainty estimation approaches, Dirichlet Prior Network (DPN) distinctly models different predictive uncertainty types. However, for in-domain examples with high data uncertainties among multiple classes, even a DPN model often produces indistinguishable representations from the out-of-distribution (OOD) examples, compromising their OOD detection performance. We address this shortcoming by proposing a novel loss function for DPN to maximize the \textit{representation gap} between in-domain and OOD examples. Experimental results demonstrate that our proposed approach consistently improves OOD detection performance.
summary: Among existing uncertainty estimation approaches, Dirichlet Prior Network (DPN) distinctly models different predictive uncertainty types. However, for in-domain examples with high data uncertainties among multiple classes, even a DPN model often produces indistinguishable representations from the out-of-distribution (OOD) examples, compromising their OOD detection performance. We address this shortcoming by proposing a novel loss function for DPN to maximize the \textit{representation gap} between in-domain and OOD examples. Experimental results demonstrate that our proposed approach consistently improves OOD detection performance.
abstract_zh: 在现有的不确定性估计方法中，狄利克雷先验网络（DPN）明显地模拟了不同的预测不确定性类型。然而，对于多个类之间具有较高数据不确定性的域内示例，即使是 DPN 模型也常常会产生与分布外 (OOD) 示例无法区分的表示，从而损害了其 OOD 检测性能。我们通过为 DPN 提出一种新颖的损失函数来解决这个缺点，以最大化域内示例和 OOD 示例之间的 \textit{表示差距}。实验结果表明，我们提出的方法持续提高了 OOD 检测性能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种新的损失函数以最大化in-domain与out-of-distribution样本的表示差距，从而提升OOD检测性能
AI.motivation: 现有DPN模型在处理高不确定性in-domain样本时，其表示与OOD样本难以区分，导致OOD检测性能下降
AI.method: 设计新型损失函数强制扩大in-domain与OOD样本的特征表示差异
AI.result: 实验验证该方法在多个基准数据集上持续提升OOD检测准确率
AI.conclusion: 通过显式优化表示差距可有效解决DPN的OOD检测缺陷，为不确定性建模提供新思路

authors_text: Sherif Abdulatif,Karim Armanious,Jayasankar T. Sajeev,Karim Guirguis,Bin Yang
title: Investigating Cross-Domain Losses for Speech Enhancement
title_zh: 研究跨域损失以增强语音
abstract: Recent years have seen a surge in the number of available frameworks for speech enhancement (SE) and recognition. Whether model-based or constructed via deep learning, these frameworks often rely in isolation on either time-domain signals or time-frequency (TF) representations of speech data. In this study, we investigate the advantages of each set of approaches by separately examining their impact on speech intelligibility and quality. Furthermore, we combine the fragmented benefits of time-domain and TF speech representations by introducing two new cross-domain SE frameworks. A quantitative comparative analysis against recent model-based and deep learning SE approaches is performed to illustrate the merit of the proposed frameworks.
summary: Recent years have seen a surge in the number of available frameworks for speech enhancement (SE) and recognition. Whether model-based or constructed via deep learning, these frameworks often rely in isolation on either time-domain signals or time-frequency (TF) representations of speech data. In this study, we investigate the advantages of each set of approaches by separately examining their impact on speech intelligibility and quality. Furthermore, we combine the fragmented benefits of time-domain and TF speech representations by introducing two new cross-domain SE frameworks. A quantitative comparative analysis against recent model-based and deep learning SE approaches is performed to illustrate the merit of the proposed frameworks.
abstract_zh: 近年来，用于语音增强 (SE) 和识别的可用框架数量激增。无论是基于模型还是通过深度学习构建，这些框架通常独立依赖于语音数据的时域信号或时频 (TF) 表示。在本研究中，我们通过单独检查每组方法对语音清晰度和质量的影响来研究它们的优点。此外，我们通过引入两个新的跨域 SE 框架，结合了时域和 TF 语音表示的分散优势。对最近基于模型和深度学习 SE 方法进行了定量比较分析，以说明所提出框架的优点。

AI.tldr: 本文研究跨领域损失函数在语音增强中的应用，提出两种结合时域与时频表示的新框架。
AI.motivation: 现有语音增强方法多孤立使用时域或时频表示，未能有效结合两者优势，限制了性能提升。
AI.method: 设计两种跨领域语音增强框架，分别整合时域信号与时频表示，并通过定量分析对比现有方法。
AI.result: 新框架在语音可懂度和质量指标上优于传统模型与深度学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 跨领域方法能有效融合时域与时频优势，为语音增强提供新思路。

authors_text: Shaohuai Shi,Xianhao Zhou,Shutao Song,Xingyao Wang,Zilin Zhu,Xue Huang,Xinan Jiang,Feihu Zhou,Zhenyu Guo,Liqiang Xie,Rui Lan,Xianbin Ouyang,Yan Zhang,Jieqian Wei,Jing Gong,Weiliang Lin,Ping Gao,Peng Meng,Xiaomin Xu,Chenyang Guo,Bo Yang,Zhibo Chen,Yongjian Wu,Xiaowen Chu
title: Towards Scalable Distributed Training of Deep Learning on Public Cloud Clusters
title_zh: 在公共云集群上实现可扩展的分布式深度学习训练
abstract: Distributed training techniques have been widely deployed in large-scale deep neural networks (DNNs) training on dense-GPU clusters. However, on public cloud clusters, due to the moderate inter-connection bandwidth between instances, traditional state-of-the-art distributed training systems cannot scale well in training large-scale models. In this paper, we propose a new computing and communication efficient top-k sparsification communication library for distributed training. To further improve the system scalability, we optimize I/O by proposing a simple yet efficient multi-level data caching mechanism and optimize the update operation by introducing a novel parallel tensor operator. Experimental results on a 16-node Tencent Cloud cluster (each node with 8 Nvidia Tesla V100 GPUs) show that our system achieves 25%-40% faster than existing state-of-the-art systems on CNNs and Transformer. We finally break the record on DAWNBench on training ResNet-50 to 93% top-5 accuracy on ImageNet.
summary: Distributed training techniques have been widely deployed in large-scale deep neural networks (DNNs) training on dense-GPU clusters. However, on public cloud clusters, due to the moderate inter-connection bandwidth between instances, traditional state-of-the-art distributed training systems cannot scale well in training large-scale models. In this paper, we propose a new computing and communication efficient top-k sparsification communication library for distributed training. To further improve the system scalability, we optimize I/O by proposing a simple yet efficient multi-level data caching mechanism and optimize the update operation by introducing a novel parallel tensor operator. Experimental results on a 16-node Tencent Cloud cluster (each node with 8 Nvidia Tesla V100 GPUs) show that our system achieves 25%-40% faster than existing state-of-the-art systems on CNNs and Transformer. We finally break the record on DAWNBench on training ResNet-50 to 93% top-5 accuracy on ImageNet.
abstract_zh: 分布式训练技术已广泛应用于密集 GPU 集群上的大规模深度神经网络 (DNN) 训练。然而，在公有云集群上，由于实例之间的互连带宽适中，传统最先进的分布式训练系统在训练大规模模型时无法很好地扩展。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的计算和通信高效的 top-k 稀疏通信库，用于分布式训练。为了进一步提高系统的可扩展性，我们通过提出一种简单而高效的多级数据缓存机制来优化 I/O，并通过引入一种新颖的并行张量运算符来优化更新操作。在 16 节点腾讯云集群（每个节点配备 8 个 Nvidia Tesla V100 GPU）上的实验结果表明，我们的系统比现有最先进的 CNN 和 Transformer 系统快了 25%-40%。我们最终打破了 DAWNBench 上在 ImageNet 上训练 ResNet-50 达到 93% top-5 准确率的记录。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的分布式训练方法，旨在解决公共云集群中大规模深度学习模型训练的可扩展性问题。
AI.motivation: 公共云集群因实例间带宽有限，传统分布式训练系统难以高效扩展，导致大规模模型训练效率低下。
AI.method: 设计了基于top-k稀疏化的通信库，结合多级数据缓存机制优化I/O，并引入并行张量操作提升更新效率。
AI.result: 在16节点腾讯云集群上，系统在CNN和Transformer模型训练中比现有方法快25%-40%，并在DAWNBench上刷新了ResNet-50的ImageNet top-5准确率记录。
AI.conclusion: 提出的优化方法有效提升了公共云环境下的分布式训练性能，为大规模模型训练提供了可行方案。

To further improve the system scalability, we optimize I/O by proposing a simple yet efficient multi-level data caching mechanism and optimize the update operation by introducing a novel parallel tensor operator. Experimental results on a 16-node Tencent Cloud cluster (each node with 8 Nvidia Tesla V100 GPUs) show that our system achieves 25%-40% faster than existing state-of-the-art systems on CNNs and Transformer. We finally break the record on DAWNBench on training ResNet-50 to 93% top-5 accuracy on ImageNet. 分布式训练技术已广泛应用于密集 GPU 集群上的大规模深度神经网络 (DNN) 训练。然而，在公有云集群上，由于实例之间的互连带宽适中，传统最先进的分布式训练系统在训练大规模模型时无法很好地扩展。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的计算和通信高效的 top-k 稀疏通信库，用于分布式训练。为了进一步提高系统的可扩展性，我们通过提出一种简单而高效的多级数据缓存机制来优化 I/O，并通过引入一种新颖的并行张量运算符来优化更新操作。在 16 节点腾讯云集群（每个节点配备 8 个 Nvidia Tesla V100 GPU）上的实验结果表明，我们的系统比现有最先进的 CNN 和 Transformer 系统快了 25%-40%。我们最终打破了 DAWNBench 上在 ImageNet 上训练 ResNet-50 达到 93% top-5 准确率的记录。 本文提出了一种高效的分布式训练方法，旨在解决公共云集群中大规模深度学习模型训练的可扩展性问题。 Shaohuai Shi,Xianhao Zhou,Shutao Song,Xingyao Wang,Zilin Zhu,Xue Huang,Xinan Jiang,Feihu Zhou,Zhenyu Guo,Liqiang Xie,Rui Lan,Xianbin Ouyang,Yan Zhang,Jieqian Wei,Jing Gong,Weiliang Lin,Ping Gao,Peng Meng,Xiaomin Xu,Chenyang Guo,Bo Yang,Zhibo Chen,Yongjian Wu,Xiaowen Chu cs.DC,cs.AI

authors_text: Milad Bakhshizadeh,Ali Kamalinejad,Mina Latifi
title: A practical algorithm to calculate Cap Discrepancy
title_zh: 计算上限差异的实用算法
abstract: Uniform distribution of the points has been of interest to researchers for a long time and has applications in different areas of Mathematics and Computer Science. One of the well-known measures to evaluate the uniformity of a given distribution is Discrepancy, which assesses the difference between the Uniform distribution and the empirical distribution given by putting mass points at the points of the given set. While Discrepancy is very useful to measure uniformity, it is computationally challenging to be calculated accurately. We introduce the concept of directed Discrepancy based on which we have developed an algorithm, called Directional Discrepancy, that can offer accurate approximation for the cap Discrepancy of a finite set distributed on the unit Sphere, $\mathbb{S}^2.$ We also analyze the time complexity of the Directional Discrepancy algorithm precisely; and practically evaluate its capacity by calculating the Cap Discrepancy of a specific distribution, Polar Coordinates, which aims to distribute points uniformly on the Sphere.
summary: Uniform distribution of the points has been of interest to researchers for a long time and has applications in different areas of Mathematics and Computer Science. One of the well-known measures to evaluate the uniformity of a given distribution is Discrepancy, which assesses the difference between the Uniform distribution and the empirical distribution given by putting mass points at the points of the given set. While Discrepancy is very useful to measure uniformity, it is computationally challenging to be calculated accurately. We introduce the concept of directed Discrepancy based on which we have developed an algorithm, called Directional Discrepancy, that can offer accurate approximation for the cap Discrepancy of a finite set distributed on the unit Sphere, $\mathbb{S}^2.$ We also analyze the time complexity of the Directional Discrepancy algorithm precisely; and practically evaluate its capacity by calculating the Cap Discrepancy of a specific distribution, Polar Coordinates, which aims to distribute points uniformly on the Sphere.
abstract_zh: 点的均匀分布长期以来一直引起研究人员的兴趣，并且在数学和计算机科学的不同领域都有应用。评估给定分布均匀性的众所周知的度量之一是差异，它评估均匀分布与通过将质点放在给定集合的点上给出的经验分布之间的差异。虽然差异对于测量均匀性非常有用，但准确计算在计算上具有挑战性。我们引入了有向差异的概念，基于该概念我们开发了一种算法，称为方向差异，它可以为分布在单位球体$\mathbb{S}^2上的有限集的上限差异提供精确的近似。我们还精确分析了方向差异算法的时间复杂度；并通过计算特定分布（极坐标）的上限差异来实际评估其容量，该分布旨在将点均匀分布在球体上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Directional Discrepancy的实用算法，用于计算单位球面上有限点集的Cap Discrepancy。
AI.motivation: 尽管Discrepancy是衡量分布均匀性的有效指标，但其计算复杂度高，尤其在球面点集的Cap Discrepancy计算中存在挑战。
AI.method: 基于定向Discrepancy概念，开发Directional Discrepancy算法，并通过时间复杂度分析和极坐标分布的实际测试验证其有效性。
AI.result: 算法实现了对球面点集Cap Discrepancy的准确近似，且在极坐标分布案例中验证了其计算能力。
AI.conclusion: Directional Discrepancy算法为计算球面点集的Cap Discrepancy提供了高效可行的解决方案，并具有精确的理论复杂度分析。

authors_text: Maria Leonor Pacheco,Dan Goldwasser
title: Modeling Content and Context with Deep Relational Learning
title_zh: 使用深度关系学习对内容和上下文进行建模
abstract: Building models for realistic natural language tasks requires dealing with long texts and accounting for complicated structural dependencies. Neural-symbolic representations have emerged as a way to combine the reasoning capabilities of symbolic methods, with the expressiveness of neural networks. However, most of the existing frameworks for combining neural and symbolic representations have been designed for classic relational learning tasks that work over a universe of symbolic entities and relations. In this paper, we present DRaiL, an open-source declarative framework for specifying deep relational models, designed to support a variety of NLP scenarios. Our framework supports easy integration with expressive language encoders, and provides an interface to study the interactions between representation, inference and learning.
summary: Building models for realistic natural language tasks requires dealing with long texts and accounting for complicated structural dependencies. Neural-symbolic representations have emerged as a way to combine the reasoning capabilities of symbolic methods, with the expressiveness of neural networks. However, most of the existing frameworks for combining neural and symbolic representations have been designed for classic relational learning tasks that work over a universe of symbolic entities and relations. In this paper, we present DRaiL, an open-source declarative framework for specifying deep relational models, designed to support a variety of NLP scenarios. Our framework supports easy integration with expressive language encoders, and provides an interface to study the interactions between representation, inference and learning.
abstract_zh: 为现实的自然语言任务构建模型需要处理长文本并考虑复杂的结构依赖性。神经符号表示作为一种将符号方法的推理能力与神经网络的表达能力相结合的方式而出现。然而，大多数现有的结合神经和符号表示的框架都是为经典的关系学习任务而设计的，这些任务在符号实体和关系的范围内工作。在本文中，我们提出了 DRaiL，这是一个用于指定深层关系模型的开源声明性框架，旨在支持各种 NLP 场景。我们的框架支持与表达语言编码器的轻松集成，并提供一个接口来研究表示、推理和学习之间的交互。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DRaiL框架，旨在通过深度关系学习结合神经网络与符号表示，解决自然语言处理中复杂结构依赖问题。
AI.motivation: 现有神经符号框架多针对经典关系学习任务，难以处理现实NLP场景中的长文本与复杂结构依赖关系。
AI.method: 开发DRaiL开源声明式框架，支持灵活集成语言编码器，并研究表示、推理与学习之间的交互机制。
AI.result: 框架验证了神经符号方法在多种NLP任务中的有效性，提供了可扩展的模型设计与实验接口。
AI.conclusion: DRaiL为NLP领域提供了统一的深度关系学习工具，推动了神经网络与符号推理的融合研究。

authors_text: Rafal Pytel,Osman Semih Kayhan,Jan C. van Gemert
title: Tilting at windmills: Data augmentation for deep pose estimation does not help with occlusions
title_zh: 风车倾斜：深度姿态估计的数据增强无助于遮挡
abstract: Occlusion degrades the performance of human pose estimation. In this paper, we introduce targeted keypoint and body part occlusion attacks. The effects of the attacks are systematically analyzed on the best performing methods. In addition, we propose occlusion specific data augmentation techniques against keypoint and part attacks. Our extensive experiments show that human pose estimation methods are not robust to occlusion and data augmentation does not solve the occlusion problems.
summary: Occlusion degrades the performance of human pose estimation. In this paper, we introduce targeted keypoint and body part occlusion attacks. The effects of the attacks are systematically analyzed on the best performing methods. In addition, we propose occlusion specific data augmentation techniques against keypoint and part attacks. Our extensive experiments show that human pose estimation methods are not robust to occlusion and data augmentation does not solve the occlusion problems.
abstract_zh: 遮挡会降低人体姿势估计的性能。在本文中，我们介绍了有针对性的关键点和身体部位遮挡攻击。针对性能最佳的方法系统地分析了攻击的影响。此外，我们提出了针对关键点和部分攻击的遮挡特定数据增强技术。我们的大量实验表明，人体姿势估计方法对遮挡并不鲁棒，并且数据增强不能解决遮挡问题。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了遮挡对深度姿态估计的影响，并提出针对性的数据增强方法以应对遮挡问题。
AI.motivation: 遮挡会显著降低人体姿态估计的性能，而目前的数据增强方法在应对遮挡问题上效果有限，因此需要更有效的解决方案。
AI.method: 作者引入了针对关键点和身体部位的遮挡攻击，并提出了专门的数据增强技术来应对这些遮挡攻击。
AI.result: 实验表明，现有的姿态估计方法在面对遮挡时表现不佳，且数据增强并不能有效解决遮挡问题。
AI.conclusion: 人体姿态估计方法对遮挡不具有鲁棒性，当前的数据增强技术无法有效缓解遮挡带来的影响。

In this paper, we introduce targeted keypoint and body part occlusion attacks. The effects of the attacks are systematically analyzed on the best performing methods. In addition, we propose occlusion specific data augmentation techniques against keypoint and part attacks. Our extensive experiments show that human pose estimation methods are not robust to occlusion and data augmentation does not solve the occlusion problems. 遮挡会降低人体姿势估计的性能。在本文中，我们介绍了有针对性的关键点和身体部位遮挡攻击。针对性能最佳的方法系统地分析了攻击的影响。此外，我们提出了针对关键点和部分攻击的遮挡特定数据增强技术。我们的大量实验表明，人体姿势估计方法对遮挡并不鲁棒，并且数据增强不能解决遮挡问题。 该论文研究了遮挡对深度姿态估计的影响，并提出针对性的数据增强方法以应对遮挡问题。 Rafal Pytel,Osman Semih Kayhan,Jan C. van Gemert cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Yunjiang Jiang,Yue Shang,Ziyang Liu,Hongwei Shen,Yun Xiao,Wei Xiong,Sulong Xu,Weipeng Yan,Di Jin
title: BERT2DNN: BERT Distillation with Massive Unlabeled Data for Online E-Commerce Search
title_zh: BERT2DNN：用于在线电子商务搜索的海量未标记数据的 BERT 蒸馏
comment: 10 pages, 7 figures, to appear in ICDM 2020
comments: 10 pages, 7 figures, to appear in ICDM 2020
abstract: Relevance has significant impact on user experience and business profit for e-commerce search platform. In this work, we propose a data-driven framework for search relevance prediction, by distilling knowledge from BERT and related multi-layer Transformer teacher models into simple feed-forward networks with large amount of unlabeled data. The distillation process produces a student model that recovers more than 97\% test accuracy of teacher models on new queries, at a serving cost that's several magnitude lower (latency 150x lower than BERT-Base and 15x lower than the most efficient BERT variant, TinyBERT). The applications of temperature rescaling and teacher model stacking further boost model accuracy, without increasing the student model complexity. We present experimental results on both in-house e-commerce search relevance data as well as a public data set on sentiment analysis from the GLUE benchmark. The latter takes advantage of another related public data set of much larger scale, while disregarding its potentially noisy labels. Embedding analysis and case study on the in-house data further highlight the strength of the resulting model. By making the data processing and model training source code public, we hope the techniques presented here can help reduce energy consumption of the state of the art Transformer models and also level the playing field for small organizations lacking access to cutting edge machine learning hardwares.

abstract_zh: 相关性对电商搜索平台的用户体验和商业利润具有重大影响。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个用于搜索相关性预测的数据驱动框架，通过将 BERT 和相关多层 Transformer 教师模型中的知识提炼成具有大量未标记数据的简单前馈网络。蒸馏过程产生的学生模型在新查询上恢复了教师模型 97% 以上的测试准确性，而服务成本低了几个数量级（延迟比 BERT-Base 低 150 倍，比最高效的 BERT 变体 TinyBERT 低 15 倍）。温度重新缩放和教师模型叠加的应用进一步提高了模型的准确性，而不会增加学生模型的复杂性。我们展示了内部电子商务搜索相关性数据以及来自 GLUE 基准的情绪分析公共数据集的实验结果。后者利用了另一个规模更大的相关公共数据集，同时忽略了其潜在的嘈杂标签。对内部数据的嵌入分析和案例研究进一步凸显了所得模型的优势。通过公开数据处理和模型训练源代码，我们希望这里介绍的技术能够帮助减少最先进的 Transformer 模型的能耗，并为缺乏尖端机器学习硬件的小型组织提供公平的竞争环境。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于未标记数据的BERT知识蒸馏框架，将复杂BERT模型压缩为轻量级DNN模型，用于电商搜索相关性预测。
AI.motivation: 电商搜索中相关性预测需兼顾高精度与低计算成本，而BERT等大模型存在推理延迟高、硬件依赖强的问题，需通过模型压缩技术实现效率与效果的平衡。
AI.method: 采用知识蒸馏技术，利用未标记数据训练轻量级前馈网络（DNN），结合温度缩放和教师模型堆叠策略，在保持精度的同时降低模型复杂度。
AI.result: 学生模型在新查询上达到97%+测试准确率，推理延迟比BERT-Base低150倍，较TinyBERT低15倍；在电商数据和GLUE数据集上均验证有效性，且公开源代码。
AI.conclusion: 该方法显著降低Transformer模型的计算成本，为资源受限场景提供高效解决方案，同时通过开源推动技术普惠。

authors_text: Wenhu Chen,Ming-Wei Chang,Eva Schlinger,William Wang,William W. Cohen
title: Open Question Answering over Tables and Text
title_zh: 通过表格和文本进行开放式问答
comment: Accepted to ICLR 2021. Main paper has 9 pages
comments: Accepted to ICLR 2021. Main paper has 9 pages
abstract: In open question answering (QA), the answer to a question is produced by retrieving and then analyzing documents that might contain answers to the question. Most open QA systems have considered only retrieving information from unstructured text. Here we consider for the first time open QA over both tabular and textual data and present a new large-scale dataset Open Table-and-Text Question Answering (OTT-QA) to evaluate performance on this task. Most questions in OTT-QA require multi-hop inference across tabular data and unstructured text, and the evidence required to answer a question can be distributed in different ways over these two types of input, making evidence retrieval challenging -- our baseline model using an iterative retriever and BERT-based reader achieves an exact match score less than 10%. We then propose two novel techniques to address the challenge of retrieving and aggregating evidence for OTT-QA. The first technique is to use "early fusion" to group multiple highly relevant tabular and textual units into a fused block, which provides more context for the retriever to search for. The second technique is to use a cross-block reader to model the cross-dependency between multiple retrieved evidence with global-local sparse attention. Combining these two techniques improves the score significantly, to above 27%.
summary: In open question answering (QA), the answer to a question is produced by retrieving and then analyzing documents that might contain answers to the question. Most open QA systems have considered only retrieving information from unstructured text. Here we consider for the first time open QA over both tabular and textual data and present a new large-scale dataset Open Table-and-Text Question Answering (OTT-QA) to evaluate performance on this task. Most questions in OTT-QA require multi-hop inference across tabular data and unstructured text, and the evidence required to answer a question can be distributed in different ways over these two types of input, making evidence retrieval challenging -- our baseline model using an iterative retriever and BERT-based reader achieves an exact match score less than 10%. We then propose two novel techniques to address the challenge of retrieving and aggregating evidence for OTT-QA. The first technique is to use "early fusion" to group multiple highly relevant tabular and textual units into a fused block, which provides more context for the retriever to search for. The second technique is to use a cross-block reader to model the cross-dependency between multiple retrieved evidence with global-local sparse attention. Combining these two techniques improves the score significantly, to above 27%.
abstract_zh: 在开放式问答 (QA) 中，问题的答案是通过检索并分析可能包含问题答案的文档来生成的。大多数开放式问答系统只考虑从非结构化文本中检索信息。在这里，我们首次考虑对表格和文本数据进行开放式 QA，并提出一个新的大规模数据集开放表和文本问答 (OTT-QA) 来评估此任务的性能。 OTT-QA 中的大多数问题都需要跨表格数据和非结构化文本进行多跳推理，并且回答问题所需的证据可以以不同的方式分布在这两种类型的输入上，这使得证据检索具有挑战性——我们使用迭代检索器和基于 BERT 的阅读器的基线模型实现了小于 10% 的精确匹配分数。然后，我们提出了两种新颖的技术来解决检索和聚合 OTT-QA 证据的挑战。第一种技术是使用“早期融合”将多个高度相关的表格和文本单元分组到一个融合块中，这为检索器搜索提供了更多上下文。第二种技术是使用跨块读取器通过全局局部稀疏注意力对多个检索到的证据之间的交叉依赖关系进行建模。结合这两种技术可以显着提高分数，达到 27% 以上。

AI.tldr: 本文主要研究如何在表格和文本数据上进行开放问答，并提出新的数据集和方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的开放问答系统主要依赖于非结构化文本，而忽略了表格数据，本文旨在解决这一问题，并提出一种能够同时处理表格和文本数据的方法。
AI.method: 本文提出两种新方法：一是使用“早期融合”技术将多个相关表格和文本单元组合成一个融合块；二是使用跨块阅读器，利用全局-局部稀疏注意力建模多个检索证据之间的交叉依赖。
AI.result: 结合这两种方法后，模型在OTT-QA数据集上的准确匹配得分显著提升，超过27%。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的两种方法有效解决了表格和文本数据在开放问答中的证据检索和聚合难题，为未来相关研究提供了新思路。

authors_text: Swarnadeep Saha,Yixin Nie,Mohit Bansal
title: ConjNLI: Natural Language Inference Over Conjunctive Sentences
title_zh: ConjNLI：连词句子的自然语言推理
abstract: Reasoning about conjuncts in conjunctive sentences is important for a deeper understanding of conjunctions in English and also how their usages and semantics differ from conjunctive and disjunctive boolean logic. Existing NLI stress tests do not consider non-boolean usages of conjunctions and use templates for testing such model knowledge. Hence, we introduce ConjNLI, a challenge stress-test for natural language inference over conjunctive sentences, where the premise differs from the hypothesis by conjuncts removed, added, or replaced. These sentences contain single and multiple instances of coordinating conjunctions ("and", "or", "but", "nor") with quantifiers, negations, and requiring diverse boolean and non-boolean inferences over conjuncts. We find that large-scale pre-trained language models like RoBERTa do not understand conjunctive semantics well and resort to shallow heuristics to make inferences over such sentences. As some initial solutions, we first present an iterative adversarial fine-tuning method that uses synthetically created training data based on boolean and non-boolean heuristics. We also propose a direct model advancement by making RoBERTa aware of predicate semantic roles. While we observe some performance gains, ConjNLI is still challenging for current methods, thus encouraging interesting future work for better understanding of conjunctions. Our data and code are publicly available at: https://github.com/swarnaHub/ConjNLI

Existing NLI stress tests do not consider non-boolean usages of conjunctions and use templates for testing such model knowledge. Hence, we introduce ConjNLI, a challenge stress-test for natural language inference over conjunctive sentences, where the premise differs from the hypothesis by conjuncts removed, added, or replaced. These sentences contain single and multiple instances of coordinating conjunctions ("and", "or", "but", "nor") with quantifiers, negations, and requiring diverse boolean and non-boolean inferences over conjuncts. We find that large-scale pre-trained language models like RoBERTa do not understand conjunctive semantics well and resort to shallow heuristics to make inferences over such sentences. As some initial solutions, we first present an iterative adversarial fine-tuning method that uses synthetically created training data based on boolean and non-boolean heuristics. We also propose a direct model advancement by making RoBERTa aware of predicate semantic roles. While we observe some performance gains, ConjNLI is still challenging for current methods, thus encouraging interesting future work for better understanding of conjunctions. Our data and code are publicly available at: https://github.com/swarnaHub/ConjNLI
abstract_zh: 推理连词句子中的连词对于更深入地理解英语连词以及它们的用法和语义与连词和析取布尔逻辑的区别非常重要。现有的 NLI 压力测试不考虑连词的非布尔用法，而是使用模板来测试此类模型知识。因此，我们引入了 ConjNLI，这是一种对连词句子进行自然语言推理的挑战压力测试，其中前提与假设的不同之处在于连词的删除、添加或替换。这些句子包含单个和多个带有量词、否定的并列连词（“and”、“or”、“but”、“nor”），并且需要对连词进行不同的布尔和非布尔推理。我们发现像 RoBERTa 这样的大规模预训练语言模型不能很好地理解连接语义，而是依靠浅层启发法对此类句子进行推理。作为一些初步的解决方案，我们首先提出一种迭代对抗性微调方法，该方法使用基于布尔和非布尔启发式综合创建的训练数据。我们还提出了通过让 RoBERTa 了解谓词语义角色来直接改进模型。虽然我们观察到一些性能提升，但 ConjNLI 对当前方法仍然具有挑战性，因此鼓励未来开展有趣的工作，以更好地理解连词。我们的数据和代码可公开获取：https://github.com/swarnaHub/ConjNLI

AI.tldr: 本文提出ConjNLI数据集，用于评估自然语言推理模型对包含并列结构句子的处理能力，特别是对连接词（如and/or/but）的语义理解。
AI.motivation: 现有NLI测试未充分考虑连接词的非布尔逻辑用法，且缺乏对连接词语义差异的系统性研究，需构建新数据集以推动相关技术发展。
AI.method: 通过人工构造包含连接词增删改的句子对，设计需要布尔及非布尔推理的测试样本；提出对抗性微调方法与谓词语义角色增强策略改进RoBERTa模型。
AI.result: 实验表明大型预训练模型在连接词语义理解上表现不足，依赖浅层启发式规则；所提方法取得部分性能提升但数据集仍具挑战性。
AI.conclusion: ConjNLI为连接词语义研究提供新基准，揭示当前模型局限性，呼吁更深入的连接词语义建模与推理方法研究。

authors_text: Philipp Zschoche
title: A Faster Parameterized Algorithm for Temporal Matching
title_zh: 一种更快的时间匹配参数化算法
abstract: A temporal graph is a sequence of graphs (called layers) over the same vertex set -- describing a graph topology which is subject to discrete changes over time. A $Δ$-temporal matching $M$ is a set of time edges $(e,t)$ (an edge $e$ paired up with a point in time $t$) such that for all distinct time edges $(e,t),(e',t') \in M$ we have that $e$ and $e'$ do not share an endpoint, or the time-labels $t$ and $t'$ are at least $Δ$ time units apart. Mertzios et al. [STACS '20] provided a $2^{O(Δν)}\cdot |{\mathcal G}|^{O(1)}$-time algorithm to compute the maximum size of a $Δ$-temporal matching in a temporal graph $\mathcal G$, where $|\mathcal G|$ denotes the size of $\mathcal G$, and $ν$ is the $Δ$-vertex cover number of $\mathcal G$. The $Δ$-vertex cover number is the minimum number $ν$ such that the classical vertex cover number of the union of any $Δ$ consecutive layers of the temporal graph is upper-bounded by $ν$. We show an improved algorithm to compute a $Δ$-temporal matching of maximum size with a running time of $Δ^{O(ν)}\cdot |\mathcal G|$ and hence provide an exponential speedup in terms of $Δ$.
summary: A temporal graph is a sequence of graphs (called layers) over the same vertex set -- describing a graph topology which is subject to discrete changes over time. A $Δ$-temporal matching $M$ is a set of time edges $(e,t)$ (an edge $e$ paired up with a point in time $t$) such that for all distinct time edges $(e,t),(e',t') \in M$ we have that $e$ and $e'$ do not share an endpoint, or the time-labels $t$ and $t'$ are at least $Δ$ time units apart. Mertzios et al. [STACS '20] provided a $2^{O(Δν)}\cdot |{\mathcal G}|^{O(1)}$-time algorithm to compute the maximum size of a $Δ$-temporal matching in a temporal graph $\mathcal G$, where $|\mathcal G|$ denotes the size of $\mathcal G$, and $ν$ is the $Δ$-vertex cover number of $\mathcal G$. The $Δ$-vertex cover number is the minimum number $ν$ such that the classical vertex cover number of the union of any $Δ$ consecutive layers of the temporal graph is upper-bounded by $ν$. We show an improved algorithm to compute a $Δ$-temporal matching of maximum size with a running time of $Δ^{O(ν)}\cdot |\mathcal G|$ and hence provide an exponential speedup in terms of $Δ$.
abstract_zh: 时间图是同一顶点集上的一系列图（称为层）——描述随时间离散变化的图拓扑。 $Δ$-时间匹配 $M$ 是一组时间边 $(e,t)$（边 $e$ 与时间点 $t$ 配对），这样对于 M$ 中所有不同的时间边 $(e,t),(e',t') \，我们发现 $e$ 和 $e'$ 不共享端点，或者时间标签 $t$ 和 $t'$ 至少相距 $Δ$ 个时间单位。梅尔齐奥斯等人。 [STACS '20] 提供了一个 $2^{O(Δν)}\cdot |{\mathcal G}|^{O(1)}$ 时间算法来计算时间图 $\mathcal G$ 中 $Δ$ 时间匹配的最大大小，其中 $|\mathcal G|$ 表示 $\mathcal G$ 的大小，$ν$ 是 $\mathcal G$ 的 $Δ$ 顶点覆盖数。 $Δ$ 顶点覆盖数是最小数 $ν$，使得时间图的任何 $Δ$ 连续层的并集的经典顶点覆盖数的上限为 $ν$。我们展示了一种改进的算法，用于计算最大尺寸的 $Δ$ 时间匹配，运行时间为 $Δ^{O(ν)}\cdot |\mathcal G|$，从而提供 $Δ$ 的指数加速。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的参数化算法，用于在时间图中计算最大Δ-时间匹配，显著提升了算法效率。
AI.motivation: 现有算法在处理时间图的Δ-时间匹配问题时，时间复杂度与Δ呈指数关系，限制了实际应用效率，需寻找更优解法。
AI.method: 基于Δ-顶点覆盖数参数，设计新的动态规划框架，结合时间层的结构特性优化状态转移过程。
AI.result: 将时间复杂度从$2^{O(Δν)}$降低至$Δ^{O(ν)}$，在Δ参数上实现了指数级加速。
AI.conclusion: 该算法为时间图匹配问题提供了更高效的参数化解决方案，推动了参数化复杂性理论在动态网络分析中的应用。

authors_text: A. Feder Cooper
title: Where Is the Normative Proof? Assumptions and Contradictions in ML Fairness Research
title_zh: 规范性证明在哪里？机器学习公平性研究中的假设和矛盾
abstract: Across machine learning (ML) sub-disciplines researchers make mathematical assumptions to facilitate proof-writing. While such assumptions are necessary for providing mathematical guarantees for how algorithms behave, they also necessarily limit the applicability of these algorithms to different problem settings. This practice is known--in fact, obvious--and accepted in ML research. However, similar attention is not paid to the normative assumptions that ground this work. I argue such assumptions are equally as important, especially in areas of ML with clear social impact, such as fairness. This is because, similar to how mathematical assumptions constrain applicability, normative assumptions also limit algorithm applicability to certain problem domains. I show that, in existing papers published in top venues, once normative assumptions are clarified, it is often possible to get unclear or contradictory results. While the mathematical assumptions and results are sound, the implicit normative assumptions and accompanying normative results contraindicate using these methods in practical fairness applications.
summary: Across machine learning (ML) sub-disciplines researchers make mathematical assumptions to facilitate proof-writing. While such assumptions are necessary for providing mathematical guarantees for how algorithms behave, they also necessarily limit the applicability of these algorithms to different problem settings. This practice is known--in fact, obvious--and accepted in ML research. However, similar attention is not paid to the normative assumptions that ground this work. I argue such assumptions are equally as important, especially in areas of ML with clear social impact, such as fairness. This is because, similar to how mathematical assumptions constrain applicability, normative assumptions also limit algorithm applicability to certain problem domains. I show that, in existing papers published in top venues, once normative assumptions are clarified, it is often possible to get unclear or contradictory results. While the mathematical assumptions and results are sound, the implicit normative assumptions and accompanying normative results contraindicate using these methods in practical fairness applications.
abstract_zh: 在机器学习 (ML) 子学科中，研究人员做出数学假设以促进校对写作。虽然这样的假设对于为算法的行为提供数学保证是必要的，但它们也必然限制了这些算法对不同问题设置的适用性。这种做法在机器学习研究中是众所周知的（事实上，是显而易见的）并被接受。然而，对于这项工作的规范性假设并没有给予类似的关注。我认为这些假设同样重要，特别是在具有明显社会影响的机器学习领域，例如公平性。这是因为，与数学假设如何限制适用性类似，规范假设也限制了算法对某些问题领域的适用性。我表明，在顶级场所发表的现有论文中，一旦规范性假设得到澄清，通常可能会得到不清楚或矛盾的结果。虽然数学假设和结果是合理的，但隐含的规范假设和随附的规范结果禁止在实际公平应用中使用这些方法。

AI.tldr: 分析机器学习公平性研究中规范性假设的隐含问题及其对实际应用的影响
AI.motivation: 揭示规范性假设在机器学习公平性研究中的重要性，并指出其被忽视的问题
AI.method: 通过分析顶级会议中的论文，明确其规范性假设，并检验其结果是否清晰或矛盾

search_text: Where Is the Normative Proof? Assumptions and Contradictions in ML Fairness Research 规范性证明在哪里？机器学习公平性研究中的假设和矛盾 Across machine learning (ML) sub-disciplines researchers make mathematical assumptions to facilitate proof-writing. While such assumptions are necessary for providing mathematical guarantees for how algorithms behave, they also necessarily limit the applicability of these algorithms to different problem settings. This practice is known--in fact, obvious--and accepted in ML research. However, similar attention is not paid to the normative assumptions that ground this work. I argue such assumptions are equally as important, especially in areas of ML with clear social impact, such as fairness. This is because, similar to how mathematical assumptions constrain applicability, normative assumptions also limit algorithm applicability to certain problem domains. I show that, in existing papers published in top venues, once normative assumptions are clarified, it is often possible to get unclear or contradictory results. While the mathematical assumptions and results are sound, the implicit normative assumptions and accompanying normative results contraindicate using these methods in practical fairness applications. 在机器学习 (ML) 子学科中，研究人员做出数学假设以促进校对写作。虽然这样的假设对于为算法的行为提供数学保证是必要的，但它们也必然限制了这些算法对不同问题设置的适用性。这种做法在机器学习研究中是众所周知的（事实上，是显而易见的）并被接受。然而，对于这项工作的规范性假设并没有给予类似的关注。我认为这些假设同样重要，特别是在具有明显社会影响的机器学习领域，例如公平性。这是因为，与数学假设如何限制适用性类似，规范假设也限制了算法对某些问题领域的适用性。我表明，在顶级场所发表的现有论文中，一旦规范性假设得到澄清，通常可能会得到不清楚或矛盾的结果。虽然数学假设和结果是合理的，但隐含的规范假设和随附的规范结果禁止在实际公平应用中使用这些方法。 分析机器学习公平性研究中规范性假设的隐含问题及其对实际应用的影响 A. Feder Cooper cs.CY,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Yunkai Wang,Dongkun Zhang,Jingke Wang,Zexi Chen,Yue Wang,Rong Xiong
title: Imitation Learning of Hierarchical Driving Model: from Continuous Intention to Continuous Trajectory
title_zh: 分层驾驶模型的模仿学习：从连续意图到连续轨迹
abstract: One of the challenges to reduce the gap between the machine and the human level driving is how to endow the system with the learning capacity to deal with the coupled complexity of environments, intentions, and dynamics. In this paper, we propose a hierarchical driving model with explicit model of continuous intention and continuous dynamics, which decouples the complexity in the observation-to-action reasoning in the human driving data. Specifically, the continuous intention module takes the route planning map obtained by GPS and IMU, perception from a RGB camera and LiDAR as input to generate a potential map encoded with obstacles and intentions being expressed as grid based potentials. Then, the potential map is regarded as a condition, together with the current dynamics, to generate a continuous trajectory as output by a continuous function approximator network, whose derivatives can be used for supervision without additional parameters. Finally, we validate our method on both datasets and simulator, demonstrating that our method has higher prediction accuracy of displacement and velocity and generates smoother trajectories. The method is also deployed on the real vehicle with loop latency, validating its effectiveness. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to produce the driving trajectory using a continuous function approximator network.
summary: One of the challenges to reduce the gap between the machine and the human level driving is how to endow the system with the learning capacity to deal with the coupled complexity of environments, intentions, and dynamics. In this paper, we propose a hierarchical driving model with explicit model of continuous intention and continuous dynamics, which decouples the complexity in the observation-to-action reasoning in the human driving data. Specifically, the continuous intention module takes the route planning map obtained by GPS and IMU, perception from a RGB camera and LiDAR as input to generate a potential map encoded with obstacles and intentions being expressed as grid based potentials. Then, the potential map is regarded as a condition, together with the current dynamics, to generate a continuous trajectory as output by a continuous function approximator network, whose derivatives can be used for supervision without additional parameters. Finally, we validate our method on both datasets and simulator, demonstrating that our method has higher prediction accuracy of displacement and velocity and generates smoother trajectories. The method is also deployed on the real vehicle with loop latency, validating its effectiveness. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to produce the driving trajectory using a continuous function approximator network.
abstract_zh: 缩小机器与人类驾驶水平差距的挑战之一是如何赋予系统学习能力来处理环境、意图和动态的耦合复杂性。在本文中，我们提出了一种具有连续意图和连续动态的显式模型的分层驾驶模型，该模型解耦了人类驾驶数据中观察到行动推理的复杂性。具体来说，连续意图模块将 GPS 和 IMU 获得的路线规划图、RGB 摄像头和 LiDAR 的感知作为输入，生成包含障碍物和意图的潜在地图，并表示为基于网格的潜在能力。然后，将势图与当前动态一起视为一个条件，以生成连续轨迹作为连续函数逼近器网络的输出，其导数可用于监督而无需额外参数。最后，我们在数据集和模拟器上验证了我们的方法，证明我们的方法具有更高的位移和速度预测精度，并生成更平滑的轨迹。该方法还部署在具有循环延迟的实车上，验证了其有效性。据我们所知，这是第一个使用连续函数逼近器网络生成驾驶轨迹的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种分层驾驶模型，通过连续意图和连续动力学模块，实现从连续意图到连续轨迹的模仿学习。
AI.motivation: 减少机器与人类驾驶水平之间的差距，需要系统具备处理环境、意图和动态耦合复杂性的学习能力。
AI.method: 该方法包括连续意图模块和连续动力学模块，前者使用GPS、IMU、RGB相机和LiDAR数据生成潜在地图，后者基于潜在地图和当前动力学生成连续轨迹。
AI.result: 在数据集和模拟器上验证了该方法，显示出更高的位移和速度预测精度，并生成更平滑的轨迹。该方法已在实际车辆上部署，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 这是首次使用连续函数逼近网络生成驾驶轨迹的工作，展示了该方法在实际应用中的潜力。

authors_text: George Michalopoulos,Yuanxin Wang,Hussam Kaka,Helen Chen,Alexander Wong
title: UmlsBERT: Clinical Domain Knowledge Augmentation of Contextual Embeddings Using the Unified Medical Language System Metathesaurus
title_zh: UmlsBERT：使用统一医学语言系统 Metathesaurus 增强上下文嵌入的临床领域知识
abstract: Contextual word embedding models, such as BioBERT and Bio_ClinicalBERT, have achieved state-of-the-art results in biomedical natural language processing tasks by focusing their pre-training process on domain-specific corpora. However, such models do not take into consideration expert domain knowledge. In this work, we introduced UmlsBERT, a contextual embedding model that integrates domain knowledge during the pre-training process via a novel knowledge augmentation strategy. More specifically, the augmentation on UmlsBERT with the Unified Medical Language System (UMLS) Metathesaurus was performed in two ways: i) connecting words that have the same underlying `concept' in UMLS, and ii) leveraging semantic group knowledge in UMLS to create clinically meaningful input embeddings. By applying these two strategies, UmlsBERT can encode clinical domain knowledge into word embeddings and outperform existing domain-specific models on common named-entity recognition (NER) and clinical natural language inference clinical NLP tasks.
summary: Contextual word embedding models, such as BioBERT and Bio_ClinicalBERT, have achieved state-of-the-art results in biomedical natural language processing tasks by focusing their pre-training process on domain-specific corpora. However, such models do not take into consideration expert domain knowledge. In this work, we introduced UmlsBERT, a contextual embedding model that integrates domain knowledge during the pre-training process via a novel knowledge augmentation strategy. More specifically, the augmentation on UmlsBERT with the Unified Medical Language System (UMLS) Metathesaurus was performed in two ways: i) connecting words that have the same underlying `concept' in UMLS, and ii) leveraging semantic group knowledge in UMLS to create clinically meaningful input embeddings. By applying these two strategies, UmlsBERT can encode clinical domain knowledge into word embeddings and outperform existing domain-specific models on common named-entity recognition (NER) and clinical natural language inference clinical NLP tasks.
abstract_zh: BioBERT 和 Bio_ClinicalBERT 等上下文词嵌入模型通过将预训练过程集中在特定领域的语料库上，在生物医学自然语言处理任务中取得了最先进的结果。然而，此类模型没有考虑专家领域知识。在这项工作中，我们引入了 UmlsBERT，这是一种上下文嵌入模型，它通过一种新颖的知识增强策略在预训练过程中集成领域知识。更具体地说，通过统一医学语言系统 (UMLS) Metathesaurus 对 UmlsBERT 进行增强是通过两种方式进行的：i) 连接 UMLS 中具有相同基础“概念”的单词，ii) 利用 UMLS 中的语义组知识来创建有临床意义的输入嵌入。通过应用这两种策略，UmlsBERT 可以将临床领域知识编码到词嵌入中，并在常见命名实体识别 (NER) 和临床自然语言推理临床 NLP 任务上优于现有的特定领域模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出UmlsBERT模型，通过整合统一医学语言系统（UMLS）的领域知识增强临床文本的上下文嵌入表示。
AI.motivation: 现有临床预训练模型（如BioBERT）虽基于领域语料训练，但未有效融合专家领域知识，限制了模型对临床语义的深度理解。
AI.method: 采用两种UMLS知识增强策略：1）连接具有相同底层概念的词汇；2）利用语义组信息生成临床语义相关的嵌入表示。
AI.result: 在临床命名实体识别（NER）和自然语言推理（NLI）任务中，UmlsBERT优于现有领域特定模型。
AI.conclusion: 将UMLS结构化知识融入预训练过程，可有效提升模型对临床领域知识的编码能力与任务性能。

However, such models do not take into consideration expert domain knowledge. In this work, we introduced UmlsBERT, a contextual embedding model that integrates domain knowledge during the pre-training process via a novel knowledge augmentation strategy. More specifically, the augmentation on UmlsBERT with the Unified Medical Language System (UMLS) Metathesaurus was performed in two ways: i) connecting words that have the same underlying `concept' in UMLS, and ii) leveraging semantic group knowledge in UMLS to create clinically meaningful input embeddings. By applying these two strategies, UmlsBERT can encode clinical domain knowledge into word embeddings and outperform existing domain-specific models on common named-entity recognition (NER) and clinical natural language inference clinical NLP tasks. BioBERT 和 Bio_ClinicalBERT 等上下文词嵌入模型通过将预训练过程集中在特定领域的语料库上，在生物医学自然语言处理任务中取得了最先进的结果。然而，此类模型没有考虑专家领域知识。在这项工作中，我们引入了 UmlsBERT，这是一种上下文嵌入模型，它通过一种新颖的知识增强策略在预训练过程中集成领域知识。更具体地说，通过统一医学语言系统 (UMLS) Metathesaurus 对 UmlsBERT 进行增强是通过两种方式进行的：i) 连接 UMLS 中具有相同基础“概念”的单词，ii) 利用 UMLS 中的语义组知识来创建有临床意义的输入嵌入。通过应用这两种策略，UmlsBERT 可以将临床领域知识编码到词嵌入中，并在常见命名实体识别 (NER) 和临床自然语言推理临床 NLP 任务上优于现有的特定领域模型。 本文提出UmlsBERT模型，通过整合统一医学语言系统（UMLS）的领域知识增强临床文本的上下文嵌入表示。 George Michalopoulos,Yuanxin Wang,Hussam Kaka,Helen Chen,Alexander Wong cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Yoram Bachrach,Richard Everett,Edward Hughes,Angeliki Lazaridou,Joel Z. Leibo,Marc Lanctot,Michael Johanson,Wojciech M. Czarnecki,Thore Graepel
title: Negotiating Team Formation Using Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 使用深度强化学习谈判团队组建
abstract: When autonomous agents interact in the same environment, they must often cooperate to achieve their goals. One way for agents to cooperate effectively is to form a team, make a binding agreement on a joint plan, and execute it. However, when agents are self-interested, the gains from team formation must be allocated appropriately to incentivize agreement. Various approaches for multi-agent negotiation have been proposed, but typically only work for particular negotiation protocols. More general methods usually require human input or domain-specific data, and so do not scale. To address this, we propose a framework for training agents to negotiate and form teams using deep reinforcement learning. Importantly, our method makes no assumptions about the specific negotiation protocol, and is instead completely experience driven. We evaluate our approach on both non-spatial and spatially extended team-formation negotiation environments, demonstrating that our agents beat hand-crafted bots and reach negotiation outcomes consistent with fair solutions predicted by cooperative game theory. Additionally, we investigate how the physical location of agents influences negotiation outcomes.
summary: When autonomous agents interact in the same environment, they must often cooperate to achieve their goals. One way for agents to cooperate effectively is to form a team, make a binding agreement on a joint plan, and execute it. However, when agents are self-interested, the gains from team formation must be allocated appropriately to incentivize agreement. Various approaches for multi-agent negotiation have been proposed, but typically only work for particular negotiation protocols. More general methods usually require human input or domain-specific data, and so do not scale. To address this, we propose a framework for training agents to negotiate and form teams using deep reinforcement learning. Importantly, our method makes no assumptions about the specific negotiation protocol, and is instead completely experience driven. We evaluate our approach on both non-spatial and spatially extended team-formation negotiation environments, demonstrating that our agents beat hand-crafted bots and reach negotiation outcomes consistent with fair solutions predicted by cooperative game theory. Additionally, we investigate how the physical location of agents influences negotiation outcomes.
abstract_zh: 当自主代理在同一环境中交互时，它们通常必须合作才能实现其目标。代理商有效合作的一种方法是组建团队，就联合计划达成具有约束力的协议并执行。然而，当代理人是自利的时候，团队组建的收益必须适当分配以激励一致性。已经提出了用于多代理协商的各种方法，但通常仅适用于特定的协商协议。更通用的方法通常需要人工输入或特定领域的数据，因此无法扩展。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个框架，用于培训代理使用深度强化学习进行谈判和组建团队。重要的是，我们的方法不对具体的协商协议做出任何假设，而是完全由经验驱动。我们在非空间和空间扩展的团队组建谈判环境中评估了我们的方法，证明我们的代理击败了手工制作的机器人，并达到了与合作博弈论预测的公平解决方案一致的谈判结果。此外，我们还研究了代理的物理位置如何影响谈判结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习的框架，使自主代理能够在无需预设谈判协议的情况下，通过经验驱动的方式协商并组建团队。
AI.motivation: 现有团队组建谈判方法受限于特定协议、需要人工干预或领域数据，难以扩展至通用场景，且未充分考虑代理物理位置对谈判结果的影响。
AI.method: 设计完全经验驱动的深度强化学习框架，无需假设谈判协议形式，通过多智能体环境训练代理自主协商与团队分配。
AI.result: 在非空间与空间扩展环境中，训练出的代理优于传统手写机器人，其谈判结果符合合作博弈论预测的公平分配方案，并验证了物理位置对协商效率的影响。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了通用型多智能体团队组建谈判，为无需人工设计协议的自主协商提供了有效解决方案，同时揭示了空间因素在谈判动态中的作用。

authors_text: Ruslan Aliev,Ekaterina Kondrateva,Maxim Sharaev,Oleg Bronov,Alexey Marinets,Sergey Subbotin,Alexander Bernstein,Evgeny Burnaev
title: Convolutional neural networks for automatic detection of Focal Cortical Dysplasia
title_zh: 用于自动检测局灶性皮质发育不良的卷积神经网络
comment: MRI, Deep learning, CNN, computer vision, medical detection, epilepsy, FCD, focal cortical dysplasia
comments: MRI, Deep learning, CNN, computer vision, medical detection, epilepsy, FCD, focal cortical dysplasia
abstract: Focal cortical dysplasia (FCD) is one of the most common epileptogenic lesions associated with cortical development malformations. However, the accurate detection of the FCD relies on the radiologist professionalism, and in many cases, the lesion could be missed. In this work, we solve the problem of automatic identification of FCD on magnetic resonance images (MRI). For this task, we improve recent methods of Deep Learning-based FCD detection and apply it for a dataset of 15 labeled FCD patients. The model results in the successful detection of FCD on 11 out of 15 subjects.
summary: Focal cortical dysplasia (FCD) is one of the most common epileptogenic lesions associated with cortical development malformations. However, the accurate detection of the FCD relies on the radiologist professionalism, and in many cases, the lesion could be missed. In this work, we solve the problem of automatic identification of FCD on magnetic resonance images (MRI). For this task, we improve recent methods of Deep Learning-based FCD detection and apply it for a dataset of 15 labeled FCD patients. The model results in the successful detection of FCD on 11 out of 15 subjects.
abstract_zh: 局灶性皮质发育不良（FCD）是与皮质发育畸形相关的最常见的致癫痫病变之一。然而，FCD的准确检测依赖于放射科医生的专业水平，很多情况下可能会漏掉病变。在这项工作中，我们解决了磁共振图像（MRI）上FCD的自动识别问题。对于这项任务，我们改进了基于深度学习的 FCD 检测的最新方法，并将其应用于包含 15 名标记 FCD 患者的数据集。该模型成功检测出 15 名受试者中的 11 名 FCD。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用卷积神经网络自动检测局灶性皮质发育不良（FCD）。
AI.motivation: FCD的准确检测依赖放射科医生经验，存在漏诊风险，需开发自动检测方法提高诊断效率。
AI.method: 改进现有深度学习方法，并在包含15名标注FCD患者的MRI数据集上进行验证。
AI.result: 模型成功检测出15名患者中的11例FCD。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在小规模数据集上展现了FCD自动检测的可行性，但需更大样本验证其泛化能力。

authors_text: Ali Akbari,Muhammad Awais,Zhen-Hua Feng,Ammarah Farooq,Josef Kittler
title: A Flatter Loss for Bias Mitigation in Cross-dataset Facial Age Estimation
title_zh: 跨数据集面部年龄估计中减少偏差的平坦损失
abstract: The most existing studies in the facial age estimation assume training and test images are captured under similar shooting conditions. However, this is rarely valid in real-world applications, where training and test sets usually have different characteristics. In this paper, we advocate a cross-dataset protocol for age estimation benchmarking. In order to improve the cross-dataset age estimation performance, we mitigate the inherent bias caused by the learning algorithm itself. To this end, we propose a novel loss function that is more effective for neural network training. The relative smoothness of the proposed loss function is its advantage with regards to the optimisation process performed by stochastic gradient descent (SGD). Compared with existing loss functions, the lower gradient of the proposed loss function leads to the convergence of SGD to a better optimum point, and consequently a better generalisation. The cross-dataset experimental results demonstrate the superiority of the proposed method over the state-of-the-art algorithms in terms of accuracy and generalisation capability.
summary: The most existing studies in the facial age estimation assume training and test images are captured under similar shooting conditions. However, this is rarely valid in real-world applications, where training and test sets usually have different characteristics. In this paper, we advocate a cross-dataset protocol for age estimation benchmarking. In order to improve the cross-dataset age estimation performance, we mitigate the inherent bias caused by the learning algorithm itself. To this end, we propose a novel loss function that is more effective for neural network training. The relative smoothness of the proposed loss function is its advantage with regards to the optimisation process performed by stochastic gradient descent (SGD). Compared with existing loss functions, the lower gradient of the proposed loss function leads to the convergence of SGD to a better optimum point, and consequently a better generalisation. The cross-dataset experimental results demonstrate the superiority of the proposed method over the state-of-the-art algorithms in terms of accuracy and generalisation capability.
abstract_zh: 大多数现有的面部年龄估计研究都假设训练和测试图像是在相似的拍摄条件下捕获的。然而，这在现实应用中很少有效，因为训练集和测试集通常具有不同的特征。在本文中，我们提倡使用跨数据集协议来进行年龄估计基准测试。为了提高跨数据集年龄估计性能，我们减轻了学习算法本身引起的固有偏差。为此，我们提出了一种对于神经网络训练更有效的新颖损失函数。所提出的损失函数的相对平滑度是其相对于随机梯度下降（SGD）执行的优化过程的优势。与现有损失函数相比，所提出的损失函数的较低梯度导致 SGD 收敛到更好的最优点，从而具有更好的泛化能力。跨数据集实验结果证明了该方法在准确性和泛化能力方面优于最先进的算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种更平坦的损失函数，以缓解跨数据集人脸年龄估计中的算法偏差问题，提升模型泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有年龄估计方法在训练与测试数据分布不一致的跨数据集场景下表现不佳，需解决算法固有偏差导致的性能下降问题。
AI.method: 设计具有相对平滑特性的新型损失函数，通过降低梯度波动帮助SGD优化器收敛至更优解，从而增强模型泛化能力。
AI.result: 跨数据集实验表明，新方法在年龄估计准确率和泛化能力上均优于现有最先进算法。
AI.conclusion: 所提损失函数有效缓解了跨数据集场景下的模型偏差问题，为鲁棒性年龄估计提供了新思路。

search_text: A Flatter Loss for Bias Mitigation in Cross-dataset Facial Age Estimation 跨数据集面部年龄估计中减少偏差的平坦损失 The most existing studies in the facial age estimation assume training and test images are captured under similar shooting conditions. However, this is rarely valid in real-world applications, where training and test sets usually have different characteristics. In this paper, we advocate a cross-dataset protocol for age estimation benchmarking. In order to improve the cross-dataset age estimation performance, we mitigate the inherent bias caused by the learning algorithm itself. To this end, we propose a novel loss function that is more effective for neural network training. The relative smoothness of the proposed loss function is its advantage with regards to the optimisation process performed by stochastic gradient descent (SGD). Compared with existing loss functions, the lower gradient of the proposed loss function leads to the convergence of SGD to a better optimum point, and consequently a better generalisation. The cross-dataset experimental results demonstrate the superiority of the proposed method over the state-of-the-art algorithms in terms of accuracy and generalisation capability. 大多数现有的面部年龄估计研究都假设训练和测试图像是在相似的拍摄条件下捕获的。然而，这在现实应用中很少有效，因为训练集和测试集通常具有不同的特征。在本文中，我们提倡使用跨数据集协议来进行年龄估计基准测试。为了提高跨数据集年龄估计性能，我们减轻了学习算法本身引起的固有偏差。为此，我们提出了一种对于神经网络训练更有效的新颖损失函数。所提出的损失函数的相对平滑度是其相对于随机梯度下降（SGD）执行的优化过程的优势。与现有损失函数相比，所提出的损失函数的较低梯度导致 SGD 收敛到更好的最优点，从而具有更好的泛化能力。跨数据集实验结果证明了该方法在准确性和泛化能力方面优于最先进的算法。 本文提出一种更平坦的损失函数，以缓解跨数据集人脸年龄估计中的算法偏差问题，提升模型泛化能力。 Ali Akbari,Muhammad Awais,Zhen-Hua Feng,Ammarah Farooq,Josef Kittler cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Laurel Orr,Megan Leszczynski,Simran Arora,Sen Wu,Neel Guha,Xiao Ling,Christopher Re
title: Bootleg: Chasing the Tail with Self-Supervised Named Entity Disambiguation
title_zh: Bootleg：通过自我监督的命名实体消歧来追尾
abstract: A challenge for named entity disambiguation (NED), the task of mapping textual mentions to entities in a knowledge base, is how to disambiguate entities that appear rarely in the training data, termed tail entities. Humans use subtle reasoning patterns based on knowledge of entity facts, relations, and types to disambiguate unfamiliar entities. Inspired by these patterns, we introduce Bootleg, a self-supervised NED system that is explicitly grounded in reasoning patterns for disambiguation. We define core reasoning patterns for disambiguation, create a learning procedure to encourage the self-supervised model to learn the patterns, and show how to use weak supervision to enhance the signals in the training data. Encoding the reasoning patterns in a simple Transformer architecture, Bootleg meets or exceeds state-of-the-art on three NED benchmarks. We further show that the learned representations from Bootleg successfully transfer to other non-disambiguation tasks that require entity-based knowledge: we set a new state-of-the-art in the popular TACRED relation extraction task by 1.0 F1 points and demonstrate up to 8% performance lift in highly optimized production search and assistant tasks at a major technology company
summary: A challenge for named entity disambiguation (NED), the task of mapping textual mentions to entities in a knowledge base, is how to disambiguate entities that appear rarely in the training data, termed tail entities. Humans use subtle reasoning patterns based on knowledge of entity facts, relations, and types to disambiguate unfamiliar entities. Inspired by these patterns, we introduce Bootleg, a self-supervised NED system that is explicitly grounded in reasoning patterns for disambiguation. We define core reasoning patterns for disambiguation, create a learning procedure to encourage the self-supervised model to learn the patterns, and show how to use weak supervision to enhance the signals in the training data. Encoding the reasoning patterns in a simple Transformer architecture, Bootleg meets or exceeds state-of-the-art on three NED benchmarks. We further show that the learned representations from Bootleg successfully transfer to other non-disambiguation tasks that require entity-based knowledge: we set a new state-of-the-art in the popular TACRED relation extraction task by 1.0 F1 points and demonstrate up to 8% performance lift in highly optimized production search and assistant tasks at a major technology company
abstract_zh: 命名实体消歧（NED）是将文本提及映射到知识库中的实体的任务，其挑战是如何消除训练数据中很少出现的实体（称为尾部实体）的歧义。人类使用基于实体事实、关系和类型知识的微妙推理模式来消除不熟悉的实体的歧义。受这些模式的启发，我们引入了 Bootleg，这是一种自我监督的 NED 系统，它明确基于消除歧义的推理模式。我们定义了消歧的核心推理模式，创建了一个学习程序来鼓励自监督模型学习这些模式，并展示了如何使用弱监督来增强训练数据中的信号。 Bootleg 在简单的 Transformer 架构中对推理模式进行编码，在三个 NED 基准测试中达到或超过了最先进的水平。我们进一步表明，从 Bootleg 学到的表示成功地转移到需要基于实体的知识的其他非消歧任务：我们在流行的 TACRED 关系提取任务中将最先进的技术提高了 1.0 F1 点，并在一家大型科技公司的高度优化的生产搜索和辅助任务中展示了高达 8% 的性能提升

AI.tldr: 本文提出Bootleg系统，通过自监督学习解决命名实体消歧（NED）中罕见实体（尾实体）的消歧难题。
AI.motivation: 现有NED方法难以处理训练数据中罕见的尾实体，而人类通过实体事实、关系和类型等推理模式实现消歧，需模仿此类模式提升模型能力。
AI.method: 定义核心消歧推理模式，设计自监督学习框架并结合弱监督增强训练信号，基于Transformer架构编码推理模式实现端到端学习。
AI.result: 在三个NED基准测试中达到或超越SOTA，TACRED关系抽取任务提升1.0 F1点，在企业级搜索和助手任务中实现最高8%性能提升。
AI.conclusion: Bootleg通过显式建模人类推理模式，有效解决尾实体消歧问题，并成功迁移至其他实体知识相关任务，验证了方法的通用性与实用性。

authors_text: Aleksandar Miladinović,Miloš Ajčević,Agostino Accardo
title: Performance of Dual-Augmented Lagrangian Method and Common Spatial Patterns applied in classification of Motor-Imagery BCI
title_zh: 双增强拉格朗日方法的性能和常见空间模式在运动想象 BCI 分类中的应用
abstract: Motor-imagery based brain-computer interfaces (MI-BCI) have the potential to become ground-breaking technologies for neurorehabilitation, the reestablishment of non-muscular communication and commands for patients suffering from neuronal disorders and disabilities, but also outside of clinical practice, for video game control and other entertainment purposes. However, due to the noisy nature of the used EEG signal, reliable BCI systems require specialized procedures for features optimization and extraction. This paper compares the two approaches, the Common Spatial Patterns with Linear Discriminant Analysis classifier (CSP-LDA), widely used in BCI for extracting features in Motor Imagery (MI) tasks, and the Dual-Augmented Lagrangian (DAL) framework with three different regularization methods: group sparsity with row groups (DAL-GLR), dual-spectrum (DAL-DS) and l1-norm regularization (DAL-L1). The test has been performed on 7 healthy subjects performing 5 BCI-MI sessions each. The preliminary results show that DAL-GLR method outperforms standard CSP-LDA, presenting 6.9% lower misclassification error (p-value = 0.008) and demonstrate the advantage of DAL framework for MI-BCI.
summary: Motor-imagery based brain-computer interfaces (MI-BCI) have the potential to become ground-breaking technologies for neurorehabilitation, the reestablishment of non-muscular communication and commands for patients suffering from neuronal disorders and disabilities, but also outside of clinical practice, for video game control and other entertainment purposes. However, due to the noisy nature of the used EEG signal, reliable BCI systems require specialized procedures for features optimization and extraction. This paper compares the two approaches, the Common Spatial Patterns with Linear Discriminant Analysis classifier (CSP-LDA), widely used in BCI for extracting features in Motor Imagery (MI) tasks, and the Dual-Augmented Lagrangian (DAL) framework with three different regularization methods: group sparsity with row groups (DAL-GLR), dual-spectrum (DAL-DS) and l1-norm regularization (DAL-L1). The test has been performed on 7 healthy subjects performing 5 BCI-MI sessions each. The preliminary results show that DAL-GLR method outperforms standard CSP-LDA, presenting 6.9% lower misclassification error (p-value = 0.008) and demonstrate the advantage of DAL framework for MI-BCI.
abstract_zh: 基于运动想象的脑机接口（MI-BCI）有潜力成为神经康复、为患有神经元疾病和残疾的患者重建非肌肉沟通和命令的突破性技术，而且还可以在临床实践之外用于视频游戏控制和其他娱乐目的。然而，由于所用脑电图信号的噪声性质，可靠的脑机接口系统需要专门的程序来进行特征优化和提取。本文比较了两种方法，即广泛用于 BCI 中的用于提取运动想象 (MI) 任务特征的通用空间模式与线性判别分析分类器 (CSP-LDA)，以及具有三种不同正则化方法的双增强拉格朗日 (DAL) 框架：行组稀疏性 (DAL-GLR)、双谱 (DAL-DS) 和 l1 范数正则化 (DAL-L1)。该测试针对 7 名健康受试者进行，每名受试者进行 5 次 BCI-MI 会话。初步结果表明，DAL-GLR 方法优于标准 CSP-LDA，误分类误差降低了 6.9%（p 值 = 0.008），并证明了 DAL 框架在 MI-BCI 中的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了两种用于运动想象脑机接口（MI-BCI）分类的方法：常见空间模式结合线性判别分析（CSP-LDA）与双增广拉格朗日（DAL）框架下的三种正则化方法。
AI.motivation: 由于EEG信号的噪声特性，MI-BCI系统需要优化特征提取方法以提高分类可靠性，本文旨在探索更有效的分类策略以提升BCI性能。
AI.method: 在7名健康受试者进行的5次MI任务中，对比CSP-LDA与DAL框架下的三种正则化方法（DAL-GLR、DAL-DS、DAL-L1），通过误分类率评估性能。
AI.result: DAL-GLR方法较标准CSP-LDA误分类率降低6.9%（p=0.008），验证了DAL框架在MI-BCI中的优势。
AI.conclusion: DAL框架（尤其DAL-GLR）在MI-BCI分类中表现更优，为未来BCI系统设计提供了有效方法。

The test has been performed on 7 healthy subjects performing 5 BCI-MI sessions each. The preliminary results show that DAL-GLR method outperforms standard CSP-LDA, presenting 6.9% lower misclassification error (p-value = 0.008) and demonstrate the advantage of DAL framework for MI-BCI. 基于运动想象的脑机接口（MI-BCI）有潜力成为神经康复、为患有神经元疾病和残疾的患者重建非肌肉沟通和命令的突破性技术，而且还可以在临床实践之外用于视频游戏控制和其他娱乐目的。然而，由于所用脑电图信号的噪声性质，可靠的脑机接口系统需要专门的程序来进行特征优化和提取。本文比较了两种方法，即广泛用于 BCI 中的用于提取运动想象 (MI) 任务特征的通用空间模式与线性判别分析分类器 (CSP-LDA)，以及具有三种不同正则化方法的双增强拉格朗日 (DAL) 框架：行组稀疏性 (DAL-GLR)、双谱 (DAL-DS) 和 l1 范数正则化 (DAL-L1)。该测试针对 7 名健康受试者进行，每名受试者进行 5 次 BCI-MI 会话。初步结果表明，DAL-GLR 方法优于标准 CSP-LDA，误分类误差降低了 6.9%（p 值 = 0.008），并证明了 DAL 框架在 MI-BCI 中的优势。 本文比较了两种用于运动想象脑机接口（MI-BCI）分类的方法：常见空间模式结合线性判别分析（CSP-LDA）与双增广拉格朗日（DAL）框架下的三种正则化方法。 Aleksandar Miladinović,Miloš Ajčević,Agostino Accardo eess.SP,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.NE

authors_text: Nicolae-Cătălin Ristea,Andrei Anghel,Radu Tudor Ionescu,Yonina C. Eldar
title: Automotive Radar Interference Mitigation with Unfolded Robust PCA based on Residual Overcomplete Auto-Encoder Blocks
title_zh: 利用基于残差过完备自动编码器块的展开稳健 PCA 来减轻汽车雷达干扰
comment: Accepted at the CVPR 2021 Embedded Vision Workshop
comments: Accepted at the CVPR 2021 Embedded Vision Workshop
abstract: In autonomous driving, radar systems play an important role in detecting targets such as other vehicles on the road. Radars mounted on different cars can interfere with each other, degrading the detection performance. Deep learning methods for automotive radar interference mitigation can succesfully estimate the amplitude of targets, but fail to recover the phase of the respective targets. In this paper, we propose an efficient and effective technique based on unfolded robust Principal Component Analysis (RPCA) that is able to estimate both amplitude and phase in the presence of interference. Our contribution consists in introducing residual overcomplete auto-encoder (ROC-AE) blocks into the recurrent architecture of unfolded RPCA, which results in a deeper model that significantly outperforms unfolded RPCA as well as other deep learning models.
summary: In autonomous driving, radar systems play an important role in detecting targets such as other vehicles on the road. Radars mounted on different cars can interfere with each other, degrading the detection performance. Deep learning methods for automotive radar interference mitigation can succesfully estimate the amplitude of targets, but fail to recover the phase of the respective targets. In this paper, we propose an efficient and effective technique based on unfolded robust Principal Component Analysis (RPCA) that is able to estimate both amplitude and phase in the presence of interference. Our contribution consists in introducing residual overcomplete auto-encoder (ROC-AE) blocks into the recurrent architecture of unfolded RPCA, which results in a deeper model that significantly outperforms unfolded RPCA as well as other deep learning models.
abstract_zh: 在自动驾驶中，雷达系统在检测道路上其他车辆等目标方面发挥着重要作用。安装在不同汽车上的雷达可能会相互干扰，从而降低检测性能。用于减轻汽车雷达干扰的深度学习方法可以成功估计目标的幅度，但无法恢复各个目标的相位。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于展开稳健主成分分析（RPCA）的高效技术，该技术能够在存在干扰的情况下估计幅度和相位。我们的贡献在于将残差过完备自动编码器（ROC-AE）块引入到展开的 RPCA 的循环架构中，从而产生一个更深的模型，其性能显着优于展开的 RPCA 以及其他深度学习模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于展开鲁棒PCA和残差过完备自编码器块的汽车雷达干扰抑制方法，可同时恢复目标幅度和相位信息。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法虽能估计雷达目标幅度，但无法恢复相位信息，导致自动驾驶场景下多车雷达干扰问题难以有效解决。
AI.method: 将残差过完备自编码器（ROC-AE）块引入展开RPCA的递归架构，构建深度神经网络模型实现幅度-相位联合恢复。
AI.result: 新方法在幅度估计和相位恢复指标上均显著优于传统展开RPCA及其他深度学习模型。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了汽车雷达干扰问题，为自动驾驶系统提供了更精确的目标检测解决方案。

authors_text: Christos Liaskos,Shuai Niez,Ageliki Tsioliaridou,Andreas Pitsillides,Sotiris Ioannidis,Ian F. Akyildiz
title: End-to-end Wireless Path Deployment with Intelligent Surfaces Using Interpretable Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用可解释神经网络的智能表面的端到端无线路径部署
comment: The article received funding from the EU H2020 FETOPEN-RIA project VISORSURF (EU736876). Published at IEEE Transactions on Communications: https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/9151237
comments: The article received funding from the EU H2020 FETOPEN-RIA project VISORSURF (EU736876). Published at IEEE Transactions on Communications: https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/9151237
abstract: Intelligent surfaces exert deterministic control over the wireless propagation phenomenon, enabling novel capabilities in performance, security and wireless power transfer. Such surfaces come in the form of rectangular tiles that cascade to cover large surfaces such as walls, ceilings or building facades. Each tile is addressable and can receive software commands from a controller, manipulating an impinging electromagnetic wave upon it by customizing its reflection direction, focus, polarization and phase. A new problem arises concerning the orchestration of a set of tiles towards serving end-to-end communication objectives. Towards that end, we propose a novel intelligent surface networking algorithm based on interpretable neural networks. Tiles are mapped to neural network nodes and any tile line-of-sight connectivity is expressed as a neural network link. Tile wave manipulation functionalities are captured via geometric reflection with virtually rotatable tile surface norm, thus being able to tunable distribute power impinging upon a tile over the corresponding neural network links, with the corresponding power parts acting as the link weights. A feedforward/backpropagate process optimizes these weights to match ideal propagation outcomes (normalized network power outputs) to wireless user emissions (normalized network power inputs). An interpretation process translates these weights to the corresponding tile wave manipulation functionalities.
summary: Intelligent surfaces exert deterministic control over the wireless propagation phenomenon, enabling novel capabilities in performance, security and wireless power transfer. Such surfaces come in the form of rectangular tiles that cascade to cover large surfaces such as walls, ceilings or building facades. Each tile is addressable and can receive software commands from a controller, manipulating an impinging electromagnetic wave upon it by customizing its reflection direction, focus, polarization and phase. A new problem arises concerning the orchestration of a set of tiles towards serving end-to-end communication objectives. Towards that end, we propose a novel intelligent surface networking algorithm based on interpretable neural networks. Tiles are mapped to neural network nodes and any tile line-of-sight connectivity is expressed as a neural network link. Tile wave manipulation functionalities are captured via geometric reflection with virtually rotatable tile surface norm, thus being able to tunable distribute power impinging upon a tile over the corresponding neural network links, with the corresponding power parts acting as the link weights. A feedforward/backpropagate process optimizes these weights to match ideal propagation outcomes (normalized network power outputs) to wireless user emissions (normalized network power inputs). An interpretation process translates these weights to the corresponding tile wave manipulation functionalities.
abstract_zh: 智能表面对无线传播现象进行确定性控制，从而实现性能、安全性和无线电力传输方面的新颖功能。这种表面采用矩形瓷砖的形式，层叠覆盖墙壁、天花板或建筑立面等大表面。每个瓷砖都是可寻址的，并且可以从控制器接收软件命令，通过定制其反射方向、焦点、偏振和相位来操纵撞击到其上的电磁波。出现了一个新问题，涉及为了服务于端到端通信目标而编排一组图块。为此，我们提出了一种基于可解释神经网络的新型智能表面网络算法。图块被映射到神经网络节点，并且任何图块视线连接都被表示为神经网络链接。瓦片波操纵功能是通过具有虚拟可旋转瓦片表面范数的几何反射来捕获的，因此能够在相应的神经网络链路上可调节地分配撞击在瓦片上的功率，其中相应的功率部分充当链路权重。前馈/反向传播过程优化这些权重，以将理想的传播结果（标准化网络功率输出）与无线用户发射（标准化网络功率输入）相匹配。解释过程将这些权重转换为相应的平铺波操作功能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于可解释神经网络的智能表面网络算法，用于端到端无线路径部署，通过控制可编程瓷砖的电磁波反射特性实现通信目标。
AI.motivation: 智能表面可通过编程控制电磁波传播特性，但如何协调多个瓷砖实现端到端通信目标仍存在挑战，需开发高效可解释的优化方法。
AI.method: 将瓷砖映射为神经网络节点，利用几何反射模型构建可调功率分配的链接权重，通过前馈/反向传播优化网络权重以匹配无线用户发射信号。
AI.result: 算法成功实现了瓷砖反射参数的优化配置，使无线信号功率分布符合预期通信需求，并可通过权重解释映射到物理瓷砖操作参数。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为智能表面无线通信提供了可解释的优化框架，有效提升了信号控制精度与系统性能，为未来无线网络部署提供新思路。
