authors_text: Miriam Enzi,Sophie N. Parragh,Jakob Puchinger
title: The bi-objective multimodal car-sharing problem
title_zh: 双目标多式联运汽车共享问题
abstract: The aim of the bi-objective multimodal car-sharing problem (BiO-MMCP) is to determine the optimal mode of transport assignment for trips and to schedule the routes of available cars and users whilst minimizing cost and maximizing user satisfaction. We investigate the BiO-MMCP from a user-centred point of view. As user satisfaction is a crucial aspect in shared mobility systems, we consider user preferences in a second objective. Users may choose and rank their preferred modes of transport for different times of the day. In this way we account for, e.g., different traffic conditions throughout the planning horizon. We study different variants of the problem. In the base problem, the sequence of tasks a user has to fulfill is fixed in advance and travel times as well as preferences are constant over the planning horizon. In variant 2, time-dependent travel times and preferences are introduced. In variant 3, we examine the challenges when allowing additional routing decisions. Variant 4 integrates variants 2 and 3. For this last variant, we develop a branch-and-cut algorithm which is embedded in two bi-objective frameworks, namely the $ε$-constraint method and a weighting binary search method. Computational experiments show that the branch-and cut algorithm outperforms the MIP formulation and we discuss changing solutions along the Pareto frontier.
summary: The aim of the bi-objective multimodal car-sharing problem (BiO-MMCP) is to determine the optimal mode of transport assignment for trips and to schedule the routes of available cars and users whilst minimizing cost and maximizing user satisfaction. We investigate the BiO-MMCP from a user-centred point of view. As user satisfaction is a crucial aspect in shared mobility systems, we consider user preferences in a second objective. Users may choose and rank their preferred modes of transport for different times of the day. In this way we account for, e.g., different traffic conditions throughout the planning horizon. We study different variants of the problem. In the base problem, the sequence of tasks a user has to fulfill is fixed in advance and travel times as well as preferences are constant over the planning horizon. In variant 2, time-dependent travel times and preferences are introduced. In variant 3, we examine the challenges when allowing additional routing decisions. Variant 4 integrates variants 2 and 3. For this last variant, we develop a branch-and-cut algorithm which is embedded in two bi-objective frameworks, namely the $ε$-constraint method and a weighting binary search method. Computational experiments show that the branch-and cut algorithm outperforms the MIP formulation and we discuss changing solutions along the Pareto frontier.
abstract_zh: 双目标多式联运汽车共享问题（BiO-MMCP）的目的是确定出行的最佳交通分配方式，并安排可用汽车和用户的路线，同时最小化成本并最大化用户满意度。我们从以用户为中心的角度研究 BiO-MMCP。由于用户满意度是共享出行系统的一个关键方面，我们将用户偏好作为第二个目标来考虑。用户可以选择一天中不同时间的首选交通方式并对其进行排名。通过这种方式，我们可以考虑整个规划范围内的不同交通状况等。我们研究该问题的不同变体。在基本问题中，用户必须完成的任务顺序是预先确定的，并且旅行时间以及偏好在规划范围内是恒定的。在变体 2 中，引入了与时间相关的旅行时间和偏好。在变体 3 中，我们研究了允许额外路由决策时面临的挑战。变体 4 集成了变体 2 和 3。对于最后一个变体，我们开发了一种嵌入到两个双目标框架中的分支剪切算法，即 $ε$ 约束方法和加权二分搜索方法。计算实验表明，分支切割算法优于 MIP 公式，我们讨论了沿 Pareto 边界改变解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文研究双目标多模式拼车问题，旨在优化交通方式分配和路线安排，同时最小化成本并最大化用户满意度。
AI.motivation: 共享出行系统中用户满意度至关重要，需考虑用户在不同时段的交通方式偏好及动态变化的交通状况。
AI.method: 针对整合时间依赖性和动态路由的变体，开发分支定界算法并嵌入ε约束法和加权二分搜索法框架进行求解。
AI.result: 分支定界算法优于传统MIP模型，且实验显示帕累托前沿解决方案随参数变化呈现不同优化趋势。
AI.conclusion: 所提算法有效解决双目标多模式拼车问题，动态因素与用户偏好整合对提升共享出行系统性能具有重要意义。

authors_text: David Kohan Marzagão,Trung Dong Huynh,Ayah Helal,Sean Baccas,Luc Moreau
title: Provenance Graph Kernel
title_zh: 来源图内核
abstract: Provenance is a record that describes how entities, activities, and agents have influenced a piece of data; it is commonly represented as graphs with relevant labels on both their nodes and edges. With the growing adoption of provenance in a wide range of application domains, users are increasingly confronted with an abundance of graph data, which may prove challenging to process. Graph kernels, on the other hand, have been successfully used to efficiently analyse graphs. In this paper, we introduce a novel graph kernel called provenance kernel, which is inspired by and tailored for provenance data. It decomposes a provenance graph into tree-patterns rooted at a given node and considers the labels of edges and nodes up to a certain distance from the root. We employ provenance kernels to classify provenance graphs from three application domains. Our evaluation shows that they perform well in terms of classification accuracy and yield competitive results when compared against existing graph kernel methods and the provenance network analytics method while more efficient in computing time. Moreover, the provenance types used by provenance kernels also help improve the explainability of predictive models built on them.
summary: Provenance is a record that describes how entities, activities, and agents have influenced a piece of data; it is commonly represented as graphs with relevant labels on both their nodes and edges. With the growing adoption of provenance in a wide range of application domains, users are increasingly confronted with an abundance of graph data, which may prove challenging to process. Graph kernels, on the other hand, have been successfully used to efficiently analyse graphs. In this paper, we introduce a novel graph kernel called provenance kernel, which is inspired by and tailored for provenance data. It decomposes a provenance graph into tree-patterns rooted at a given node and considers the labels of edges and nodes up to a certain distance from the root. We employ provenance kernels to classify provenance graphs from three application domains. Our evaluation shows that they perform well in terms of classification accuracy and yield competitive results when compared against existing graph kernel methods and the provenance network analytics method while more efficient in computing time. Moreover, the provenance types used by provenance kernels also help improve the explainability of predictive models built on them.
abstract_zh: 来源是描述实体、活动和代理如何影响数据的记录；它通常表示为在节点和边上都有相关标签的图。随着各种应用领域越来越多地采用起源，用户越来越多地面临着大量的图形数据，这可能难以处理。另一方面，图内核已成功用于有效分析图。在本文中，我们介绍了一种称为起源内核的新型图内核，它受到起源数据的启发并为之量身定制。它将起源图分解为以给定节点为根的树模式，并考虑距根一定距离的边和节点的标签。我们使用起源内核对来自三个应用领域的起源图进行分类。我们的评估表明，与现有的图内核方法和起源网络分析方法相比，它们在分类准确性方面表现良好，并产生具有竞争力的结果，同时计算时间更高效。此外，起源内核使用的起源类型还有助于提高基于它们构建的预测模型的可解释性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种专为出处数据设计的图核方法——出处核，通过分解出处图为树模式并结合标签信息进行分类任务。
AI.motivation: 随着出处数据在多领域应用的普及，处理海量图数据的需求增加，传统方法在效率和可解释性上存在不足。
AI.method: 将出处图分解为以指定节点为根的树模式，结合节点和边标签信息构建核函数，并应用于分类任务。
AI.result: 在三个应用领域的分类实验中，出处核在准确率上表现优异，计算效率优于现有图核方法，且提升模型可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 出处核有效解决了出处图的分类问题，在效率和可解释性方面具有优势，适合处理复杂出处数据。

authors_text: Jaime Simarro,Zohaib Salahuddin,Ahmed Gouda,Anindo Saha
title: Leveraging SLIC Superpixel Segmentation and Cascaded Ensemble SVM for Fully Automated Mass Detection In Mammograms
title_zh: 利用 SLIC 超像素分割和级联集成 SVM 进行乳房 X 光检查中的全自动质量检测
abstract: Identification and segmentation of breast masses in mammograms face complex challenges, owing to the highly variable nature of malignant densities with regards to their shape, contours, texture and orientation. Additionally, classifiers typically suffer from high class imbalance in region candidates, where normal tissue regions vastly outnumber malignant masses. This paper proposes a rigorous segmentation method, supported by morphological enhancement using grayscale linear filters. A novel cascaded ensemble of support vector machines (SVM) is used to effectively tackle the class imbalance and provide significant predictions. For True Positive Rate (TPR) of 0.35, 0.69 and 0.82, the system generates only 0.1, 0.5 and 1.0 False Positives/Image (FPI), respectively.
summary: Identification and segmentation of breast masses in mammograms face complex challenges, owing to the highly variable nature of malignant densities with regards to their shape, contours, texture and orientation. Additionally, classifiers typically suffer from high class imbalance in region candidates, where normal tissue regions vastly outnumber malignant masses. This paper proposes a rigorous segmentation method, supported by morphological enhancement using grayscale linear filters. A novel cascaded ensemble of support vector machines (SVM) is used to effectively tackle the class imbalance and provide significant predictions. For True Positive Rate (TPR) of 0.35, 0.69 and 0.82, the system generates only 0.1, 0.5 and 1.0 False Positives/Image (FPI), respectively.
abstract_zh: 由于恶性密度在形状、轮廓、纹理和方向方面的高度可变性，乳房 X 光检查中乳腺肿块的识别和分割面临着复杂的挑战。此外，分类器通常会遭受候选区域的高度不平衡，其中正常组织区域的数量远远超过恶性肿块。本文提出了一种严格的分割方法，并由使用灰度线性滤波器的形态增强支持。使用一种新颖的支持向量机（SVM）级联集成来有效解决类不平衡问题并提供重要的预测。对于 0.35、0.69 和 0.82 的真阳性率 (TPR)，系统仅分别生成 0.1、0.5 和 1.0 假阳性/图像 (FPI)。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合SLIC超像素分割与级联集成SVM的方法，实现乳腺X光片中肿块的全自动检测。
AI.motivation: 乳腺肿块检测面临恶性密度形态多变及正常组织与肿块区域严重不平衡的挑战，现有方法存在误检率高、灵敏度不足的问题。
AI.method: 采用形态学增强的灰度线性滤波器进行分割，结合SLIC超像素算法与级联集成SVM分类器，通过多阶段筛选缓解类不平衡问题。
AI.result: 在TPR分别为0.35、0.69、0.82时，系统对应的误检率（FPI）分别为0.1、0.5、1.0。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过分割与分类协同优化，在保持较低误检率的同时显著提升肿块检测灵敏度，为临床辅助诊断提供可行方案。

tldr: 本文提出结合SLIC超像素分割与级联集成SVM的方法，实现乳腺X光片中肿块的全自动检测。
motivation: 乳腺肿块检测面临恶性密度形态多变及正常组织与肿块区域严重不平衡的挑战，现有方法存在误检率高、灵敏度不足的问题。
method: 采用形态学增强的灰度线性滤波器进行分割，结合SLIC超像素算法与级联集成SVM分类器，通过多阶段筛选缓解类不平衡问题。
result: 在TPR分别为0.35、0.69、0.82时，系统对应的误检率（FPI）分别为0.1、0.5、1.0。
conclusion: 该方法通过分割与分类协同优化，在保持较低误检率的同时显著提升肿块检测灵敏度，为临床辅助诊断提供可行方案。
search_text: Leveraging SLIC Superpixel Segmentation and Cascaded Ensemble SVM for Fully Automated Mass Detection In Mammograms 利用 SLIC 超像素分割和级联集成 SVM 进行乳房 X 光检查中的全自动质量检测 Identification and segmentation of breast masses in mammograms face complex challenges, owing to the highly variable nature of malignant densities with regards to their shape, contours, texture and orientation. Additionally, classifiers typically suffer from high class imbalance in region candidates, where normal tissue regions vastly outnumber malignant masses. This paper proposes a rigorous segmentation method, supported by morphological enhancement using grayscale linear filters. A novel cascaded ensemble of support vector machines (SVM) is used to effectively tackle the class imbalance and provide significant predictions. For True Positive Rate (TPR) of 0.35, 0.69 and 0.82, the system generates only 0.1, 0.5 and 1.0 False Positives/Image (FPI), respectively. 由于恶性密度在形状、轮廓、纹理和方向方面的高度可变性，乳房 X 光检查中乳腺肿块的识别和分割面临着复杂的挑战。此外，分类器通常会遭受候选区域的高度不平衡，其中正常组织区域的数量远远超过恶性肿块。本文提出了一种严格的分割方法，并由使用灰度线性滤波器的形态增强支持。使用一种新颖的支持向量机（SVM）级联集成来有效解决类不平衡问题并提供重要的预测。对于 0.35、0.69 和 0.82 的真阳性率 (TPR)，系统仅分别生成 0.1、0.5 和 1.0 假阳性/图像 (FPI)。 本文提出结合SLIC超像素分割与级联集成SVM的方法，实现乳腺X光片中肿块的全自动检测。 Jaime Simarro,Zohaib Salahuddin,Ahmed Gouda,Anindo Saha cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Sangho Lee,Kiyoon Yoo,Nojun Kwak
title: Edge Bias in Federated Learning and its Solution by Buffered Knowledge Distillation
title_zh: 联邦学习中的边缘偏差及其缓冲知识蒸馏解决方案
abstract: Federated learning (FL), which utilizes communication between the server (core) and local devices (edges) to indirectly learn from more data, is an emerging field in deep learning research. Recently, Knowledge Distillation-based FL methods with notable performance and high applicability have been suggested. In this paper, we choose knowledge distillation-based FL method as our baseline and tackle a challenging problem that ensues from using these methods. Especially, we focus on the problem incurred in the server model that tries to mimic different datasets, each of which is unique to an individual edge device. We dub the problem 'edge bias', which occurs when multiple teacher models trained on different datasets are used individually to distill knowledge. We introduce this nuisance that occurs in certain scenarios of FL, and to alleviate it, we propose a simple yet effective distillation scheme named 'buffered distillation'. In addition, we also experimentally show that this scheme is effective in mitigating the straggler problem caused by delayed edges.
summary: Federated learning (FL), which utilizes communication between the server (core) and local devices (edges) to indirectly learn from more data, is an emerging field in deep learning research. Recently, Knowledge Distillation-based FL methods with notable performance and high applicability have been suggested. In this paper, we choose knowledge distillation-based FL method as our baseline and tackle a challenging problem that ensues from using these methods. Especially, we focus on the problem incurred in the server model that tries to mimic different datasets, each of which is unique to an individual edge device. We dub the problem 'edge bias', which occurs when multiple teacher models trained on different datasets are used individually to distill knowledge. We introduce this nuisance that occurs in certain scenarios of FL, and to alleviate it, we propose a simple yet effective distillation scheme named 'buffered distillation'. In addition, we also experimentally show that this scheme is effective in mitigating the straggler problem caused by delayed edges.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习（FL）利用服务器（核心）和本地设备（边缘）之间的通信来间接从更多数据中学习，是深度学习研究中的一个新兴领域。最近，基于知识蒸馏的FL方法被提出，具有显着的性能和高适用性。在本文中，我们选择基于知识蒸馏的 FL 方法作为基线，并解决使用这些方法带来的具有挑战性的问题。特别是，我们关注试图模仿不同数据集的服务器模型中出现的问题，每个数据集对于单个边缘设备来说都是唯一的。我们将这个问题称为“边缘偏差”，当单独使用在不同数据集上训练的多个教师模型来提取知识时，就会发生这种情况。我们介绍了在 FL 的某些场景中发生的这种麻烦，为了缓解它，我们提出了一种简单而有效的蒸馏方案，称为“缓冲蒸馏”。此外，我们还通过实验证明该方案可以有效缓解延迟边沿引起的掉队问题。

AI.tldr: 本文研究联邦学习中因边缘设备数据多样性导致的'边缘偏差'问题，并提出通过缓冲知识蒸馏方法缓解该问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于知识蒸馏的联邦学习方法在处理不同边缘设备的独立数据集时，服务器模型易产生偏差，影响整体性能。
AI.method: 提出'缓冲蒸馏'方案，通过存储边缘模型的历史知识并动态调整蒸馏过程，减少服务器模型对单一数据集的过度拟合。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法有效缓解了边缘偏差及延迟设备导致的'掉队者'问题，提升了联邦学习的鲁棒性和收敛效率。
AI.conclusion: 边缘偏差是联邦学习中的关键挑战，缓冲蒸馏方法为解决该问题提供了简单有效的技术路径。

authors_text: Jessica Enright,Duncan Lee,Kitty Meeks,William Pettersson,John Sylvester
title: The complexity of finding and enumerating optimal subgraphs to represent spatial correlation
title_zh: 查找和枚举最佳子图来表示空间相关性的复杂性
comment: Added a number of enumeration results
comments: Added a number of enumeration results
abstract: Understanding spatial correlation is vital in many fields including epidemiology and social science. Lee, Meeks and Pettersson (Stat. Comput. 2021) recently demonstrated that improved inference for areal unit count data can be achieved by carrying out modifications to a graph representing spatial correlations; specifically, they delete edges of the planar graph derived from border-sharing between geographic regions in order to maximise a specific objective function. In this paper we address the computational complexity of the associated graph optimisation problem. We demonstrate that this problem cannot be solved in polynomial time unless P = NP; we further show intractability for two simpler variants of the problem. We follow these results with two parameterised algorithms that exactly solve the problem. Both of these solve not only the decision problem, but also enumerate all solutions with polynomial time precalculation, delay, and postcalculation time in respective restricted settings. For this problem, efficient enumeration allows the uncertainty in the spatial correlation to be utilised in the modelling. The first enumeration algorithm utilises dynamic programming on a tree decomposition, and has polynomial time precalculation and linear delay if both the treewidth and maximum degree are bounded. The second algorithm is restricted to problem instances with maximum degree three, as may arise from triangulations of planar surfaces, but can output all solutions with FPT precalculation time and linear delay when the maximum number of edges that can be removed is taken as the parameter.
summary: Understanding spatial correlation is vital in many fields including epidemiology and social science. Lee, Meeks and Pettersson (Stat. Comput. 2021) recently demonstrated that improved inference for areal unit count data can be achieved by carrying out modifications to a graph representing spatial correlations; specifically, they delete edges of the planar graph derived from border-sharing between geographic regions in order to maximise a specific objective function. In this paper we address the computational complexity of the associated graph optimisation problem. We demonstrate that this problem cannot be solved in polynomial time unless P = NP; we further show intractability for two simpler variants of the problem. We follow these results with two parameterised algorithms that exactly solve the problem. Both of these solve not only the decision problem, but also enumerate all solutions with polynomial time precalculation, delay, and postcalculation time in respective restricted settings. For this problem, efficient enumeration allows the uncertainty in the spatial correlation to be utilised in the modelling. The first enumeration algorithm utilises dynamic programming on a tree decomposition, and has polynomial time precalculation and linear delay if both the treewidth and maximum degree are bounded. The second algorithm is restricted to problem instances with maximum degree three, as may arise from triangulations of planar surfaces, but can output all solutions with FPT precalculation time and linear delay when the maximum number of edges that can be removed is taken as the parameter.
abstract_zh: 了解空间相关性在包括流行病学和社会科学在内的许多领域都至关重要。 Lee、Meeks 和 Pettersson（Stat. Comput. 2021）最近证明，可以通过对表示空间相关性的图表进行修改来改进面积单位计数数据的推断；具体来说，它们删除由地理区域之间的边界共享得出的平面图的边缘，以便最大化特定的目标函数。在本文中，我们解决了相关图优化问题的计算复杂性。我们证明这个问题不能在多项式时间内解决，除非 P = NP；我们进一步展示了该问题的两个更简单变体的棘手性。我们根据这些结果使用两种完全解决问题的参数化算法。这两者不仅解决了决策问题，而且还枚举了在各自限制设置下具有多项式时间预计算、延迟和后计算时间的所有解决方案。对于这个问题，有效的枚举允许在建模中利用空间相关性的不确定性。第一种枚举算法利用树分解的动态规划，并且如果树宽和最大度都有界，则具有多项式时间预计算和线性延迟。第二种算法仅限于最大度数为三的问题实例，如平面三角剖分可能产生的问题，但当以可去除的最大边数为参数时，可以输出具有 FPT 预计算时间和线性延迟的所有解。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了寻找和枚举最优子图以表示空间相关性的计算复杂度问题，并提出了两种参数化算法。
AI.motivation: 空间相关性分析在流行病学和社会科学中至关重要，但现有方法中图优化问题的计算复杂度尚未明确，需探索其复杂性并提出高效解决方案。
AI.method: 通过计算复杂性理论证明问题的NP难性，设计两种参数化算法：基于树分解的动态规划方法及针对最大度数为三的限制算法。
AI.result: 证明原问题及两个简化版本均为NP难，提出两种算法分别在有界树宽和最大度数三的条件下实现多项式预处理和线性延迟枚举。
AI.conclusion: 尽管问题本质复杂，但通过参数化方法可在特定约束下高效求解，为利用空间相关性不确定性提供计算支持。

The second algorithm is restricted to problem instances with maximum degree three, as may arise from triangulations of planar surfaces, but can output all solutions with FPT precalculation time and linear delay when the maximum number of edges that can be removed is taken as the parameter. 了解空间相关性在包括流行病学和社会科学在内的许多领域都至关重要。 Lee、Meeks 和 Pettersson（Stat. authors_text: Jie Lian,Jingyu Liu,Yizhou Yu,Mengyuan Ding,Yaoci Lu,Yi Lu,Jie Cai,Deshou Lin,Miao Zhang,Zhe Wang,Kai He,Yijie Yu
title: The Detection of Thoracic Abnormalities ChestX-Det10 Challenge Results
title_zh: 胸部异常的检测 ChestX-Det10 挑战结果
abstract: The detection of thoracic abnormalities challenge is organized by the Deepwise AI Lab. The challenge is divided into two rounds. In this paper, we present the results of 6 teams which reach the second round. The challenge adopts the ChestX-Det10 dateset proposed by the Deepwise AI Lab. ChestX-Det10 is the first chest X-Ray dataset with instance-level annotations, including 10 categories of disease/abnormality of 3,543 images. The annotations are located at https://github.com/Deepwise-AILab/ChestX-Det10-Dataset. In the challenge, we randomly split all data into 3001 images for training and 542 images for testing.
summary: The detection of thoracic abnormalities challenge is organized by the Deepwise AI Lab. The challenge is divided into two rounds. In this paper, we present the results of 6 teams which reach the second round. The challenge adopts the ChestX-Det10 dateset proposed by the Deepwise AI Lab. ChestX-Det10 is the first chest X-Ray dataset with instance-level annotations, including 10 categories of disease/abnormality of 3,543 images. The annotations are located at https://github.com/Deepwise-AILab/ChestX-Det10-Dataset. In the challenge, we randomly split all data into 3001 images for training and 542 images for testing.
abstract_zh: 胸部异常检测挑战赛由Deepwise人工智能实验室组织。挑战赛分为两轮。在本文中，我们展示了进入第二轮的 6 支球队的成绩。本次挑战赛采用 Deepwise AI 实验室提出的 ChestX-Det10 数据集。 ChestX-Det10 是第一个具有实例级注释的胸部 X 射线数据集，包括 10 个疾病/异常类别的 3,543 张图像。注释位于 https://github.com/Deepwise-AILab/ChestX-Det10-Dataset。在挑战中，我们将所有数据随机分为 3001 张图像用于训练，542 张图像用于测试。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了由Deepwise AI Lab组织的胸部异常检测挑战赛结果，使用包含10类疾病/异常的ChestX-Det10数据集进行评估。
AI.motivation: 推动自动检测胸部异常技术的发展，促进医学影像分析领域的研究进展。
AI.method: 采用ChestX-Det10数据集，包含3,543张实例级标注的胸部X光图像，随机划分3001张用于训练，542张用于测试。
AI.result: 共有6支队伍进入第二轮挑战，但未具体说明各队伍的检测性能指标。
AI.conclusion: ChestX-Det10数据集为胸部异常检测研究提供了有效基准，挑战赛结果为后续技术改进提供了参考方向。

authors_text: Yutaka Nagashima
title: Definitional Quantifiers Realise Semantic Reasoning for Proof by Induction
title_zh: 定义量词实现归纳证明的语义推理
comment: This is the preprint of our paper accepted at Tests and Proofs 2022. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2009.09215
comments: This is the preprint of our paper accepted at Tests and Proofs 2022. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2009.09215
abstract: Proof assistants offer tactics to apply proof by induction, but these tactics rely on inputs given by human engineers. To automate this laborious process, we developed SeLFiE, a boolean query language to represent experienced users' knowledge on how to apply the induct tactic in Isabelle/HOL: when we apply an induction heuristic written in SeLFiE to an inductive problem and arguments to the induct tactic, the SeLFiE interpreter judges whether the arguments are plausible for that problem according to the heuristic by examining both the syntactic structure of the problem and definitions of the relevant constants. To examine the intricate interaction between syntactic analysis and analysis of constant definitions, we introduce definitional quantifiers. For evaluation we build an automatic induction prover using SeLFiE. Our evaluation based on 347 inductive problems shows that our new prover achieves 1.4 x 10^3% improvement over the corresponding baseline prover for 1.0 second of timeout and the median value of speedup is 4.48x.
summary: Proof assistants offer tactics to apply proof by induction, but these tactics rely on inputs given by human engineers. To automate this laborious process, we developed SeLFiE, a boolean query language to represent experienced users' knowledge on how to apply the induct tactic in Isabelle/HOL: when we apply an induction heuristic written in SeLFiE to an inductive problem and arguments to the induct tactic, the SeLFiE interpreter judges whether the arguments are plausible for that problem according to the heuristic by examining both the syntactic structure of the problem and definitions of the relevant constants. To examine the intricate interaction between syntactic analysis and analysis of constant definitions, we introduce definitional quantifiers. For evaluation we build an automatic induction prover using SeLFiE. Our evaluation based on 347 inductive problems shows that our new prover achieves 1.4 x 10^3% improvement over the corresponding baseline prover for 1.0 second of timeout and the median value of speedup is 4.48x.
abstract_zh: 证明助手提供了通过归纳法应用证明的策略，但这些策略依赖于人类工程师提供的输入。为了自动化这个费力的过程，我们开发了 SeLFiE，一种布尔查询语言，代表经验丰富的用户如何在 Isabelle/HOL 中应用归纳策略的知识：当我们将用 SeLFiE 编写的归纳启发式应用于归纳问题和归纳策略的参数时，SeLFiE 解释器通过检查问题的句法结构和相关常量的定义，根据启发式判断参数对于该问题是否合理。为了检查句法分析和常量定义分析之间复杂的相互作用，我们引入了定义量词。为了进行评估，我们使用 SeLFiE 构建了一个自动感应验证机。我们基于 347 个归纳问题的评估表明，在 1.0 秒的超时时间内，我们的新证明器比相应的基线证明器实现了 1.4 x 10^3% 的改进，加速中值为 4.48 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SeLFiE布尔查询语言及定义量化符，用于自动化Isabelle/HOL中的归纳证明过程。
AI.motivation: 现有证明助手需依赖人工输入执行归纳证明，过程繁琐低效，亟需自动化方案提升效率。
AI.method: 设计SeLFiE语言编码专家经验，结合语法结构与常量定义分析，引入定义量化符处理归纳策略参数合理性判断，并构建自动归纳证明器进行评估。
AI.result: 在347个归纳问题上，新证明器较基线提升1400%，中位数加速4.48倍。
AI.conclusion: 定义量化符有效融合语法与语义分析，SeLFiE显著提升归纳证明自动化水平，为证明助手发展提供新方向。

authors_text: Dmitry Pozdnyakov
title: Fisheye lens distortion correction
title_zh: 鱼眼镜头畸变校正
abstract: A new distortion correction algorithm for fisheye lens with equidistant mapping function is considered in the present study. The algorithm is much more data lossless and accurate than such a classical approach like Brown-Conrady model
summary: A new distortion correction algorithm for fisheye lens with equidistant mapping function is considered in the present study. The algorithm is much more data lossless and accurate than such a classical approach like Brown-Conrady model
abstract_zh: 本研究考虑了一种新的具有等距映射函数的鱼眼镜头畸变校正算法。该算法比 Brown-Conrady 模型等经典方法更加数据无损且准确

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于等距映射函数的鱼眼镜头失真校正新算法。
AI.motivation: 经典Brown-Conrady模型存在数据损失大和精度不足的问题，需改进校正方法。
AI.method: 采用等距映射函数设计新型失真校正算法，优化数据保留与校正精度。
AI.result: 新算法在数据完整性与校正准确性上优于传统Brown-Conrady模型。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了鱼眼镜头校正中的数据损失问题，具有更高的精度和实用性。

authors_text: Christian J. Steinmetz,Jordi Pons,Santiago Pascual,Joan Serrà
title: Automatic multitrack mixing with a differentiable mixing console of neural audio effects
title_zh: 使用神经音频效果的可微混合控制台进行自动多轨混合
abstract: Applications of deep learning to automatic multitrack mixing are largely unexplored. This is partly due to the limited available data, coupled with the fact that such data is relatively unstructured and variable. To address these challenges, we propose a domain-inspired model with a strong inductive bias for the mixing task. We achieve this with the application of pre-trained sub-networks and weight sharing, as well as with a sum/difference stereo loss function. The proposed model can be trained with a limited number of examples, is permutation invariant with respect to the input ordering, and places no limit on the number of input sources. Furthermore, it produces human-readable mixing parameters, allowing users to manually adjust or refine the generated mix. Results from a perceptual evaluation involving audio engineers indicate that our approach generates mixes that outperform baseline approaches. To the best of our knowledge, this work demonstrates the first approach in learning multitrack mixing conventions from real-world data at the waveform level, without knowledge of the underlying mixing parameters.
summary: Applications of deep learning to automatic multitrack mixing are largely unexplored. This is partly due to the limited available data, coupled with the fact that such data is relatively unstructured and variable. To address these challenges, we propose a domain-inspired model with a strong inductive bias for the mixing task. We achieve this with the application of pre-trained sub-networks and weight sharing, as well as with a sum/difference stereo loss function. The proposed model can be trained with a limited number of examples, is permutation invariant with respect to the input ordering, and places no limit on the number of input sources. Furthermore, it produces human-readable mixing parameters, allowing users to manually adjust or refine the generated mix. Results from a perceptual evaluation involving audio engineers indicate that our approach generates mixes that outperform baseline approaches. To the best of our knowledge, this work demonstrates the first approach in learning multitrack mixing conventions from real-world data at the waveform level, without knowledge of the underlying mixing parameters.
abstract_zh: 深度学习在自动多轨混音中的应用很大程度上尚未被探索。部分原因是可用数据有限，而且此类数据相对非结构化且可变。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种受领域启发的模型，该模型对混合任务具有很强的归纳偏差。我们通过应用预训练的子网络和权重共享以及和/差立体损失函数来实现这一目标。所提出的模型可以用有限数量的示例进行训练，对于输入顺序具有排列不变性，并且对输入源的数量没有限制。此外，它还生成人类可读的混合参数，允许用户手动调整或细化生成的混合。音频工程师参与的感知评估结果表明，我们的方法生成的混音性能优于基线方法。据我们所知，这项工作展示了第一种从波形级别的真实数据学习多轨混音约定的方法，而无需了解底层混音参数。

AI.result: 音频工程师的感知评估表明，该方法生成的混音效果优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次在波形层面从真实数据中学习多轨混音规则，无需依赖底层混音参数先验知识。

search_text: Automatic multitrack mixing with a differentiable mixing console of neural audio effects 使用神经音频效果的可微混合控制台进行自动多轨混合 Applications of deep learning to automatic multitrack mixing are largely unexplored. This is partly due to the limited available data, coupled with the fact that such data is relatively unstructured and variable. To address these challenges, we propose a domain-inspired model with a strong inductive bias for the mixing task. We achieve this with the application of pre-trained sub-networks and weight sharing, as well as with a sum/difference stereo loss function. The proposed model can be trained with a limited number of examples, is permutation invariant with respect to the input ordering, and places no limit on the number of input sources. Furthermore, it produces human-readable mixing parameters, allowing users to manually adjust or refine the generated mix. Results from a perceptual evaluation involving audio engineers indicate that our approach generates mixes that outperform baseline approaches. To the best of our knowledge, this work demonstrates the first approach in learning multitrack mixing conventions from real-world data at the waveform level, without knowledge of the underlying mixing parameters. 深度学习在自动多轨混音中的应用很大程度上尚未被探索。部分原因是可用数据有限，而且此类数据相对非结构化且可变。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种受领域启发的模型，该模型对混合任务具有很强的归纳偏差。我们通过应用预训练的子网络和权重共享以及和/差立体损失函数来实现这一目标。所提出的模型可以用有限数量的示例进行训练，对于输入顺序具有排列不变性，并且对输入源的数量没有限制。此外，它还生成人类可读的混合参数，允许用户手动调整或细化生成的混合。音频工程师参与的感知评估结果表明，我们的方法生成的混音性能优于基线方法。据我们所知，这项工作展示了第一种从波形级别的真实数据学习多轨混音约定的方法，而无需了解底层混音参数。 本文提出了一种基于神经音频效果的可微混音台模型，用于实现自动多轨混音。 Christian J. Steinmetz,Jordi Pons,Santiago Pascual,Joan Serrà eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Jerry Lonlac,Arnaud Doniec,Marin Lujak,Stephane Lecoeuche
title: Extracting Seasonal Gradual Patterns from Temporal Sequence Data Using Periodic Patterns Mining
title_zh: 使用周期性模式挖掘从时间序列数据中提取季节性渐变模式
abstract: Mining frequent episodes aims at recovering sequential patterns from temporal data sequences, which can then be used to predict the occurrence of related events in advance. On the other hand, gradual patterns that capture co-variation of complex attributes in the form of " when X increases/decreases, Y increases/decreases" play an important role in many real world applications where huge volumes of complex numerical data must be handled. Recently, these patterns have received attention from the data mining community exploring temporal data who proposed methods to automatically extract gradual patterns from temporal data. However, to the best of our knowledge, no method has been proposed to extract gradual patterns that regularly appear at identical time intervals in many sequences of temporal data, despite the fact that such patterns may add knowledge to certain applications, such as e-commerce. In this paper, we propose to extract co-variations of periodically repeating attributes from the sequences of temporal data that we call seasonal gradual patterns. For this purpose, we formulate the task of mining seasonal gradual patterns as the problem of mining periodic patterns in multiple sequences and then we exploit periodic pattern mining algorithms to extract seasonal gradual patterns. We discuss specific features of these patterns and propose an approach for their extraction based on mining periodic frequent patterns common to multiple sequences. We also propose a new anti-monotonous support definition associated to these seasonal gradual patterns. The illustrative results obtained from some real world data sets show that the proposed approach is efficient and that it can extract small sets of patterns by filtering numerous nonseasonal patterns to identify the seasonal ones.
summary: Mining frequent episodes aims at recovering sequential patterns from temporal data sequences, which can then be used to predict the occurrence of related events in advance. On the other hand, gradual patterns that capture co-variation of complex attributes in the form of " when X increases/decreases, Y increases/decreases" play an important role in many real world applications where huge volumes of complex numerical data must be handled. Recently, these patterns have received attention from the data mining community exploring temporal data who proposed methods to automatically extract gradual patterns from temporal data. However, to the best of our knowledge, no method has been proposed to extract gradual patterns that regularly appear at identical time intervals in many sequences of temporal data, despite the fact that such patterns may add knowledge to certain applications, such as e-commerce. In this paper, we propose to extract co-variations of periodically repeating attributes from the sequences of temporal data that we call seasonal gradual patterns. For this purpose, we formulate the task of mining seasonal gradual patterns as the problem of mining periodic patterns in multiple sequences and then we exploit periodic pattern mining algorithms to extract seasonal gradual patterns. We discuss specific features of these patterns and propose an approach for their extraction based on mining periodic frequent patterns common to multiple sequences. We also propose a new anti-monotonous support definition associated to these seasonal gradual patterns. The illustrative results obtained from some real world data sets show that the proposed approach is efficient and that it can extract small sets of patterns by filtering numerous nonseasonal patterns to identify the seasonal ones.
abstract_zh: 挖掘频繁事件的目的是从时间数据序列中恢复顺序模式，然后可以用来提前预测相关事件的发生。另一方面，以“当 X 增加/减少时，Y 增加/减少”的形式捕获复杂属性的共变的渐进模式在许多必须处理大量复杂数值数据的现实应用中发挥着重要作用。最近，这些模式受到了探索时态数据的数据挖掘社区的关注，他们提出了从时态数据中自动提取渐进模式的方法。然而，据我们所知，尚未提出任何方法来提取在许多时间数据序列中以相同时间间隔定期出现的渐进模式，尽管此类模式可能会为某些应用程序（例如电子商务）添加知识。在本文中，我们建议从我们称为季节性渐进模式的时间数据序列中提取周期性重复属性的协变。为此，我们将挖掘季节性渐变模式的任务制定为挖掘多个序列中的周期性模式的问题，然后利用周期性模式挖掘算法来提取季节性渐变模式。我们讨论了这些模式的具体特征，并提出了一种基于挖掘多个序列共有的周期性频繁模式的提取方法。我们还提出了与这些季节性渐进模式相关的新的反单调支持定义。从一些现实世界数据集中获得的说明性结果表明，所提出的方法是有效的，并且它可以通过过滤大量非季节性模式来识别季节性模式来提取小组模式。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从时间序列数据中提取季节性渐变模式的方法，通过周期性模式挖掘技术识别定期重复的属性共变关系。
AI.motivation: 现有方法无法有效提取在多个时间序列中定期重复出现的渐变模式，而这类模式在电商等场景中具有重要应用价值。
AI.method: 将季节性渐变模式挖掘转化为多序列周期性模式挖掘问题，结合周期性模式挖掘算法并提出新的反单调支持度定义。
AI.result: 在真实数据集上的实验表明，该方法能高效过滤非季节性模式，提取出少量具有代表性的季节性渐变模式。
AI.conclusion: 提出的周期性模式挖掘框架有效解决了季节性渐变模式提取问题，为时间序列数据分析提供了新思路。

authors_text: Paul Magron,Cédric Févotte
title: Leveraging the structure of musical preference in content-aware music recommendation
title_zh: 在内容感知音乐推荐中利用音乐偏好结构
abstract: State-of-the-art music recommendation systems are based on collaborative filtering, which predicts a user's interest from his listening habits and similarities with other users' profiles. These approaches are agnostic to the song content, and therefore face the cold-start problem: they cannot recommend novel songs without listening history. To tackle this issue, content-aware recommendation incorporates information about the songs that can be used for recommending new items. Most methods falling in this category exploit either user-annotated tags, acoustic features or deeply-learned features. Consequently, these content features do not have a clear musical meaning, thus they are not necessarily relevant from a musical preference perspective. In this work, we propose instead to leverage a model of musical preference which originates from the field of music psychology. From low-level acoustic features we extract three factors (arousal, valence and depth), which have been shown appropriate for describing musical taste. Then we integrate those into a collaborative filtering framework for content-aware music recommendation. Experiments conducted on large-scale data show that this approach is able to address the cold-start problem, while using a compact and meaningful set of musical features.
summary: State-of-the-art music recommendation systems are based on collaborative filtering, which predicts a user's interest from his listening habits and similarities with other users' profiles. These approaches are agnostic to the song content, and therefore face the cold-start problem: they cannot recommend novel songs without listening history. To tackle this issue, content-aware recommendation incorporates information about the songs that can be used for recommending new items. Most methods falling in this category exploit either user-annotated tags, acoustic features or deeply-learned features. Consequently, these content features do not have a clear musical meaning, thus they are not necessarily relevant from a musical preference perspective. In this work, we propose instead to leverage a model of musical preference which originates from the field of music psychology. From low-level acoustic features we extract three factors (arousal, valence and depth), which have been shown appropriate for describing musical taste. Then we integrate those into a collaborative filtering framework for content-aware music recommendation. Experiments conducted on large-scale data show that this approach is able to address the cold-start problem, while using a compact and meaningful set of musical features.
abstract_zh: 最先进的音乐推荐系统基于协同过滤，它根据用户的收听习惯以及与其他用户的个人资料的相似性来预测用户的兴趣。这些方法与歌曲内容无关，因此面临冷启动问题：它们无法在没有收听历史的情况下推荐新颖的歌曲。为了解决这个问题，内容感知推荐结合了可用于推荐新项目的歌曲信息。属于此类别的大多数方法都利用用户注释的标签、声学特征或深度学习的特征。因此，这些内容特征不具有明确的音乐含义，因此从音乐偏好的角度来看它们不一定相关。在这项工作中，我们建议利用源自音乐心理学领域的音乐偏好模型。我们从低级声学特征中提取三个因素（唤醒度、效价和深度），这些因素已被证明适合描述音乐品味。然后，我们将它们集成到协作过滤框架中，以进行内容感知的音乐推荐。对大规模数据进行的实验表明，这种方法能够解决冷启动问题，同时使用一组紧凑且有意义的音乐特征。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于音乐偏好结构的内容感知音乐推荐方法，通过整合音乐心理学特征解决冷启动问题。
AI.motivation: 传统协同过滤推荐系统无法处理新歌冷启动问题，而现有内容特征缺乏音乐语义关联，难以准确反映用户音乐偏好。
AI.method: 从音频特征中提取唤醒度、效价和深度三个音乐心理维度特征，并将其嵌入协同过滤框架进行推荐建模。
AI.result: 实验验证该方法有效缓解冷启动问题，且相比传统内容特征具有更紧凑的音乐语义表征能力。
AI.conclusion: 基于音乐心理特征的推荐方法在解决冷启动问题上表现优异，为音乐推荐系统提供了更具解释性的特征框架。

search_text: Leveraging the structure of musical preference in content-aware music recommendation 在内容感知音乐推荐中利用音乐偏好结构 State-of-the-art music recommendation systems are based on collaborative filtering, which predicts a user's interest from his listening habits and similarities with other users' profiles. These approaches are agnostic to the song content, and therefore face the cold-start problem: they cannot recommend novel songs without listening history. To tackle this issue, content-aware recommendation incorporates information about the songs that can be used for recommending new items. Most methods falling in this category exploit either user-annotated tags, acoustic features or deeply-learned features. Consequently, these content features do not have a clear musical meaning, thus they are not necessarily relevant from a musical preference perspective. In this work, we propose instead to leverage a model of musical preference which originates from the field of music psychology. From low-level acoustic features we extract three factors (arousal, valence and depth), which have been shown appropriate for describing musical taste. Then we integrate those into a collaborative filtering framework for content-aware music recommendation. Experiments conducted on large-scale data show that this approach is able to address the cold-start problem, while using a compact and meaningful set of musical features. 最先进的音乐推荐系统基于协同过滤，它根据用户的收听习惯以及与其他用户的个人资料的相似性来预测用户的兴趣。这些方法与歌曲内容无关，因此面临冷启动问题：它们无法在没有收听历史的情况下推荐新颖的歌曲。为了解决这个问题，内容感知推荐结合了可用于推荐新项目的歌曲信息。属于此类别的大多数方法都利用用户注释的标签、声学特征或深度学习的特征。因此，这些内容特征不具有明确的音乐含义，因此从音乐偏好的角度来看它们不一定相关。在这项工作中，我们建议利用源自音乐心理学领域的音乐偏好模型。我们从低级声学特征中提取三个因素（唤醒度、效价和深度），这些因素已被证明适合描述音乐品味。然后，我们将它们集成到协作过滤框架中，以进行内容感知的音乐推荐。对大规模数据进行的实验表明，这种方法能够解决冷启动问题，同时使用一组紧凑且有意义的音乐特征。 本文提出一种基于音乐偏好结构的内容感知音乐推荐方法，通过整合音乐心理学特征解决冷启动问题。 Paul Magron,Cédric Févotte cs.IR,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Mahsa Mesgaran,A. Ben Hamza
title: Graph Fairing Convolutional Networks for Anomaly Detection
title_zh: 用于异常检测的图公平卷积网络
abstract: Graph convolution is a fundamental building block for many deep neural networks on graph-structured data. In this paper, we introduce a simple, yet very effective graph convolutional network with skip connections for semi-supervised anomaly detection. The proposed layerwise propagation rule of our model is theoretically motivated by the concept of implicit fairing in geometry processing, and comprises a graph convolution module for aggregating information from immediate node neighbors and a skip connection module for combining layer-wise neighborhood representations. This propagation rule is derived from the iterative solution of the implicit fairing equation via the Jacobi method. In addition to capturing information from distant graph nodes through skip connections between the network's layers, our approach exploits both the graph structure and node features for learning discriminative node representations. These skip connections are integrated by design in our proposed network architecture. The effectiveness of our model is demonstrated through extensive experiments on five benchmark datasets, achieving better or comparable anomaly detection results against strong baseline methods. We also demonstrate through an ablation study that skip connection helps improve the model performance.
summary: Graph convolution is a fundamental building block for many deep neural networks on graph-structured data. In this paper, we introduce a simple, yet very effective graph convolutional network with skip connections for semi-supervised anomaly detection. The proposed layerwise propagation rule of our model is theoretically motivated by the concept of implicit fairing in geometry processing, and comprises a graph convolution module for aggregating information from immediate node neighbors and a skip connection module for combining layer-wise neighborhood representations. This propagation rule is derived from the iterative solution of the implicit fairing equation via the Jacobi method. In addition to capturing information from distant graph nodes through skip connections between the network's layers, our approach exploits both the graph structure and node features for learning discriminative node representations. These skip connections are integrated by design in our proposed network architecture. The effectiveness of our model is demonstrated through extensive experiments on five benchmark datasets, achieving better or comparable anomaly detection results against strong baseline methods. We also demonstrate through an ablation study that skip connection helps improve the model performance.
abstract_zh: 图卷积是许多基于图结构数据的深度神经网络的基本构建块。在本文中，我们介绍了一种简单但非常有效的图卷积网络，具有用于半监督异常检测的跳跃连接。我们模型提出的分层传播规则在理论上是受到几何处理中隐式公平概念的启发，并且包括用于聚合来自直接节点邻居的信息的图卷积模块和用于组合分层邻域表示的跳跃连接模块。该传播规则是通过雅可比方法从隐式光顺方程的迭代解得出的。除了通过网络层之间的跳跃连接从遥远的图节点捕获信息之外，我们的方法还利用图结构和节点特征来学习判别性节点表示。这些跳跃连接通过设计集成在我们提出的网络架构中。我们模型的有效性通过对五个基准数据集的广泛实验得到证明，与强大的基线方法相比，获得了更好或可比较的异常检测结果。我们还通过消融研究证明，跳过连接有助于提高模型性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于跳跃连接的图卷积网络，用于半监督异常检测任务。
AI.motivation: 现有图卷积方法在捕捉远处节点信息及利用图结构与节点特征方面存在不足，需改进模型表示能力以提升异常检测效果。
AI.method: 设计层间传播规则，结合图卷积模块（聚合邻域信息）与跳跃连接模块（整合跨层表示），通过Jacobi方法迭代求解隐式平滑方程实现。
AI.result: 在五个基准数据集上取得优于或媲美现有方法的异常检测效果，消融实验证明跳跃连接对性能提升具有显著作用。
AI.conclusion: 提出的网络结构通过隐式平滑机制与跳跃连接有效捕捉图数据局部与全局特征，为图异常检测提供新思路。

The proposed layerwise propagation rule of our model is theoretically motivated by the concept of implicit fairing in geometry processing, and comprises a graph convolution module for aggregating information from immediate node neighbors and a skip connection module for combining layer-wise neighborhood representations. This propagation rule is derived from the iterative solution of the implicit fairing equation via the Jacobi method. In addition to capturing information from distant graph nodes through skip connections between the network's layers, our approach exploits both the graph structure and node features for learning discriminative node representations. These skip connections are integrated by design in our proposed network architecture. authors_text: Lars Gottesbüren,Tobias Heuer,Peter Sanders,Sebastian Schlag
title: Scalable Shared-Memory Hypergraph Partitioning
title_zh: 可扩展的共享内存超图分区
abstract: Hypergraph partitioning is an important preprocessing step for optimizing data placement and minimizing communication volumes in high-performance computing applications. To cope with ever growing problem sizes, it has become increasingly important to develop fast parallel partitioning algorithms whose solution quality is competitive with existing sequential algorithms. To this end, we present Mt-KaHyPar, the first shared-memory multilevel hypergraph partitioner with parallel implementations of many techniques used by the sequential, high-quality partitioning systems: a parallel coarsening algorithm that uses parallel community detection as guidance, initial partitioning via parallel recursive bipartitioning with work-stealing, a scalable label propagation refinement algorithm, and the first fully-parallel direct $k$-way formulation of the classical FM algorithm. Experiments performed on a large benchmark set of instances from various application domains demonstrate the scalability and effectiveness of our approach. With 64 cores, we observe self-relative speedups of up to 51 and a harmonic mean speedup of 23.5. In terms of solution quality, we outperform the distributed hypergraph partitioner Zoltan on 95% of the instances while also being a factor of 2.1 faster. With just four cores,Mt-KaHyPar is also slightly faster than the fastest sequential multilevel partitioner PaToH while producing better solutions on 83% of all instances. The sequential high-quality partitioner KaHyPar still finds better solutions than our parallel approach, especially when using max-flow-based refinement. This, however, comes at the cost of considerably longer running times.
summary: Hypergraph partitioning is an important preprocessing step for optimizing data placement and minimizing communication volumes in high-performance computing applications. To cope with ever growing problem sizes, it has become increasingly important to develop fast parallel partitioning algorithms whose solution quality is competitive with existing sequential algorithms. To this end, we present Mt-KaHyPar, the first shared-memory multilevel hypergraph partitioner with parallel implementations of many techniques used by the sequential, high-quality partitioning systems: a parallel coarsening algorithm that uses parallel community detection as guidance, initial partitioning via parallel recursive bipartitioning with work-stealing, a scalable label propagation refinement algorithm, and the first fully-parallel direct $k$-way formulation of the classical FM algorithm. Experiments performed on a large benchmark set of instances from various application domains demonstrate the scalability and effectiveness of our approach. With 64 cores, we observe self-relative speedups of up to 51 and a harmonic mean speedup of 23.5. In terms of solution quality, we outperform the distributed hypergraph partitioner Zoltan on 95% of the instances while also being a factor of 2.1 faster. With just four cores,Mt-KaHyPar is also slightly faster than the fastest sequential multilevel partitioner PaToH while producing better solutions on 83% of all instances. The sequential high-quality partitioner KaHyPar still finds better solutions than our parallel approach, especially when using max-flow-based refinement. This, however, comes at the cost of considerably longer running times.
abstract_zh: 超图分区是一个重要的预处理步骤，用于优化高性能计算应用程序中的数据放置和最小化通信量。为了应对不断增长的问题规模，开发快速并行分区算法变得越来越重要，其解决方案质量与现有的顺序算法具有竞争力。为此，我们提出了 Mt-KaHyPar，第一个共享内存多级超图分区器，它并行实现了顺序、高质量分区系统所使用的许多技术：使用并行社区检测作为指导的并行粗化算法、通过工作窃取的并行递归二分区进行初始分区、可扩展的标签传播细化算法以及经典 FM 算法的第一个完全并行的直接 $k$ 方式公式。在来自不同应用程序领域的大量基准实例集上进行的实验证明了我们方法的可扩展性和有效性。对于 64 个内核，我们观察到自相关加速高达 51，调和平均加速高达 23.5。就解决方案质量而言，我们在 95% 的实例上优于分布式超图分区器 Zoltan，同时速度提高了 2.1 倍。 Mt-KaHyPar 仅具有四个核心，其速度也比最快的顺序多级分区器 PaToH 稍快，同时在 83% 的所有实例上生成更好的解决方案。顺序高质量分区器 KaHyPar 仍然找到比我们的并行方法更好的解决方案，特别是在使用基于最大流的细化时。然而，这是以相当长的运行时间为代价的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Mt-KaHyPar，一种共享内存多级超图划分工具，旨在实现高效并行计算同时保持解决方案质量。
AI.motivation: 随着问题规模增长，需要开发快速且能与传统顺序算法竞争质量的并行超图划分算法，以优化高性能计算中的数据布局和通信开销。
AI.method: 采用并行粗化（基于社区检测）、并行递归二分法初始划分、可扩展标签传播优化算法，以及首个完全并行的直接k-way FM算法。
AI.result: 64核测试中实现最高51倍加速，平均加速23.5倍；在95%实例上优于Zoltan且快2.1倍，4核时比PaToH更快且83%实例质量更优，但顺序版KaHyPar在max-flow优化下仍略胜一筹。
AI.conclusion: Mt-KaHyPar在并行效率与解决方案质量间取得平衡，但顺序算法在特定优化下仍具优势。

Experiments performed on a large benchmark set of instances from various application domains demonstrate the scalability and effectiveness of our approach. With 64 cores, we observe self-relative speedups of up to 51 and a harmonic mean speedup of 23.5. In terms of solution quality, we outperform the distributed hypergraph partitioner Zoltan on 95% of the instances while also being a factor of 2.1 faster. With just four cores,Mt-KaHyPar is also slightly faster than the fastest sequential multilevel partitioner PaToH while producing better solutions on 83% of all instances. The sequential high-quality partitioner KaHyPar still finds better solutions than our parallel approach, especially when using max-flow-based refinement. This, however, comes at the cost of considerably longer running times. 超图分区是一个重要的预处理步骤，用于优化高性能计算应用程序中的数据放置和最小化通信量。为了应对不断增长的问题规模，开发快速并行分区算法变得越来越重要，其解决方案质量与现有的顺序算法具有竞争力。为此，我们提出了 Mt-KaHyPar，第一个共享内存多级超图分区器，它并行实现了顺序、高质量分区系统所使用的许多技术：使用并行社区检测作为指导的并行粗化算法、通过工作窃取的并行递归二分区进行初始分区、可扩展的标签传播细化算法以及经典 FM 算法的第一个完全并行的直接 $k$ 方式公式。在来自不同应用程序领域的大量基准实例集上进行的实验证明了我们方法的可扩展性和有效性。对于 64 个内核，我们观察到自相关加速高达 51，调和平均加速高达 23.5。就解决方案质量而言，我们在 95% 的实例上优于分布式超图分区器 Zoltan，同时速度提高了 2.1 倍。 Mt-KaHyPar 仅具有四个核心，其速度也比最快的顺序多级分区器 PaToH 稍快，同时在 83% 的所有实例上生成更好的解决方案。顺序高质量分区器 KaHyPar 仍然找到比我们的并行方法更好的解决方案，特别是在使用基于最大流的细化时。然而，这是以相当长的运行时间为代价的。 本文提出Mt-KaHyPar，一种共享内存多级超图划分工具，旨在实现高效并行计算同时保持解决方案质量。 Lars Gottesbüren,Tobias Heuer,Peter Sanders,Sebastian Schlag cs.DC,cs.DS

authors_text: Smail Ait Bouhsain,Saeed Saadatnejad,Alexandre Alahi
title: Pedestrian Intention Prediction: A Multi-task Perspective
title_zh: 行人意图预测：多任务视角
comment: Accepted and published in hEART2020 (the 9th Symposium of the European Association for Research in Transportation): http://www.heart-web.org/
comments: Accepted and published in hEART2020 (the 9th Symposium of the European Association for Research in Transportation): http://www.heart-web.org/
abstract: In order to be globally deployed, autonomous cars must guarantee the safety of pedestrians. This is the reason why forecasting pedestrians' intentions sufficiently in advance is one of the most critical and challenging tasks for autonomous vehicles. This work tries to solve this problem by jointly predicting the intention and visual states of pedestrians. In terms of visual states, whereas previous work focused on x-y coordinates, we will also predict the size and indeed the whole bounding box of the pedestrian. The method is a recurrent neural network in a multi-task learning approach. It has one head that predicts the intention of the pedestrian for each one of its future position and another one predicting the visual states of the pedestrian. Experiments on the JAAD dataset show the superiority of the performance of our method compared to previous works for intention prediction. Also, although its simple architecture (more than 2 times faster), the performance of the bounding box prediction is comparable to the ones yielded by much more complex architectures. Our code is available online.
summary: In order to be globally deployed, autonomous cars must guarantee the safety of pedestrians. This is the reason why forecasting pedestrians' intentions sufficiently in advance is one of the most critical and challenging tasks for autonomous vehicles. This work tries to solve this problem by jointly predicting the intention and visual states of pedestrians. In terms of visual states, whereas previous work focused on x-y coordinates, we will also predict the size and indeed the whole bounding box of the pedestrian. The method is a recurrent neural network in a multi-task learning approach. It has one head that predicts the intention of the pedestrian for each one of its future position and another one predicting the visual states of the pedestrian. Experiments on the JAAD dataset show the superiority of the performance of our method compared to previous works for intention prediction. Also, although its simple architecture (more than 2 times faster), the performance of the bounding box prediction is comparable to the ones yielded by much more complex architectures. Our code is available online.
abstract_zh: 为了在全球范围内部署，自动驾驶汽车必须保证行人的安全。这就是为什么提前充分预测行人意图是自动驾驶汽车最关键和最具挑战性的任务之一的原因。这项工作试图通过联合预测行人的意图和视觉状态来解决这个问题。就视觉状态而言，虽然之前的工作主要关注 x-y 坐标，但我们还将预测行人的大小甚至整个边界框。该方法是多任务学习方法中的循环神经网络。它有一个头部可以预测行人对其未来位置的意图，另一个头部可以预测行人的视觉状态。 JAAD 数据集上的实验表明，与之前的意图预测工作相比，我们的方法具有性能优越性。此外，尽管其架构简单（速度快两倍以上），但边界框预测的性能与更复杂的架构产生的性能相当。我们的代码可在线获取。

AI.tldr: 通过多任务学习方法同时预测行人意图和视觉状态，以提高自动驾驶的安全性。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶汽车需要确保行人安全，而提前准确预测行人意图是实现这一目标的关键挑战。
AI.method: 采用循环神经网络的多任务学习框架，同时预测行人意图和视觉状态（包括边界框），其中每个未来位置的意图由一个头预测，视觉状态由另一个头预测。
AI.result: 在JAAD数据集上的实验表明，该方法在行人意图预测任务中优于现有方法，且边界框预测性能与复杂架构相当，但计算速度超过两倍。
AI.conclusion: 该多任务学习方法在保证行人意图预测精度的同时，显著提升了计算效率，为自动驾驶中的行人安全提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Hasib Zunair,A. Ben Hamza
title: Synthesis of COVID-19 Chest X-rays using Unpaired Image-to-Image Translation
title_zh: 使用不成对的图像到图像转换合成 COVID-19 胸部 X 射线
abstract: Motivated by the lack of publicly available datasets of chest radiographs of positive patients with Coronavirus disease 2019 (COVID-19), we build the first-of-its-kind open dataset of synthetic COVID-19 chest X-ray images of high fidelity using an unsupervised domain adaptation approach by leveraging class conditioning and adversarial training. Our contributions are twofold. First, we show considerable performance improvements on COVID-19 detection using various deep learning architectures when employing synthetic images as additional training set. Second, we show how our image synthesis method can serve as a data anonymization tool by achieving comparable detection performance when trained only on synthetic data. In addition, the proposed data generation framework offers a viable solution to the COVID-19 detection in particular, and to medical image classification tasks in general. Our publicly available benchmark dataset consists of 21,295 synthetic COVID-19 chest X-ray images. The insights gleaned from this dataset can be used for preventive actions in the fight against the COVID-19 pandemic.
summary: Motivated by the lack of publicly available datasets of chest radiographs of positive patients with Coronavirus disease 2019 (COVID-19), we build the first-of-its-kind open dataset of synthetic COVID-19 chest X-ray images of high fidelity using an unsupervised domain adaptation approach by leveraging class conditioning and adversarial training. Our contributions are twofold. First, we show considerable performance improvements on COVID-19 detection using various deep learning architectures when employing synthetic images as additional training set. Second, we show how our image synthesis method can serve as a data anonymization tool by achieving comparable detection performance when trained only on synthetic data. In addition, the proposed data generation framework offers a viable solution to the COVID-19 detection in particular, and to medical image classification tasks in general. Our publicly available benchmark dataset consists of 21,295 synthetic COVID-19 chest X-ray images. The insights gleaned from this dataset can be used for preventive actions in the fight against the COVID-19 pandemic.
abstract_zh: 由于缺乏 2019 年冠状病毒病 (COVID-19) 阳性患者胸部 X 光片的公开数据集，我们利用类调节和对抗性训练，使用无监督域适应方法，构建了首个高保真度合成 COVID-19 胸部 X 光图像的开放数据集。我们的贡献是双重的。首先，当使用合成图像作为附加训练集时，我们使用各种深度学习架构在 COVID-19 检测方面展示了显着的性能改进。其次，我们展示了我们的图像合成方法如何通过仅在合成数据上训练时实现可比的检测性能来充当数据匿名化工具。此外，所提出的数据生成框架为特别是 COVID-19 检测以及一般医学图像分类任务提供了可行的解决方案。我们公开的基准数据集包含 21,295 张合成的 COVID-19 胸部 X 射线图像。从该数据集中收集的见解可用于对抗 COVID-19 大流行的预防行动。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无配对图像到图像翻译方法，合成高保真COVID-19胸部X光图像以解决公开数据集不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有公开的COVID-19胸部X光数据集匮乏，限制了深度学习模型的训练与研究进展。
AI.method: 采用无监督领域自适应框架，结合类别条件生成与对抗训练技术合成图像。
AI.result: 合成数据集使检测模型性能显著提升，且可作为数据匿名化工具，公开了包含21,295张图像的基准数据集。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效缓解了医学影像数据不足问题，为疫情检测及医疗图像分类提供了可行的数据生成方案。

authors_text: Yikang Zhang,Jian Zhang,Zhao Zhong
title: AutoBSS: An Efficient Algorithm for Block Stacking Style Search
title_zh: AutoBSS：一种高效的块堆叠式搜索算法
abstract: Neural network architecture design mostly focuses on the new convolutional operator or special topological structure of network block, little attention is drawn to the configuration of stacking each block, called Block Stacking Style (BSS). Recent studies show that BSS may also have an unneglectable impact on networks, thus we design an efficient algorithm to search it automatically. The proposed method, AutoBSS, is a novel AutoML algorithm based on Bayesian optimization by iteratively refining and clustering Block Stacking Style Code (BSSC), which can find optimal BSS in a few trials without biased evaluation. On ImageNet classification task, ResNet50/MobileNetV2/EfficientNet-B0 with our searched BSS achieve 79.29%/74.5%/77.79%, which outperform the original baselines by a large margin. More importantly, experimental results on model compression, object detection and instance segmentation show the strong generalizability of the proposed AutoBSS, and further verify the unneglectable impact of BSS on neural networks.
summary: Neural network architecture design mostly focuses on the new convolutional operator or special topological structure of network block, little attention is drawn to the configuration of stacking each block, called Block Stacking Style (BSS). Recent studies show that BSS may also have an unneglectable impact on networks, thus we design an efficient algorithm to search it automatically. The proposed method, AutoBSS, is a novel AutoML algorithm based on Bayesian optimization by iteratively refining and clustering Block Stacking Style Code (BSSC), which can find optimal BSS in a few trials without biased evaluation. On ImageNet classification task, ResNet50/MobileNetV2/EfficientNet-B0 with our searched BSS achieve 79.29%/74.5%/77.79%, which outperform the original baselines by a large margin. More importantly, experimental results on model compression, object detection and instance segmentation show the strong generalizability of the proposed AutoBSS, and further verify the unneglectable impact of BSS on neural networks.
abstract_zh: 神经网络架构设计主要关注新的卷积算子或网络块的特殊拓扑结构，很少关注每个块的堆叠配置，称为块堆叠样式（BSS）。最近的研究表明BSS也可能对网络产生不可忽视的影响，因此我们设计了一种有效的算法来自动搜索它。所提出的方法 AutoBSS 是一种基于贝叶斯优化的新型 AutoML 算法，通过迭代细化和聚类块堆叠样式代码（BSSC），可以在几次试验中找到最佳 BSS，而无需进行有偏差的评估。在 ImageNet 分类任务上，ResNet50/MobileNetV2/EfficientNet-B0 与我们搜索的 BSS 实现了 79.29%/74.5%/77.79%，大大优于原始基线。更重要的是，模型压缩、对象检测和实例分割的实验结果表明了所提出的AutoBSS的强大通用性，并进一步验证了BSS对神经网络不可忽视的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为AutoBSS的高效算法，用于自动搜索神经网络中块堆叠风格（BSS）的最优配置。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注神经网络的新运算符或拓扑结构，而忽视了块堆叠方式（BSS）对网络性能的潜在重要影响，需通过自动搜索优化BSS配置。
AI.method: 基于贝叶斯优化，通过迭代精炼和聚类块堆叠风格码（BSSC），在少量试验中无偏评估地找到最优BSS。
AI.result: 在ImageNet分类任务中，ResNet50/MobileNetV2/EfficientNet-B0的准确率分别达到79.29%/74.5%/77.79%，显著优于原始基线；在模型压缩、目标检测和实例分割任务中也表现出强泛化性。
AI.conclusion: AutoBSS有效验证了BSS对神经网络性能的显著影响，为自动机器学习（AutoML）提供了新的优化方向。

search_text: AutoBSS: An Efficient Algorithm for Block Stacking Style Search AutoBSS：一种高效的块堆叠式搜索算法 Neural network architecture design mostly focuses on the new convolutional operator or special topological structure of network block, little attention is drawn to the configuration of stacking each block, called Block Stacking Style (BSS). Recent studies show that BSS may also have an unneglectable impact on networks, thus we design an efficient algorithm to search it automatically. The proposed method, AutoBSS, is a novel AutoML algorithm based on Bayesian optimization by iteratively refining and clustering Block Stacking Style Code (BSSC), which can find optimal BSS in a few trials without biased evaluation. On ImageNet classification task, ResNet50/MobileNetV2/EfficientNet-B0 with our searched BSS achieve 79.29%/74.5%/77.79%, which outperform the original baselines by a large margin. More importantly, experimental results on model compression, object detection and instance segmentation show the strong generalizability of the proposed AutoBSS, and further verify the unneglectable impact of BSS on neural networks. 神经网络架构设计主要关注新的卷积算子或网络块的特殊拓扑结构，很少关注每个块的堆叠配置，称为块堆叠样式（BSS）。最近的研究表明BSS也可能对网络产生不可忽视的影响，因此我们设计了一种有效的算法来自动搜索它。所提出的方法 AutoBSS 是一种基于贝叶斯优化的新型 AutoML 算法，通过迭代细化和聚类块堆叠样式代码（BSSC），可以在几次试验中找到最佳 BSS，而无需进行有偏差的评估。在 ImageNet 分类任务上，ResNet50/MobileNetV2/EfficientNet-B0 与我们搜索的 BSS 实现了 79.29%/74.5%/77.79%，大大优于原始基线。更重要的是，模型压缩、对象检测和实例分割的实验结果表明了所提出的AutoBSS的强大通用性，并进一步验证了BSS对神经网络不可忽视的影响。 本文提出一种名为AutoBSS的高效算法，用于自动搜索神经网络中块堆叠风格（BSS）的最优配置。 Yikang Zhang,Jian Zhang,Zhao Zhong cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Ruihan Yang,Yibo Yang,Joseph Marino,Stephan Mandt
title: Hierarchical Autoregressive Modeling for Neural Video Compression
title_zh: 神经视频压缩的分层自回归建模
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2021
comments: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2021
abstract: Recent work by Marino et al. (2020) showed improved performance in sequential density estimation by combining masked autoregressive flows with hierarchical latent variable models. We draw a connection between such autoregressive generative models and the task of lossy video compression. Specifically, we view recent neural video compression methods (Lu et al., 2019; Yang et al., 2020b; Agustssonet al., 2020) as instances of a generalized stochastic temporal autoregressive transform, and propose avenues for enhancement based on this insight. Comprehensive evaluations on large-scale video data show improved rate-distortion performance over both state-of-the-art neural and conventional video compression methods.
summary: Recent work by Marino et al. (2020) showed improved performance in sequential density estimation by combining masked autoregressive flows with hierarchical latent variable models. We draw a connection between such autoregressive generative models and the task of lossy video compression. Specifically, we view recent neural video compression methods (Lu et al., 2019; Yang et al., 2020b; Agustssonet al., 2020) as instances of a generalized stochastic temporal autoregressive transform, and propose avenues for enhancement based on this insight. Comprehensive evaluations on large-scale video data show improved rate-distortion performance over both state-of-the-art neural and conventional video compression methods.
abstract_zh: 马里诺等人的最新工作。 （2020）通过将屏蔽自回归流与分层潜变量模型相结合，显示了顺序密度估计的性能得到了提高。我们在这种自回归生成模型和有损视频压缩任务之间建立了联系。具体来说，我们将最近的神经视频压缩方法（Lu et al., 2019；Yang et al., 2020b；Agustssonet al., 2020）视为广义随机时间自回归变换的实例，并基于这一见解提出增强途径。对大规模视频数据的综合评估表明，与最先进的神经和传统视频压缩方法相比，率失真性能得到了改善。

AI.tldr: 提出基于层次自回归模型的神经视频压缩方法，提升压缩性能。
AI.motivation: 现有神经视频压缩方法未充分利用自回归模型潜力，需通过层次结构改进性能。
AI.method: 将视频压缩建模为广义自回归变换，结合分层潜在变量与自回归流，优化时间依赖性建模。
AI.result: 在大规模视频数据集上，率失真性能优于现有神经及传统压缩方法。
AI.conclusion: 层次自回归模型有效提升视频压缩性能，验证了自回归方法在压缩任务中的潜力。

authors_text: Paul Magron,Pierre-Hugo Vial,Thomas Oberlin,Cédric Févotte
title: Phase recovery with Bregman divergences for audio source separation
title_zh: 使用 Bregman 散度进行相位恢复以实现音频源分离
abstract: Time-frequency audio source separation is usually achieved by estimating the short-time Fourier transform (STFT) magnitude of each source, and then applying a phase recovery algorithm to retrieve time-domain signals. In particular, the multiple input spectrogram inversion (MISI) algorithm has shown good performance in several recent works. This algorithm minimizes a quadratic reconstruction error between magnitude spectrograms. However, this loss does not properly account for some perceptual properties of audio, and alternative discrepancy measures such as beta-divergences have been preferred in many settings. In this paper, we propose to reformulate phase recovery in audio source separation as a minimization problem involving Bregman divergences. To optimize the resulting objective, we derive a projected gradient descent algorithm. Experiments conducted on a speech enhancement task show that this approach outperforms MISI for several alternative losses, which highlights their relevance for audio source separation applications.
summary: Time-frequency audio source separation is usually achieved by estimating the short-time Fourier transform (STFT) magnitude of each source, and then applying a phase recovery algorithm to retrieve time-domain signals. In particular, the multiple input spectrogram inversion (MISI) algorithm has shown good performance in several recent works. This algorithm minimizes a quadratic reconstruction error between magnitude spectrograms. However, this loss does not properly account for some perceptual properties of audio, and alternative discrepancy measures such as beta-divergences have been preferred in many settings. In this paper, we propose to reformulate phase recovery in audio source separation as a minimization problem involving Bregman divergences. To optimize the resulting objective, we derive a projected gradient descent algorithm. Experiments conducted on a speech enhancement task show that this approach outperforms MISI for several alternative losses, which highlights their relevance for audio source separation applications.
abstract_zh: 时频音频源分离通常是通过估计每个源的短时傅里叶变换（STFT）幅度，然后应用相位恢复算法来检索时域信号来实现的。特别是，多输入频谱图反演（MISI）算法在最近的几项工作中表现出了良好的性能。该算法最小化幅度谱图之间的二次重建误差。然而，这种损失并不能正确解释音频的某些感知属性，并且在许多设置中首选替代差异度量（例如 beta 散度）。在本文中，我们建议将音频源分离中的相位恢复重新表述为涉及布雷格曼散度的最小化问题。为了优化最终的目标，我们推导了投影梯度下降算法。在语音增强任务上进行的实验表明，该方法在几个替代损失方面优于 MISI，这凸显了它们与音频源分离应用的相关性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Bregman散度的相位恢复方法，用于改进音频源分离中的相位重建问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法如MISI使用二次重构误差进行相位恢复，但未能充分考虑音频的感知特性，而Beta散度等替代度量在许多场景中更受青睐。
AI.method: 将音频源分离中的相位恢复问题重新表述为Bregman散度最小化问题，并推导出投影梯度下降算法进行优化。
AI.result: 在语音增强任务的实验中，该方法优于MISI及多种替代损失函数，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: Bregman散度在音频源分离中具有重要应用价值，能够提升相位恢复性能。

authors_text: Thomas Cilloni,Wei Wang,Charles Walter,Charles Fleming
title: Ulixes: Facial Recognition Privacy with Adversarial Machine Learning
title_zh: Ulixes：通过对抗性机器学习实现面部识别隐私
comment: ef:PoPETS Proceedings on Privacy Enhancing Technologies 2022; (1):148-165
comments: ef:PoPETS Proceedings on Privacy Enhancing Technologies 2022; (1):148-165
abstract: Facial recognition tools are becoming exceptionally accurate in identifying people from images. However, this comes at the cost of privacy for users of online services with photo management (e.g. social media platforms). Particularly troubling is the ability to leverage unsupervised learning to recognize faces even when the user has not labeled their images. In this paper we propose Ulixes, a strategy to generate visually non-invasive facial noise masks that yield adversarial examples, preventing the formation of identifiable user clusters in the embedding space of facial encoders. This is applicable even when a user is unmasked and labeled images are available online. We demonstrate the effectiveness of Ulixes by showing that various classification and clustering methods cannot reliably label the adversarial examples we generate. We also study the effects of Ulixes in various black-box settings and compare it to the current state of the art in adversarial machine learning. Finally, we challenge the effectiveness of Ulixes against adversarially trained models and show that it is robust to countermeasures.
summary: Facial recognition tools are becoming exceptionally accurate in identifying people from images. However, this comes at the cost of privacy for users of online services with photo management (e.g. social media platforms). Particularly troubling is the ability to leverage unsupervised learning to recognize faces even when the user has not labeled their images. In this paper we propose Ulixes, a strategy to generate visually non-invasive facial noise masks that yield adversarial examples, preventing the formation of identifiable user clusters in the embedding space of facial encoders. This is applicable even when a user is unmasked and labeled images are available online. We demonstrate the effectiveness of Ulixes by showing that various classification and clustering methods cannot reliably label the adversarial examples we generate. We also study the effects of Ulixes in various black-box settings and compare it to the current state of the art in adversarial machine learning. Finally, we challenge the effectiveness of Ulixes against adversarially trained models and show that it is robust to countermeasures.
abstract_zh: 面部识别工具在从图像中识别人物方面变得异常准确。然而，这是以照片管理在线服务（例如社交媒体平台）用户的隐私为代价的。特别令人不安的是，即使用户没有标记他们的图像，也可以利用无监督学习来识别面孔。在本文中，我们提出了 Ulixes，一种生成视觉非侵入性面部噪声掩模的策略，该掩模产生对抗性示例，防止在面部编码器的嵌入空间中形成可识别的用户集群。即使当用户未被屏蔽并且标记图像可在线获得时，这也适用。我们通过证明各种分类和聚类方法无法可靠地标记我们生成的对抗性示例来证明 Ulixes 的有效性。我们还研究了 Ulixes 在各种黑盒设置中的效果，并将其与对抗性机器学习的当前技术水平进行比较。最后，我们挑战 Ulixes 针对对抗性训练模型的有效性，并表明它对对抗措施具有鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Ulixes方法，通过生成对抗性噪声掩码破坏面部识别系统的嵌入空间聚类，以保护用户隐私。
AI.motivation: 面部识别技术的高精度带来隐私风险，尤其在用户未标注图像时，无监督学习仍可能识别身份，需有效隐私保护方案。
AI.method: 设计视觉非侵入性面部噪声掩码，生成对抗样本干扰面部编码器的嵌入空间聚类，适用于有标签和无标签场景。
AI.result: 实验表明Ulixes能有效防止分类和聚类方法识别对抗样本，在黑盒场景下优于现有对抗学习方法，且对对抗训练模型具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: Ulixes为面部识别隐私保护提供了可行方案，但需进一步验证其对更复杂对抗模型的防御能力。

search_text: Ulixes: Facial Recognition Privacy with Adversarial Machine Learning Ulixes：通过对抗性机器学习实现面部识别隐私 Facial recognition tools are becoming exceptionally accurate in identifying people from images. However, this comes at the cost of privacy for users of online services with photo management (e.g. social media platforms). Particularly troubling is the ability to leverage unsupervised learning to recognize faces even when the user has not labeled their images. In this paper we propose Ulixes, a strategy to generate visually non-invasive facial noise masks that yield adversarial examples, preventing the formation of identifiable user clusters in the embedding space of facial encoders. This is applicable even when a user is unmasked and labeled images are available online. We demonstrate the effectiveness of Ulixes by showing that various classification and clustering methods cannot reliably label the adversarial examples we generate. We also study the effects of Ulixes in various black-box settings and compare it to the current state of the art in adversarial machine learning. Finally, we challenge the effectiveness of Ulixes against adversarially trained models and show that it is robust to countermeasures. 面部识别工具在从图像中识别人物方面变得异常准确。然而，这是以照片管理在线服务（例如社交媒体平台）用户的隐私为代价的。特别令人不安的是，即使用户没有标记他们的图像，也可以利用无监督学习来识别面孔。在本文中，我们提出了 Ulixes，一种生成视觉非侵入性面部噪声掩模的策略，该掩模产生对抗性示例，防止在面部编码器的嵌入空间中形成可识别的用户集群。即使当用户未被屏蔽并且标记图像可在线获得时，这也适用。我们通过证明各种分类和聚类方法无法可靠地标记我们生成的对抗性示例来证明 Ulixes 的有效性。我们还研究了 Ulixes 在各种黑盒设置中的效果，并将其与对抗性机器学习的当前技术水平进行比较。最后，我们挑战 Ulixes 针对对抗性训练模型的有效性，并表明它对对抗措施具有鲁棒性。 本文提出Ulixes方法，通过生成对抗性噪声掩码破坏面部识别系统的嵌入空间聚类，以保护用户隐私。 Thomas Cilloni,Wei Wang,Charles Walter,Charles Fleming cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Pierre H. Richemond,Jean-Bastien Grill,Florent Altché,Corentin Tallec,Florian Strub,Andrew Brock,Samuel Smith,Soham De,Razvan Pascanu,Bilal Piot,Michal Valko
title: BYOL works even without batch statistics
title_zh: 即使没有批次统计信息，BYO​​L 也能正常工作
abstract: Bootstrap Your Own Latent (BYOL) is a self-supervised learning approach for image representation. From an augmented view of an image, BYOL trains an online network to predict a target network representation of a different augmented view of the same image. Unlike contrastive methods, BYOL does not explicitly use a repulsion term built from negative pairs in its training objective. Yet, it avoids collapse to a trivial, constant representation. Thus, it has recently been hypothesized that batch normalization (BN) is critical to prevent collapse in BYOL. Indeed, BN flows gradients across batch elements, and could leak information about negative views in the batch, which could act as an implicit negative (contrastive) term. However, we experimentally show that replacing BN with a batch-independent normalization scheme (namely, a combination of group normalization and weight standardization) achieves performance comparable to vanilla BYOL ($73.9\%$ vs. $74.3\%$ top-1 accuracy under the linear evaluation protocol on ImageNet with ResNet-$50$). Our finding disproves the hypothesis that the use of batch statistics is a crucial ingredient for BYOL to learn useful representations.
summary: Bootstrap Your Own Latent (BYOL) is a self-supervised learning approach for image representation. From an augmented view of an image, BYOL trains an online network to predict a target network representation of a different augmented view of the same image. Unlike contrastive methods, BYOL does not explicitly use a repulsion term built from negative pairs in its training objective. Yet, it avoids collapse to a trivial, constant representation. Thus, it has recently been hypothesized that batch normalization (BN) is critical to prevent collapse in BYOL. Indeed, BN flows gradients across batch elements, and could leak information about negative views in the batch, which could act as an implicit negative (contrastive) term. However, we experimentally show that replacing BN with a batch-independent normalization scheme (namely, a combination of group normalization and weight standardization) achieves performance comparable to vanilla BYOL ($73.9\%$ vs. $74.3\%$ top-1 accuracy under the linear evaluation protocol on ImageNet with ResNet-$50$). Our finding disproves the hypothesis that the use of batch statistics is a crucial ingredient for BYOL to learn useful representations.
abstract_zh: Bootstrap Your Own Latent (BYOL) 是一种用于图像表示的自我监督学习方法。根据图像的增强视图，BYOL 训练在线网络来预测同一图像的不同增强视图的目标网络表示。与对比方法不同，BYOL 在其训练目标中没有明确使用由负对构建的排斥项。然而，它避免了崩溃为琐碎的、恒定的表示。因此，最近有人假设批量标准化 (BN) 对于防止 BYOL 崩溃至关重要。事实上，BN 在批次元素之间流动梯度，并且可能会泄漏批次中有关负面视图的信息，这可能充当隐式负面（对比）项。然而，我们通过实验表明，用与批次无关的归一化方案（即组归一化和权重标准化的组合）替换 BN 可以获得与普通 BYOL 相当的性能（在 ImageNet 上使用 ResNet-$50$ 的线性评估协议下，$73.9\%$ 与 $74.3\%$ top-1 精度）。我们的发现反驳了这样的假设：使用批量统计数据是 BYOL 学习有用表示的关键因素。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了BYOL方法在不使用批量统计信息的情况下是否仍能有效学习图像表示。
AI.motivation: 此前认为批量归一化（BN）对防止BYOL表示崩溃至关重要，但作者质疑这一假设并试图验证是否可替代方案。
AI.method: 将BYOL中的批量归一化替换为组归一化与权重标准化结合的批独立归一化方案，并在ImageNet数据集上进行实验对比。
AI.result: 新方案在ImageNet数据集上达到73.9%的top-1准确率（原BYOL为74.3%），性能相当且无需批量统计信息。
AI.conclusion: 批量统计信息并非BYOL学习有效表示的必要条件，其成功可依赖其他归一化方法实现。

authors_text: Anant Raj,Cameron Musco,Lester Mackey,Nicolo Fusi
title: Model-specific Data Subsampling with Influence Functions
title_zh: 具有影响函数的特定于模型的数据子采样
abstract: Model selection requires repeatedly evaluating models on a given dataset and measuring their relative performances. In modern applications of machine learning, the models being considered are increasingly more expensive to evaluate and the datasets of interest are increasing in size. As a result, the process of model selection is time-consuming and computationally inefficient. In this work, we develop a model-specific data subsampling strategy that improves over random sampling whenever training points have varying influence. Specifically, we leverage influence functions to guide our selection strategy, proving theoretically, and demonstrating empirically that our approach quickly selects high-quality models.
summary: Model selection requires repeatedly evaluating models on a given dataset and measuring their relative performances. In modern applications of machine learning, the models being considered are increasingly more expensive to evaluate and the datasets of interest are increasing in size. As a result, the process of model selection is time-consuming and computationally inefficient. In this work, we develop a model-specific data subsampling strategy that improves over random sampling whenever training points have varying influence. Specifically, we leverage influence functions to guide our selection strategy, proving theoretically, and demonstrating empirically that our approach quickly selects high-quality models.
abstract_zh: 模型选择需要在给定数据集上反复评估模型并测量它们的相对性能。在机器学习的现代应用中，所考虑的模型的评估成本越来越高，并且感兴趣的数据集的大小也在增加。因此，模型选择的过程非常耗时且计算效率低下。在这项工作中，我们开发了一种特定于模型的数据子采样策略，当训练点具有不同的影响时，该策略可以改进随机采样。具体来说，我们利用影响函数来指导我们的选择策略，从理论上证明，并从经验上证明我们的方法可以快速选择高质量的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于影响函数的模型特定数据子采样方法，以提高模型选择效率。
AI.motivation: 现代机器学习模型评估成本高且数据集规模大，导致传统模型选择过程耗时低效，需更高效的采样策略。
AI.method: 利用影响函数理论指导数据子采样，根据训练点对模型的影响程度进行非随机化选择。
AI.result: 理论证明与实验验证显示该方法能快速筛选出高质量模型，优于传统随机采样方法。
AI.conclusion: 当训练数据存在显著影响差异时，基于影响函数的子采样策略可有效提升模型选择效率。

authors_text: Biswesh Mohapatra,Gaurav Pandey,Danish Contractor,Sachindra Joshi
title: Simulated Chats for Building Dialog Systems: Learning to Generate Conversations from Instructions
title_zh: 用于构建对话系统的模拟聊天：学习根据指令生成对话
comment: Accepted in the Findings of EMNLP 2021
comments: Accepted in the Findings of EMNLP 2021
abstract: Popular dialog datasets such as MultiWOZ are created by providing crowd workers an instruction, expressed in natural language, that describes the task to be accomplished. Crowd workers play the role of a user and an agent to generate dialogs to accomplish tasks involving booking restaurant tables, calling a taxi etc. In this paper, we present a data creation strategy that uses the pre-trained language model, GPT2, to simulate the interaction between crowd workers by creating a user bot and an agent bot. We train the simulators using a smaller percentage of actual crowd-generated conversations and their corresponding instructions. We demonstrate that by using the simulated data, we achieve significant improvements in low-resource settings on two publicly available datasets - the MultiWOZ dataset and the Persona chat dataset.
summary: Popular dialog datasets such as MultiWOZ are created by providing crowd workers an instruction, expressed in natural language, that describes the task to be accomplished. Crowd workers play the role of a user and an agent to generate dialogs to accomplish tasks involving booking restaurant tables, calling a taxi etc. In this paper, we present a data creation strategy that uses the pre-trained language model, GPT2, to simulate the interaction between crowd workers by creating a user bot and an agent bot. We train the simulators using a smaller percentage of actual crowd-generated conversations and their corresponding instructions. We demonstrate that by using the simulated data, we achieve significant improvements in low-resource settings on two publicly available datasets - the MultiWOZ dataset and the Persona chat dataset.
abstract_zh: MultiWOZ 等流行的对话数据集是通过向众包工作者提供以自然语言表达的指令来创建的，该指令描述了要完成的任务。众包工作者扮演用户和代理的角色，生成对话来完成涉及预订餐厅餐桌、叫出租车等任务。在本文中，我们提出了一种数据创建策略，该策略使用预先训练的语言模型 GPT2，通过创建用户机器人和代理机器人来模拟众包工作者之间的交互。我们使用较小比例的实际人群生成的对话及其相应的指令来训练模拟器。我们证明，通过使用模拟数据，我们在两个公开可用的数据集（MultiWOZ 数据集和 Persona 聊天数据集）上的低资源设置上实现了显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用GPT2模拟生成对话数据，以提升对话系统在低资源环境下的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有对话数据集依赖众包生成，成本高且数据有限，需更高效的数据生成方法以提升低资源场景下的模型性能。
AI.method: 基于GPT2预训练模型构建用户和代理对话机器人，利用少量真实对话数据进行训练，生成模拟对话数据。
AI.result: 在MultiWOZ和Persona数据集上验证，模拟数据使低资源场景下的对话系统性能显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 模拟对话生成方法有效，可在减少真实数据依赖的同时提升对话系统性能，尤其适用于低资源场景。
