authors_text: Wei Zhang,Ning Liu,Yunfeng Zhang
title: Learn to Navigate Maplessly with Varied LiDAR Configurations: A Support Point-Based Approach
title_zh: 学习使用各种 LiDAR 配置进行无地图导航：基于支持点的方法
comment: \c{opyright} 20XX IEEE. Personal use of this material is permitted. Permission from IEEE must be obtained for all other uses, in any current or future media, including reprinting/republishing this material for advertising or promotional purposes, creating new collective works, for resale or redistribution to servers or lists, or reuse of any copyrighted component of this work in other works
comments: \c{opyright} 20XX IEEE. Personal use of this material is permitted. Permission from IEEE must be obtained for all other uses, in any current or future media, including reprinting/republishing this material for advertising or promotional purposes, creating new collective works, for resale or redistribution to servers or lists, or reuse of any copyrighted component of this work in other works
abstract: Deep reinforcement learning (DRL) demonstrates great potential in mapless navigation domain. However, such a navigation model is normally restricted to a fixed configuration of the range sensor because its input format is fixed. In this paper, we propose a DRL model that can address range data obtained from different range sensors with different installation positions. Our model first extracts the goal-directed features from each obstacle point. Subsequently, it chooses global obstacle features from all point-feature candidates and uses these features for the final decision. As only a few points are used to support the final decision, we refer to these points as support points and our approach as support point-based navigation (SPN). Our model can handle data from different LiDAR setups and demonstrates good performance in simulation and real-world experiments. Moreover, it shows great potential in crowded scenarios with small obstacles when using a high-resolution LiDAR.
summary: Deep reinforcement learning (DRL) demonstrates great potential in mapless navigation domain. However, such a navigation model is normally restricted to a fixed configuration of the range sensor because its input format is fixed. In this paper, we propose a DRL model that can address range data obtained from different range sensors with different installation positions. Our model first extracts the goal-directed features from each obstacle point. Subsequently, it chooses global obstacle features from all point-feature candidates and uses these features for the final decision. As only a few points are used to support the final decision, we refer to these points as support points and our approach as support point-based navigation (SPN). Our model can handle data from different LiDAR setups and demonstrates good performance in simulation and real-world experiments. Moreover, it shows great potential in crowded scenarios with small obstacles when using a high-resolution LiDAR.
abstract_zh: 深度强化学习（DRL）在无地图导航领域展现出巨大的潜力。然而，这种导航模型通常受限于距离传感器的固定配置，因为其输入格式是固定的。在本文中，我们提出了一种 DRL 模型，可以处理从具有不同安装位置的不同距离传感器获得的距离数据。我们的模型首先从每个障碍点提取目标导向的特征。随后，它从所有候选点特征中选择全局障碍物特征，并使用这些特征进行最终决策。由于仅使用几个点来支持最终决策，因此我们将这些点称为支持点，并将我们的方法称为基于支持点的导航（SPN）。我们的模型可以处理来自不同激光雷达设置的数据，并在模拟和现实实验中表现出良好的性能。此外，当使用高分辨率激光雷达时，它在障碍物较小的拥挤场景中显示出巨大的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于支持点的深度强化学习模型，实现无需地图且适应不同LiDAR配置的自主导航。
AI.motivation: 现有深度强化学习导航模型受限于固定传感器配置，难以处理不同LiDAR安装位置带来的输入格式差异。
AI.method: 通过提取障碍点目标导向特征，筛选全局关键支持点进行决策，构建支持点导航（SPN）框架以适配多类LiDAR数据。
AI.result: 在仿真与真实环境实验中均表现优异，尤其在高分辨率LiDAR的小障碍物密集场景中展现出显著优势。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了多配置LiDAR适应性问题，为复杂动态环境下的自主导航提供了新思路。

authors_text: Tong Zheng,Hirohisa Oda,Masahiro Oda,Shota Nakamura,Masaki Mori,Hirotsugu Takabatake,Hiroshi Natori,Kensaku Mori
title: Micro CT Image-Assisted Cross Modality Super-Resolution of Clinical CT Images Utilizing Synthesized Training Dataset
title_zh: 利用合成训练数据集的微型 CT 图像辅助跨模态超分辨率临床 CT 图像
abstract: This paper proposes a novel, unsupervised super-resolution (SR) approach for performing the SR of a clinical CT into the resolution level of a micro CT ($μ$CT). The precise non-invasive diagnosis of lung cancer typically utilizes clinical CT data. Due to the resolution limitations of clinical CT (about $0.5 \times 0.5 \times 0.5$ mm$^3$), it is difficult to obtain enough pathological information such as the invasion area at alveoli level. On the other hand, $μ$CT scanning allows the acquisition of volumes of lung specimens with much higher resolution ($50 \times 50 \times 50 μ{\rm m}^3$ or higher). Thus, super-resolution of clinical CT volume may be helpful for diagnosis of lung cancer. Typical SR methods require aligned pairs of low-resolution (LR) and high-resolution (HR) images for training. Unfortunately, obtaining paired clinical CT and $μ$CT volumes of human lung tissues is infeasible. Unsupervised SR methods are required that do not need paired LR and HR images. In this paper, we create corresponding clinical CT-$μ$CT pairs by simulating clinical CT images from $μ$CT images by modified CycleGAN. After this, we use simulated clinical CT-$μ$CT image pairs to train an SR network based on SRGAN. Finally, we use the trained SR network to perform SR of the clinical CT images. We compare our proposed method with another unsupervised SR method for clinical CT images named SR-CycleGAN. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method can successfully perform SR of clinical CT images of lung cancer patients with $μ$CT level resolution, and quantitatively and qualitatively outperformed conventional method (SR-CycleGAN), improving the SSIM (structure similarity) form 0.40 to 0.51.
summary: This paper proposes a novel, unsupervised super-resolution (SR) approach for performing the SR of a clinical CT into the resolution level of a micro CT ($μ$CT). The precise non-invasive diagnosis of lung cancer typically utilizes clinical CT data. Due to the resolution limitations of clinical CT (about $0.5 \times 0.5 \times 0.5$ mm$^3$), it is difficult to obtain enough pathological information such as the invasion area at alveoli level. On the other hand, $μ$CT scanning allows the acquisition of volumes of lung specimens with much higher resolution ($50 \times 50 \times 50 μ{\rm m}^3$ or higher). Thus, super-resolution of clinical CT volume may be helpful for diagnosis of lung cancer. Typical SR methods require aligned pairs of low-resolution (LR) and high-resolution (HR) images for training. Unfortunately, obtaining paired clinical CT and $μ$CT volumes of human lung tissues is infeasible. Unsupervised SR methods are required that do not need paired LR and HR images. In this paper, we create corresponding clinical CT-$μ$CT pairs by simulating clinical CT images from $μ$CT images by modified CycleGAN. After this, we use simulated clinical CT-$μ$CT image pairs to train an SR network based on SRGAN. Finally, we use the trained SR network to perform SR of the clinical CT images. We compare our proposed method with another unsupervised SR method for clinical CT images named SR-CycleGAN. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method can successfully perform SR of clinical CT images of lung cancer patients with $μ$CT level resolution, and quantitatively and qualitatively outperformed conventional method (SR-CycleGAN), improving the SSIM (structure similarity) form 0.40 to 0.51.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的无监督超分辨率 (SR) 方法，用于将临床 CT 的 SR 提高到微型 CT ($μ$CT) 的分辨率水平。肺癌的精确无创诊断通常利用临床 CT 数据。由于临床CT分辨率的限制（约$0.5\times 0.5\times 0.5$mm$^3$），难以获得足够的肺泡水平浸润面积等病理信息。另一方面，$μ$CT 扫描可以采集分辨率更高的肺样本体积（$50 \times 50 \times 50 μ{\rm m}^3$ 或更高）。因此，临床CT体积的超分辨率可能有助于肺癌的诊断。典型的 SR 方法需要对齐的低分辨率 (LR) 和高分辨率 (HR) 图像对进行训练。不幸的是，获得人体肺组织的配对临床 CT 和 $μ$CT 体积是不可行的。需要无监督的 SR 方法，不需要配对的 LR 和 HR 图像。在本文中，我们通过修改的 CycleGAN 从 $μ$CT 图像模拟临床 CT 图像，创建相应的临床 CT-$μ$CT 对。之后，我们使用模拟临床 CT-$μ$CT 图像对来训练基于 SRGAN 的 SR 网络。最后，我们使用经过训练的 SR 网络对临床 CT 图像进行 SR。我们将我们提出的方法与另一种用于临床 CT 图像的无监督 SR 方法（名为 SR-CycleGAN）进行比较。实验结果表明，该方法能够成功对肺癌患者的临床CT图像进行SR，分辨率达到$μ$CT级别，并且在定量和定性上优于传统方法（SR-CycleGAN），将SSIM（结构相似性）从0.40提高到0.51。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需配对图像的无监督超分辨率方法，利用合成数据集将临床CT图像分辨率提升至微CT水平，以辅助肺癌诊断。
AI.motivation: 临床CT分辨率不足（约0.5mm³）难以获取肺部病变的微观病理信息，而微CT（50μm³）虽分辨率高但无法直接用于人体。需通过超分辨率技术提升临床CT图像细节以辅助诊断。
AI.method: 基于修改后的CycleGAN生成临床CT-微CT配对图像作为训练数据，采用SRGAN框架训练超分辨率网络，并与SR-CycleGAN方法对比验证。
AI.result: 所提方法将临床CT图像超分辨率至微CT水平，结构相似度（SSIM）从0.40提升至0.51，优于传统SR-CycleGAN方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过合成数据集实现临床CT图像无监督超分辨率，有效提升图像细节，为肺癌的精准诊断提供技术支持。

search_text: Micro CT Image-Assisted Cross Modality Super-Resolution of Clinical CT Images Utilizing Synthesized Training Dataset 利用合成训练数据集的微型 CT 图像辅助跨模态超分辨率临床 CT 图像 This paper proposes a novel, unsupervised super-resolution (SR) approach for performing the SR of a clinical CT into the resolution level of a micro CT ($μ$CT). The precise non-invasive diagnosis of lung cancer typically utilizes clinical CT data. Due to the resolution limitations of clinical CT (about $0.5 \times 0.5 \times 0.5$ mm$^3$), it is difficult to obtain enough pathological information such as the invasion area at alveoli level. On the other hand, $μ$CT scanning allows the acquisition of volumes of lung specimens with much higher resolution ($50 \times 50 \times 50 μ{\rm m}^3$ or higher). Thus, super-resolution of clinical CT volume may be helpful for diagnosis of lung cancer. Typical SR methods require aligned pairs of low-resolution (LR) and high-resolution (HR) images for training. Unfortunately, obtaining paired clinical CT and $μ$CT volumes of human lung tissues is infeasible. Unsupervised SR methods are required that do not need paired LR and HR images. In this paper, we create corresponding clinical CT-$μ$CT pairs by simulating clinical CT images from $μ$CT images by modified CycleGAN. After this, we use simulated clinical CT-$μ$CT image pairs to train an SR network based on SRGAN. Finally, we use the trained SR network to perform SR of the clinical CT images. We compare our proposed method with another unsupervised SR method for clinical CT images named SR-CycleGAN. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method can successfully perform SR of clinical CT images of lung cancer patients with $μ$CT level resolution, and quantitatively and qualitatively outperformed conventional method (SR-CycleGAN), improving the SSIM (structure similarity) form 0.40 to 0.51. 本文提出了一种新颖的无监督超分辨率 (SR) 方法，用于将临床 CT 的 SR 提高到微型 CT ($μ$CT) 的分辨率水平。肺癌的精确无创诊断通常利用临床 CT 数据。由于临床CT分辨率的限制（约$0.5\times 0.5\times 0.5$mm$^3$），难以获得足够的肺泡水平浸润面积等病理信息。另一方面，$μ$CT 扫描可以采集分辨率更高的肺样本体积（$50 \times 50 \times 50 μ{\rm m}^3$ 或更高）。因此，临床CT体积的超分辨率可能有助于肺癌的诊断。典型的 SR 方法需要对齐的低分辨率 (LR) 和高分辨率 (HR) 图像对进行训练。不幸的是，获得人体肺组织的配对临床 CT 和 $μ$CT 体积是不可行的。需要无监督的 SR 方法，不需要配对的 LR 和 HR 图像。在本文中，我们通过修改的 CycleGAN 从 $μ$CT 图像模拟临床 CT 图像，创建相应的临床 CT-$μ$CT 对。之后，我们使用模拟临床 CT-$μ$CT 图像对来训练基于 SRGAN 的 SR 网络。最后，我们使用经过训练的 SR 网络对临床 CT 图像进行 SR。我们将我们提出的方法与另一种用于临床 CT 图像的无监督 SR 方法（名为 SR-CycleGAN）进行比较。实验结果表明，该方法能够成功对肺癌患者的临床CT图像进行SR，分辨率达到$μ$CT级别，并且在定量和定性上优于传统方法（SR-CycleGAN），将SSIM（结构相似性）从0.40提高到0.51。 本文提出一种无需配对图像的无监督超分辨率方法，利用合成数据集将临床CT图像分辨率提升至微CT水平，以辅助肺癌诊断。 Tong Zheng,Hirohisa Oda,Masahiro Oda,Shota Nakamura,Masaki Mori,Hirotsugu Takabatake,Hiroshi Natori,Kensaku Mori eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Daria Soboleva,Ondrej Skopek,Márius Šajgalík,Victor Cărbune,Felix Weissenberger,Julia Proskurnia,Bogdan Prisacari,Daniel Valcarce,Justin Lu,Rohit Prabhavalkar,Balint Miklos
title: Replacing Human Audio with Synthetic Audio for On-device Unspoken Punctuation Prediction
title_zh: 用合成音频代替人类音频以进行设备上未说出的标点符号预测
abstract: We present a novel multi-modal unspoken punctuation prediction system for the English language which combines acoustic and text features. We demonstrate for the first time, that by relying exclusively on synthetic data generated using a prosody-aware text-to-speech system, we can outperform a model trained with expensive human audio recordings on the unspoken punctuation prediction problem. Our model architecture is well suited for on-device use. This is achieved by leveraging hash-based embeddings of automatic speech recognition text output in conjunction with acoustic features as input to a quasi-recurrent neural network, keeping the model size small and latency low.
summary: We present a novel multi-modal unspoken punctuation prediction system for the English language which combines acoustic and text features. We demonstrate for the first time, that by relying exclusively on synthetic data generated using a prosody-aware text-to-speech system, we can outperform a model trained with expensive human audio recordings on the unspoken punctuation prediction problem. Our model architecture is well suited for on-device use. This is achieved by leveraging hash-based embeddings of automatic speech recognition text output in conjunction with acoustic features as input to a quasi-recurrent neural network, keeping the model size small and latency low.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的结合了声学和文本特征的英语多模态非口语标点符号预测系统。我们首次证明，通过完全依赖使用韵律感知的文本转语音系统生成的合成数据，我们可以在无声标点符号预测问题上超越使用昂贵的人类录音训练的模型。我们的模型架构非常适合在设备上使用。这是通过利用自动语音识别文本输出的基于哈希的嵌入与声学特征结合作为准循环神经网络的输入来实现的，从而保持模型尺寸小和延迟低。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于合成音频的无声标点预测系统，通过结合声学和文本特征实现设备端高效预测。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖昂贵的人类录音数据，而合成数据可降低成本并解决数据获取困难问题，同时满足设备端低延迟需求。
AI.method: 采用多模态方法融合声学特征与基于哈希的ASR文本嵌入，使用准循环神经网络构建轻量级模型架构。
AI.result: 合成数据训练模型在无声标点预测任务中超越人类音频训练模型，且保持模型体积小、延迟低的优势。
AI.conclusion: 合成音频可有效替代人类录音实现高质量标点预测，为设备端自然语言处理提供新思路。

authors_text: Vaisakh Shaj,Philipp Becker,Dieter Buchler,Harit Pandya,Niels van Duijkeren,C. James Taylor,Marc Hanheide,Gerhard Neumann
title: Action-Conditional Recurrent Kalman Networks For Forward and Inverse Dynamics Learning
title_zh: 用于正向和逆向动态学习的动作条件循环卡尔曼网络
comment: Accepted to Conference On Robot Learning(CoRL), 2020
comments: Accepted to Conference On Robot Learning(CoRL), 2020
abstract: Estimating accurate forward and inverse dynamics models is a crucial component of model-based control for sophisticated robots such as robots driven by hydraulics, artificial muscles, or robots dealing with different contact situations. Analytic models to such processes are often unavailable or inaccurate due to complex hysteresis effects, unmodelled friction and stiction phenomena,and unknown effects during contact situations. A promising approach is to obtain spatio-temporal models in a data-driven way using recurrent neural networks, as they can overcome those issues. However, such models often do not meet accuracy demands sufficiently, degenerate in performance for the required high sampling frequencies and cannot provide uncertainty estimates. We adopt a recent probabilistic recurrent neural network architecture, called Re-current Kalman Networks (RKNs), to model learning by conditioning its transition dynamics on the control actions. RKNs outperform standard recurrent networks such as LSTMs on many state estimation tasks. Inspired by Kalman filters, the RKN provides an elegant way to achieve action conditioning within its recurrent cell by leveraging additive interactions between the current latent state and the action variables. We present two architectures, one for forward model learning and one for inverse model learning. Both architectures significantly outperform exist-ing model learning frameworks as well as analytical models in terms of prediction performance on a variety of real robot dynamics models.
summary: Estimating accurate forward and inverse dynamics models is a crucial component of model-based control for sophisticated robots such as robots driven by hydraulics, artificial muscles, or robots dealing with different contact situations. Analytic models to such processes are often unavailable or inaccurate due to complex hysteresis effects, unmodelled friction and stiction phenomena,and unknown effects during contact situations. A promising approach is to obtain spatio-temporal models in a data-driven way using recurrent neural networks, as they can overcome those issues. However, such models often do not meet accuracy demands sufficiently, degenerate in performance for the required high sampling frequencies and cannot provide uncertainty estimates. We adopt a recent probabilistic recurrent neural network architecture, called Re-current Kalman Networks (RKNs), to model learning by conditioning its transition dynamics on the control actions. RKNs outperform standard recurrent networks such as LSTMs on many state estimation tasks. Inspired by Kalman filters, the RKN provides an elegant way to achieve action conditioning within its recurrent cell by leveraging additive interactions between the current latent state and the action variables. We present two architectures, one for forward model learning and one for inverse model learning. Both architectures significantly outperform exist-ing model learning frameworks as well as analytical models in terms of prediction performance on a variety of real robot dynamics models.
abstract_zh: 估计精确的正向和逆向动力学模型是复杂机器人（例如液压驱动的机器人、人造肌肉或处理不同接触情况的机器人）基于模型控制的重要组成部分。由于复杂的滞后效应、未建模的摩擦和粘滞现象以及接触情况下的未知影响，此类过程的分析模型通常不可用或不准确。一种有前途的方法是使用循环神经网络以数据驱动的方式获得时空模型，因为它们可以克服这些问题。然而，此类模型通常不能充分满足精度要求，在所需的高采样频率下性能会下降，并且无法提供不确定性估计。我们采用最近的概率循环神经网络架构，称为循环卡尔曼网络（RKN），通过根据控制动作调节其转换动态来对学习进行建模。在许多状态估计任务上，RKN 的性能优于 LSTM 等标准循环网络。受卡尔曼滤波器的启发，RKN 提供了一种优雅的方法，通过利用当前潜在状态和动作变量之间的附加相互作用，在其循环单元内实现动作调节。我们提出了两种架构，一种用于正向模型学习，一种用于逆向模型学习。在各种真实机器人动力学模型的预测性能方面，两种架构都显着优于现有的模型学习框架和分析模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于动作条件的循环卡尔曼网络（RKNs），用于学习复杂机器人的前向和逆向动力学模型。
AI.motivation: 传统分析模型因滞后效应、摩擦和接触情况未知等因素难以准确建模复杂机器人动力学，而现有数据驱动方法在精度、高频采样和不确定性估计上存在不足。
AI.method: 采用概率循环神经网络架构RKNs，通过将控制动作作为条件输入循环单元，利用卡尔曼滤波原理实现状态与动作的加性交互，设计前向和逆向两种模型架构。
AI.result: 在多种实际机器人动力学任务中，RKNs架构在预测性能上显著优于现有模型学习框架及分析模型。
AI.conclusion: RKNs通过动作条件建模和不确定性估计，为复杂机器人提供了更精确的动力学建模方法，适用于基于模型的控制场景。

result: 在多种实际机器人动力学任务中，RKNs架构在预测性能上显著优于现有模型学习框架及分析模型。
conclusion: RKNs通过动作条件建模和不确定性估计，为复杂机器人提供了更精确的动力学建模方法，适用于基于模型的控制场景。
search_text: Action-Conditional Recurrent Kalman Networks For Forward and Inverse Dynamics Learning 用于正向和逆向动态学习的动作条件循环卡尔曼网络 Estimating accurate forward and inverse dynamics models is a crucial component of model-based control for sophisticated robots such as robots driven by hydraulics, artificial muscles, or robots dealing with different contact situations. Analytic models to such processes are often unavailable or inaccurate due to complex hysteresis effects, unmodelled friction and stiction phenomena,and unknown effects during contact situations. A promising approach is to obtain spatio-temporal models in a data-driven way using recurrent neural networks, as they can overcome those issues. However, such models often do not meet accuracy demands sufficiently, degenerate in performance for the required high sampling frequencies and cannot provide uncertainty estimates. We adopt a recent probabilistic recurrent neural network architecture, called Re-current Kalman Networks (RKNs), to model learning by conditioning its transition dynamics on the control actions. RKNs outperform standard recurrent networks such as LSTMs on many state estimation tasks. Inspired by Kalman filters, the RKN provides an elegant way to achieve action conditioning within its recurrent cell by leveraging additive interactions between the current latent state and the action variables. We present two architectures, one for forward model learning and one for inverse model learning. Both architectures significantly outperform exist-ing model learning frameworks as well as analytical models in terms of prediction performance on a variety of real robot dynamics models. 估计精确的正向和逆向动力学模型是复杂机器人（例如液压驱动的机器人、人造肌肉或处理不同接触情况的机器人）基于模型控制的重要组成部分。由于复杂的滞后效应、未建模的摩擦和粘滞现象以及接触情况下的未知影响，此类过程的分析模型通常不可用或不准确。一种有前途的方法是使用循环神经网络以数据驱动的方式获得时空模型，因为它们可以克服这些问题。然而，此类模型通常不能充分满足精度要求，在所需的高采样频率下性能会下降，并且无法提供不确定性估计。我们采用最近的概率循环神经网络架构，称为循环卡尔曼网络（RKN），通过根据控制动作调节其转换动态来对学习进行建模。在许多状态估计任务上，RKN 的性能优于 LSTM 等标准循环网络。受卡尔曼滤波器的启发，RKN 提供了一种优雅的方法，通过利用当前潜在状态和动作变量之间的附加相互作用，在其循环单元内实现动作调节。我们提出了两种架构，一种用于正向模型学习，一种用于逆向模型学习。在各种真实机器人动力学模型的预测性能方面，两种架构都显着优于现有的模型学习框架和分析模型。 本文提出基于动作条件的循环卡尔曼网络（RKNs），用于学习复杂机器人的前向和逆向动力学模型。 Vaisakh Shaj,Philipp Becker,Dieter Buchler,Harit Pandya,Niels van Duijkeren,C. James Taylor,Marc Hanheide,Gerhard Neumann cs.RO,cs.LG

authors_text: Mathias Seuret,Anguelos Nicolaou,Dominique Stutzmann,Andreas Maier,Vincent Christlein
title: ICFHR 2020 Competition on Image Retrieval for Historical Handwritten Fragments
title_zh: ICFHR 2020历史手写片段图像检索竞赛
abstract: This competition succeeds upon a line of competitions for writer and style analysis of historical document images. In particular, we investigate the performance of large-scale retrieval of historical document fragments in terms of style and writer identification. The analysis of historic fragments is a difficult challenge commonly solved by trained humanists. In comparison to previous competitions, we make the results more meaningful by addressing the issue of sample granularity and moving from writer to page fragment retrieval. The two approaches, style and author identification, provide information on what kind of information each method makes better use of and indirectly contribute to the interpretability of the participating method. Therefore, we created a large dataset consisting of more than 120 000 fragments. Although the most teams submitted methods based on convolutional neural networks, the winning entry achieves an mAP below 40%.
summary: This competition succeeds upon a line of competitions for writer and style analysis of historical document images. In particular, we investigate the performance of large-scale retrieval of historical document fragments in terms of style and writer identification. The analysis of historic fragments is a difficult challenge commonly solved by trained humanists. In comparison to previous competitions, we make the results more meaningful by addressing the issue of sample granularity and moving from writer to page fragment retrieval. The two approaches, style and author identification, provide information on what kind of information each method makes better use of and indirectly contribute to the interpretability of the participating method. Therefore, we created a large dataset consisting of more than 120 000 fragments. Although the most teams submitted methods based on convolutional neural networks, the winning entry achieves an mAP below 40%.
abstract_zh: 本次比赛在一系列针对历史文献图像的作家和风格分析的比赛中取得了成功。特别是，我们研究了大规模检索历史文档片段在风格和作者识别方面的性能。对历史片段的分析是训练有素的人文主义者通常要解决的一项艰巨挑战。与之前的比赛相比，我们通过解决样本粒度问题并从作者转向页面片段检索，使结果更有意义。风格和作者识别这两种方法提供了有关每种方法更好地利用哪种信息的信息，并间接有助于参与方法的可解释性。因此，我们创建了一个包含超过 120 000 个片段的大型数据集。尽管大多数团队提交了基于卷积神经网络的方法，但获胜作品的 mAP 低于 40%。

AI.tldr: 该论文介绍了ICFHR 2020竞赛，旨在评估历史手写碎片图像在风格和作者识别方面的检索性能。
AI.motivation: 历史文档碎片分析通常依赖人工，竞赛通过解决样本粒度问题并转向页面碎片检索，提升方法的可解释性和实际意义。
AI.method: 构建包含12万+碎片的大规模数据集，参赛者主要采用卷积神经网络（CNN）进行图像检索任务。
AI.result: 多数团队使用CNN，但冠军方法的平均精度均值（mAP）低于40%。
AI.conclusion: 当前方法在历史手写碎片检索任务中表现有限，需探索更有效的模型或特征利用方式。

authors_text: Moumita Choudhury,Amit Sarker,Md. Mosaddek Khan,William Yeoh
title: A Particle Swarm Inspired Approach for Continuous Distributed Constraint Optimization Problems
title_zh: 连续分布式约束优化问题的粒子群启发方法
abstract: Distributed Constraint Optimization Problems (DCOPs) are a widely studied framework for coordinating interactions in cooperative multi-agent systems. In classical DCOPs, variables owned by agents are assumed to be discrete. However, in many applications, such as target tracking or sleep scheduling in sensor networks, continuous-valued variables are more suitable than discrete ones. To better model such applications, researchers have proposed Continuous DCOPs (C-DCOPs), an extension of DCOPs, that can explicitly model problems with continuous variables. The state-of-the-art approaches for solving C-DCOPs experience either onerous memory or computation overhead and unsuitable for non-differentiable optimization problems. To address this issue, we propose a new C-DCOP algorithm, namely Particle Swarm Optimization Based C-DCOP (PCD), which is inspired by Particle Swarm Optimization (PSO), a well-known centralized population-based approach for solving continuous optimization problems. In recent years, population-based algorithms have gained significant attention in classical DCOPs due to their ability in producing high-quality solutions. Nonetheless, to the best of our knowledge, this class of algorithms has not been utilized to solve C-DCOPs and there has been no work evaluating the potential of PSO in solving classical DCOPs or C-DCOPs. In light of this observation, we adapted PSO, a centralized algorithm, to solve C-DCOPs in a decentralized manner. The resulting PCD algorithm not only produces good-quality solutions but also finds solutions without any requirement for derivative calculations. Moreover, we design a crossover operator that can be used by PCD to further improve the quality of solutions found. Finally, we theoretically prove that PCD is an anytime algorithm and empirically evaluate PCD against the state-of-the-art C-DCOP algorithms in a wide variety of benchmarks.
summary: Distributed Constraint Optimization Problems (DCOPs) are a widely studied framework for coordinating interactions in cooperative multi-agent systems. In classical DCOPs, variables owned by agents are assumed to be discrete. However, in many applications, such as target tracking or sleep scheduling in sensor networks, continuous-valued variables are more suitable than discrete ones. To better model such applications, researchers have proposed Continuous DCOPs (C-DCOPs), an extension of DCOPs, that can explicitly model problems with continuous variables. The state-of-the-art approaches for solving C-DCOPs experience either onerous memory or computation overhead and unsuitable for non-differentiable optimization problems. To address this issue, we propose a new C-DCOP algorithm, namely Particle Swarm Optimization Based C-DCOP (PCD), which is inspired by Particle Swarm Optimization (PSO), a well-known centralized population-based approach for solving continuous optimization problems. In recent years, population-based algorithms have gained significant attention in classical DCOPs due to their ability in producing high-quality solutions. Nonetheless, to the best of our knowledge, this class of algorithms has not been utilized to solve C-DCOPs and there has been no work evaluating the potential of PSO in solving classical DCOPs or C-DCOPs. In light of this observation, we adapted PSO, a centralized algorithm, to solve C-DCOPs in a decentralized manner. The resulting PCD algorithm not only produces good-quality solutions but also finds solutions without any requirement for derivative calculations. Moreover, we design a crossover operator that can be used by PCD to further improve the quality of solutions found. Finally, we theoretically prove that PCD is an anytime algorithm and empirically evaluate PCD against the state-of-the-art C-DCOP algorithms in a wide variety of benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 分布式约束优化问题（DCOP）是一个广泛研究的框架，用于协调协作多智能体系统中的交互。在经典的 DCOP 中，代理所拥有的变量被假定为离散的。然而，在许多应用中，例如传感器网络中的目标跟踪或睡眠调度，连续值变量比离散变量更合适。为了更好地对此类应用进行建模，研究人员提出了连续 DCOP（C-DCOP），它是 DCOP 的扩展，可以显式地对连续变量的问题进行建模。解决 C-DCOP 的最先进方法会经历繁重的内存或计算开销，并且不适合不可微的优化问题。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新的 C-DCOP 算法，即基于粒子群优化的 C-DCOP（PCD），该算法受到粒子群优化（PSO）的启发，粒子群优化是一种著名的集中式基于群体的解决连续优化问题的方法。近年来，基于群体的算法因其产生高质量解决方案的能力而在经典 DCOP 中获得了极大的关注。尽管如此，据我们所知，此类算法尚未用于解决 C-DCOP，也没有评估 PSO 在解决经典 DCOP 或 C-DCOP 方面的潜力的工作。鉴于这一观察结果，我们采用了 PSO（一种集中式算法）来以分散的方式解决 C-DCOP。由此产生的 PCD 算法不仅可以产生高质量的解，而且​​可以在不需要导数计算的情况下找到解。此外，我们设计了一个交叉算子，PCD 可以使用它来进一步提高所找到的解决方案的质量。最后，我们从理论上证明 PCD 是一种随时算法，并在各种基准测试中根据最先进的 C-DCOP 算法对 PCD 进行实证评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于粒子群优化（PSO）的分布式连续约束优化问题（C-DCOP）求解算法PCD，以解决现有方法在内存、计算开销及非可微问题上的不足。
AI.motivation: 传统C-DCOP求解方法存在内存或计算开销过大、无法处理非可微优化问题的缺陷，且粒子群等群体算法尚未被应用于C-DCOP领域。
AI.method: 将集中式PSO算法改编为分布式版本以适应C-DCOP，并设计交叉算子提升解质量，理论证明PCD为anytime算法，通过基准测试验证效果。
AI.result: PCD无需导数计算即可获得高质量解，在多种基准测试中优于现有C-DCOP算法，交叉算子进一步提升了解的质量。
AI.conclusion: PCD算法有效解决了C-DCOP的挑战，验证了PSO在该领域的潜力，交叉算子设计为未来研究提供了新方向。

search_text: A Particle Swarm Inspired Approach for Continuous Distributed Constraint Optimization Problems 连续分布式约束优化问题的粒子群启发方法 Distributed Constraint Optimization Problems (DCOPs) are a widely studied framework for coordinating interactions in cooperative multi-agent systems. In classical DCOPs, variables owned by agents are assumed to be discrete. However, in many applications, such as target tracking or sleep scheduling in sensor networks, continuous-valued variables are more suitable than discrete ones. To better model such applications, researchers have proposed Continuous DCOPs (C-DCOPs), an extension of DCOPs, that can explicitly model problems with continuous variables. The state-of-the-art approaches for solving C-DCOPs experience either onerous memory or computation overhead and unsuitable for non-differentiable optimization problems. To address this issue, we propose a new C-DCOP algorithm, namely Particle Swarm Optimization Based C-DCOP (PCD), which is inspired by Particle Swarm Optimization (PSO), a well-known centralized population-based approach for solving continuous optimization problems. In recent years, population-based algorithms have gained significant attention in classical DCOPs due to their ability in producing high-quality solutions. Nonetheless, to the best of our knowledge, this class of algorithms has not been utilized to solve C-DCOPs and there has been no work evaluating the potential of PSO in solving classical DCOPs or C-DCOPs. In light of this observation, we adapted PSO, a centralized algorithm, to solve C-DCOPs in a decentralized manner. The resulting PCD algorithm not only produces good-quality solutions but also finds solutions without any requirement for derivative calculations. Moreover, we design a crossover operator that can be used by PCD to further improve the quality of solutions found. Finally, we theoretically prove that PCD is an anytime algorithm and empirically evaluate PCD against the state-of-the-art C-DCOP algorithms in a wide variety of benchmarks. 分布式约束优化问题（DCOP）是一个广泛研究的框架，用于协调协作多智能体系统中的交互。在经典的 DCOP 中，代理所拥有的变量被假定为离散的。然而，在许多应用中，例如传感器网络中的目标跟踪或睡眠调度，连续值变量比离散变量更合适。为了更好地对此类应用进行建模，研究人员提出了连续 DCOP（C-DCOP），它是 DCOP 的扩展，可以显式地对连续变量的问题进行建模。解决 C-DCOP 的最先进方法会经历繁重的内存或计算开销，并且不适合不可微的优化问题。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新的 C-DCOP 算法，即基于粒子群优化的 C-DCOP（PCD），该算法受到粒子群优化（PSO）的启发，粒子群优化是一种著名的集中式基于群体的解决连续优化问题的方法。近年来，基于群体的算法因其产生高质量解决方案的能力而在经典 DCOP 中获得了极大的关注。尽管如此，据我们所知，此类算法尚未用于解决 C-DCOP，也没有评估 PSO 在解决经典 DCOP 或 C-DCOP 方面的潜力的工作。鉴于这一观察结果，我们采用了 PSO（一种集中式算法）来以分散的方式解决 C-DCOP。由此产生的 PCD 算法不仅可以产生高质量的解，而且​​可以在不需要导数计算的情况下找到解。此外，我们设计了一个交叉算子，PCD 可以使用它来进一步提高所找到的解决方案的质量。最后，我们从理论上证明 PCD 是一种随时算法，并在各种基准测试中根据最先进的 C-DCOP 算法对 PCD 进行实证评估。 本文提出了一种基于粒子群优化（PSO）的分布式连续约束优化问题（C-DCOP）求解算法PCD，以解决现有方法在内存、计算开销及非可微问题上的不足。 Moumita Choudhury,Amit Sarker,Md. Mosaddek Khan,William Yeoh cs.MA,cs.AI

authors_text: Bruno Brito,Boaz Floor,Laura Ferranti,Javier Alonso-Mora
title: Model Predictive Contouring Control for Collision Avoidance in Unstructured Dynamic Environments
title_zh: 非结构化动态环境中避免碰撞的模型预测轮廓控制
abstract: This paper presents a method for local motion planning in unstructured environments with static and moving obstacles, such as humans. Given a reference path and speed, our optimization-based receding-horizon approach computes a local trajectory that minimizes the tracking error while avoiding obstacles. We build on nonlinear model-predictive contouring control (MPCC) and extend it to incorporate a static map by computing, online, a set of convex regions in free space. We model moving obstacles as ellipsoids and provide a correct bound to approximate the collision region, given by the Minkowsky sum of an ellipse and a circle. Our framework is agnostic to the robot model. We present experimental results with a mobile robot navigating in indoor environments populated with humans. Our method is executed fully onboard without the need of external support and can be applied to other robot morphologies such as autonomous cars.
summary: This paper presents a method for local motion planning in unstructured environments with static and moving obstacles, such as humans. Given a reference path and speed, our optimization-based receding-horizon approach computes a local trajectory that minimizes the tracking error while avoiding obstacles. We build on nonlinear model-predictive contouring control (MPCC) and extend it to incorporate a static map by computing, online, a set of convex regions in free space. We model moving obstacles as ellipsoids and provide a correct bound to approximate the collision region, given by the Minkowsky sum of an ellipse and a circle. Our framework is agnostic to the robot model. We present experimental results with a mobile robot navigating in indoor environments populated with humans. Our method is executed fully onboard without the need of external support and can be applied to other robot morphologies such as autonomous cars.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种在具有静态和移动障碍物（例如人类）的非结构化环境中进行局部运动规划的方法。给定参考路径和速度，我们基于优化的后退地平线方法计算本地轨迹，在避开障碍物的同时最大限度地减少跟踪误差。我们以非线性模型预测轮廓控制（MPCC）为基础，并将其扩展为通过在线计算自由空间中的一组凸区域来合并静态地图。我们将移动障碍物建模为椭圆体，并提供正确的边界来近似碰撞区域，由椭圆和圆的 Minkowsky 和给出。我们的框架与机器人模型无关。我们展示了移动机器人在有人居住的室内环境中导航的实验结果。我们的方法完全在船上执行，无需外部支持，并且可以应用于其他机器人形态，例如自动驾驶汽车。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于模型预测轮廓控制（MPCC）的局部运动规划方法，用于在存在静态和动态障碍物的非结构化环境中实现避障与路径跟踪。
AI.motivation: 在非结构化动态环境中（如室内有人类活动的场景），机器人需同时完成路径跟踪与实时避障，这对传统方法提出挑战，尤其需要处理静态地图与动态障碍物的混合场景。
AI.method: 扩展非线性MPCC框架，结合静态地图在线生成自由空间凸区域；将移动障碍物建模为椭球体，通过椭圆与圆的Minkowski和近似碰撞区域，无需依赖特定机器人模型。
AI.result: 在室内环境中验证了方法的有效性，移动机器人可自主避障并跟踪参考路径，算法完全在板载计算，适用于不同形态机器人（如自动驾驶汽车）。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过融合静态地图与动态障碍物建模，在非结构化环境中实现了高效避障与路径跟踪，展示了对多种机器人平台的适应性与实用价值。

authors_text: Voot Tangkaratt,Nontawat Charoenphakdee,Masashi Sugiyama
title: Robust Imitation Learning from Noisy Demonstrations
title_zh: 从嘈杂的演示中进行稳健的模仿学习
abstract: Robust learning from noisy demonstrations is a practical but highly challenging problem in imitation learning. In this paper, we first theoretically show that robust imitation learning can be achieved by optimizing a classification risk with a symmetric loss. Based on this theoretical finding, we then propose a new imitation learning method that optimizes the classification risk by effectively combining pseudo-labeling with co-training. Unlike existing methods, our method does not require additional labels or strict assumptions about noise distributions. Experimental results on continuous-control benchmarks show that our method is more robust compared to state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Robust learning from noisy demonstrations is a practical but highly challenging problem in imitation learning. In this paper, we first theoretically show that robust imitation learning can be achieved by optimizing a classification risk with a symmetric loss. Based on this theoretical finding, we then propose a new imitation learning method that optimizes the classification risk by effectively combining pseudo-labeling with co-training. Unlike existing methods, our method does not require additional labels or strict assumptions about noise distributions. Experimental results on continuous-control benchmarks show that our method is more robust compared to state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 从嘈杂的演示中进行鲁棒学习是模仿学习中一个实用但极具挑战性的问题。在本文中，我们首先从理论上证明，可以通过优化具有对称损失的分类风险来实现鲁棒的模仿学习。基于这一理论发现，我们提出了一种新的模仿学习方法，通过有效地将伪标签与协同训练相结合来优化分类风险。与现有方法不同，我们的方法不需要额外的标签或关于噪声分布的严格假设。连续控制基准的实验结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，我们的方法更加稳健。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决在存在噪声示范的情况下实现鲁棒的模仿学习问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常需要额外标签或对噪声分布有严格假设，限制了其应用，因此需要一种更鲁棒且无需额外信息的方法。
AI.method: 通过优化对称损失的分类风险，结合伪标签与协同训练，无需额外标签或噪声分布假设。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在连续控制基准测试中比现有最先进方法更鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出了一种无需额外标签和噪声分布假设的鲁棒模仿学习方法，并通过实验验证了其有效性。

authors_text: Xuedan Zou
title: PIXEL: Interactive Light System Design Based On Simple Gesture Recognition
title_zh: PIXEL：基于简单手势识别的交互灯光系统设计
abstract: In this project, by utilizing the real-time human gestures captured by Kinect, we attempted to provide a self-made interactive light system PIXEL for interacting with the visitor to play a simple SNAKE game. By paralleling the low power single color LED lights and lighting up them separately or together, we provided a big LED board with multiple colors while at the time safe enough without using high tension electricity. We analysed the factors that influence the final visual effect of the light pixel, the novel gestures that can be recognized well by current computer vision algorithms and did several experiments to decide the final interactive method. We also believe this project provides a way to help people reconsider the relationship between the old and the new and the possibility to bring old things reborn by the new technologies.
summary: In this project, by utilizing the real-time human gestures captured by Kinect, we attempted to provide a self-made interactive light system PIXEL for interacting with the visitor to play a simple SNAKE game. By paralleling the low power single color LED lights and lighting up them separately or together, we provided a big LED board with multiple colors while at the time safe enough without using high tension electricity. We analysed the factors that influence the final visual effect of the light pixel, the novel gestures that can be recognized well by current computer vision algorithms and did several experiments to decide the final interactive method. We also believe this project provides a way to help people reconsider the relationship between the old and the new and the possibility to bring old things reborn by the new technologies.
abstract_zh: 在这个项目中，我们尝试利用Kinect捕捉到的实时人体手势，提供一个自制的交互式灯光系统PIXEL，用于与参观者互动，玩一个简单的贪吃蛇游戏。通过将低功率单色LED灯并联并单独或一起点亮，我们提供了一个具有多种颜色的大LED板，同时足够安全，无需使用高压电。我们分析了影响光像素最终视觉效果的因素、当前计算机视觉算法可以很好识别的新手势，并进行了多次实验来确定最终的交互方法。我们还相信这个项目提供了一种方式来帮助人们重新思考新旧关系以及新技术让旧事物重生的可能性。

AI.tldr: 设计基于简单手势识别的互动灯光系统PIXEL，通过Kinect捕捉手势实现贪吃蛇游戏互动。
AI.motivation: 探索新技术与旧设备结合的可能性，通过安全且低成本的LED灯光系统实现人机交互创新。
AI.method: 利用Kinect实时捕捉手势，采用低电压单色LED并联技术构建多色LED板，分析视觉效果影响因素并实验确定交互方式。
AI.result: 成功开发出安全、多色LED互动系统，实现手势控制贪吃蛇游戏，验证了新旧技术融合的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 项目展示了通过新技术赋予旧设备新生的潜力，为未来人机交互与创意应用提供了新思路。

search_text: PIXEL: Interactive Light System Design Based On Simple Gesture Recognition PIXEL：基于简单手势识别的交互灯光系统设计 In this project, by utilizing the real-time human gestures captured by Kinect, we attempted to provide a self-made interactive light system PIXEL for interacting with the visitor to play a simple SNAKE game. By paralleling the low power single color LED lights and lighting up them separately or together, we provided a big LED board with multiple colors while at the time safe enough without using high tension electricity. We analysed the factors that influence the final visual effect of the light pixel, the novel gestures that can be recognized well by current computer vision algorithms and did several experiments to decide the final interactive method. We also believe this project provides a way to help people reconsider the relationship between the old and the new and the possibility to bring old things reborn by the new technologies. 在这个项目中，我们尝试利用Kinect捕捉到的实时人体手势，提供一个自制的交互式灯光系统PIXEL，用于与参观者互动，玩一个简单的贪吃蛇游戏。通过将低功率单色LED灯并联并单独或一起点亮，我们提供了一个具有多种颜色的大LED板，同时足够安全，无需使用高压电。我们分析了影响光像素最终视觉效果的因素、当前计算机视觉算法可以很好识别的新手势，并进行了多次实验来确定最终的交互方法。我们还相信这个项目提供了一种方式来帮助人们重新思考新旧关系以及新技术让旧事物重生的可能性。 设计基于简单手势识别的互动灯光系统PIXEL，通过Kinect捕捉手势实现贪吃蛇游戏互动。 Xuedan Zou cs.HC

authors_text: Alberto Cannavò,Davide Calandra,F. Gabriele Pratticò,Valentina Gatteschi,Fabrizio Lamberti
title: An Evaluation Testbed for Locomotion in Virtual Reality
title_zh: 虚拟现实运动评估测试平台
comment: This paper is accepted for inclusion in a future issue of IEEE Transactions on Visualization and Computer Graphics (TVCG). Copyright IEEE 2020
comments: This paper is accepted for inclusion in a future issue of IEEE Transactions on Visualization and Computer Graphics (TVCG). Copyright IEEE 2020
abstract: A common operation performed in Virtual Reality (VR) environments is locomotion. Although real walking can represent a natural and intuitive way to manage displacements in such environments, its use is generally limited by the size of the area tracked by the VR system (typically, the size of a room) or requires expensive technologies to cover particularly extended settings. A number of approaches have been proposed to enable effective explorations in VR, each characterized by different hardware requirements and costs, and capable to provide different levels of usability and performance. However, the lack of a well-defined methodology for assessing and comparing available approaches makes it difficult to identify, among the various alternatives, the best solutions for selected application domains. To deal with this issue, this paper introduces a novel evaluation testbed which, by building on the outcomes of many separate works reported in the literature, aims to support a comprehensive analysis of the considered design space. An experimental protocol for collecting objective and subjective measures is proposed, together with a scoring system able to rank locomotion approaches based on a weighted set of requirements. Testbed usage is illustrated in a use case requesting to select the technique to adopt in a given application scenario.

Although real walking can represent a natural and intuitive way to manage displacements in such environments, its use is generally limited by the size of the area tracked by the VR system (typically, the size of a room) or requires expensive technologies to cover particularly extended settings. A number of approaches have been proposed to enable effective explorations in VR, each characterized by different hardware requirements and costs, and capable to provide different levels of usability and performance. However, the lack of a well-defined methodology for assessing and comparing available approaches makes it difficult to identify, among the various alternatives, the best solutions for selected application domains. To deal with this issue, this paper introduces a novel evaluation testbed which, by building on the outcomes of many separate works reported in the literature, aims to support a comprehensive analysis of the considered design space. An experimental protocol for collecting objective and subjective measures is proposed, together with a scoring system able to rank locomotion approaches based on a weighted set of requirements. Testbed usage is illustrated in a use case requesting to select the technique to adopt in a given application scenario.
abstract_zh: 虚拟现实 (VR) 环境中执行的常见操作是移动。尽管真实行走可以代表一种自然且直观的方式来管理此类环境中的位移，但其使用通常受到 VR 系统跟踪区域大小（通常是房间大小）的限制，或者需要昂贵的技术来覆盖特别扩展的设置。为了实现虚拟现实的有效探索，人们提出了多种方法，每种方法都有不同的硬件要求和成本，并且能够提供不同级别的可用性和性能。然而，由于缺乏用于评估和比较可用方法的明确定义的方法，因此很难在各种替代方案中确定针对选定应用领域的最佳解决方案。为了解决这个问题，本文引入了一种新颖的评估测试平台，该测试平台以文献中报告的许多单独工作的结果为基础，旨在支持对所考虑的设计空间的全面分析。提出了一种用于收集客观和主观测量的实验协议，以及能够根据一组加权要求对运动方法进行排名的评分系统。测试台的使用在请求选择在给定应用场景中采用的技术的用例中进行了说明。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于评估虚拟现实（VR）中移动技术的测试平台，以解决现有方法缺乏统一评估标准的问题。
AI.motivation: VR环境中移动方式多样，但缺乏有效的方法来比较不同技术的优劣，导致难以根据具体应用场景选择最佳方案。
AI.method: 构建综合评估测试平台，结合文献成果，设计实验协议收集客观与主观数据，并通过加权需求评分系统对移动技术进行排名。
AI.result: 测试平台成功应用于具体场景，验证了其在选择适合特定应用的移动技术中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该测试平台为VR移动技术的系统评估和比较提供了标准化方法，有助于优化应用场景的技术选型。

authors_text: Matthew Ashman,Jonathan So,Will Tebbutt,Vincent Fortuin,Michael Pearce,Richard E. Turner
title: Sparse Gaussian Process Variational Autoencoders
title_zh: 稀疏高斯过程变分自动编码器
abstract: Large, multi-dimensional spatio-temporal datasets are omnipresent in modern science and engineering. An effective framework for handling such data are Gaussian process deep generative models (GP-DGMs), which employ GP priors over the latent variables of DGMs. Existing approaches for performing inference in GP-DGMs do not support sparse GP approximations based on inducing points, which are essential for the computational efficiency of GPs, nor do they handle missing data -- a natural occurrence in many spatio-temporal datasets -- in a principled manner. We address these shortcomings with the development of the sparse Gaussian process variational autoencoder (SGP-VAE), characterised by the use of partial inference networks for parameterising sparse GP approximations. Leveraging the benefits of amortised variational inference, the SGP-VAE enables inference in multi-output sparse GPs on previously unobserved data with no additional training. The SGP-VAE is evaluated in a variety of experiments where it outperforms alternative approaches including multi-output GPs and structured VAEs.
summary: Large, multi-dimensional spatio-temporal datasets are omnipresent in modern science and engineering. An effective framework for handling such data are Gaussian process deep generative models (GP-DGMs), which employ GP priors over the latent variables of DGMs. Existing approaches for performing inference in GP-DGMs do not support sparse GP approximations based on inducing points, which are essential for the computational efficiency of GPs, nor do they handle missing data -- a natural occurrence in many spatio-temporal datasets -- in a principled manner. We address these shortcomings with the development of the sparse Gaussian process variational autoencoder (SGP-VAE), characterised by the use of partial inference networks for parameterising sparse GP approximations. Leveraging the benefits of amortised variational inference, the SGP-VAE enables inference in multi-output sparse GPs on previously unobserved data with no additional training. The SGP-VAE is evaluated in a variety of experiments where it outperforms alternative approaches including multi-output GPs and structured VAEs.
abstract_zh: 大型、多维时空数据集在现代科学和工程中无处不在。处理此类数据的有效框架是高斯过程深度生成模型（GP-DGM），它在 DGM 的潜在变量上采用 GP 先验。在 GP-DGM 中执行推理的现有方法不支持基于归纳点的稀疏 GP 近似（这对于 GP 的计算效率至关重要），也不以原则性的方式处理缺失数据（许多时空数据集中自然发生的情况）。我们通过开发稀疏高斯过程变分自动编码器（SGP-VAE）来解决这些缺点，其特点是使用部分推理网络来参数化稀疏 GP 近似。利用摊销变分推理的优势，SGP-VAE 可以在多输出稀疏 GP 中对先前未观察到的数据进行推理，而无需进行额外的训练。 SGP-VAE 在各种实验中进行了评估，其性能优于包括多输出 GP 和结构化 VAE 在内的替代方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种稀疏高斯过程变分自编码器（SGP-VAE），用于高效处理大规模多维时空数据中的缺失值问题。
AI.motivation: 现有高斯过程深度生成模型（GP-DGMs）无法有效处理大规模数据的计算效率问题，且缺乏对缺失数据的系统性处理方法。
AI.method: 通过引入部分推理网络参数化稀疏高斯过程近似，结合变分推理实现对未观测数据的高效推断，无需额外训练。
AI.result: 在多种实验场景中，SGP-VAE的表现优于多输出高斯过程和结构化变分自编码器等现有方法。
AI.conclusion: SGP-VAE有效解决了GP-DGMs在稀疏近似和缺失数据处理上的局限性，为大规模时空数据分析提供了新方法。

authors_text: Chang Yao,Jingyu Tang,Menghan Hu,Yue Wu,Wenyi Guo,Qingli Li,Xiao-Ping Zhang
title: Claw U-Net: A Unet-based Network with Deep Feature Concatenation for Scleral Blood Vessel Segmentation
title_zh: Claw U-Net：基于 Unet 的具有深度特征串联的巩膜血管分割网络
abstract: Sturge-Weber syndrome (SWS) is a vascular malformation disease, and it may cause blindness if the patient's condition is severe. Clinical results show that SWS can be divided into two types based on the characteristics of scleral blood vessels. Therefore, how to accurately segment scleral blood vessels has become a significant problem in computer-aided diagnosis. In this research, we propose to continuously upsample the bottom layer's feature maps to preserve image details, and design a novel Claw UNet based on UNet for scleral blood vessel segmentation. Specifically, the residual structure is used to increase the number of network layers in the feature extraction stage to learn deeper features. In the decoding stage, by fusing the features of the encoding, upsampling, and decoding parts, Claw UNet can achieve effective segmentation in the fine-grained regions of scleral blood vessels. To effectively extract small blood vessels, we use the attention mechanism to calculate the attention coefficient of each position in images. Claw UNet outperforms other UNet-based networks on scleral blood vessel image dataset.
summary: Sturge-Weber syndrome (SWS) is a vascular malformation disease, and it may cause blindness if the patient's condition is severe. Clinical results show that SWS can be divided into two types based on the characteristics of scleral blood vessels. Therefore, how to accurately segment scleral blood vessels has become a significant problem in computer-aided diagnosis. In this research, we propose to continuously upsample the bottom layer's feature maps to preserve image details, and design a novel Claw UNet based on UNet for scleral blood vessel segmentation. Specifically, the residual structure is used to increase the number of network layers in the feature extraction stage to learn deeper features. In the decoding stage, by fusing the features of the encoding, upsampling, and decoding parts, Claw UNet can achieve effective segmentation in the fine-grained regions of scleral blood vessels. To effectively extract small blood vessels, we use the attention mechanism to calculate the attention coefficient of each position in images. Claw UNet outperforms other UNet-based networks on scleral blood vessel image dataset.
abstract_zh: 斯特奇-韦伯综合征（SWS）是一种血管畸形疾病，病情严重的话可能会导致失明。临床结果显示，根据巩膜血管的特点，SWS可分为两种类型。因此，如何准确分割巩膜血管已成为计算机辅助诊断中的一个重要问题。在本研究中，我们提出对底层特征图进行连续上采样以保留图像细节，并基于UNet设计一种新颖的Claw UNet用于巩膜血管分割。具体来说，残差结构用于在特征提取阶段增加网络层数，以学习更深层次的特征。在解码阶段，通过融合编码、上采样和解码部分的特征，Claw UNet可以实现对巩膜血管细粒度区域的有效分割。为了有效地提取小血管，我们使用注意力机制来计算图像中每个位置的注意力系数。 Claw UNet 在巩膜血管图像数据集上优于其他基于 UNet 的网络。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于UNet的Claw U-Net网络，通过深度特征拼接和注意力机制，用于精确分割巩膜血管图像，以辅助诊断Sturge-Weber综合征。
AI.motivation: Sturge-Weber综合征（SWS）的严重病例可能导致失明，而巩膜血管特征是其分类的关键。现有方法在细粒度血管分割上存在不足，需提升分割精度以支持临床诊断。
AI.method: 设计Claw U-Net网络：1）使用残差结构加深特征提取层；2）通过上采样底层特征保留细节；3）融合编码器、上采样和解码器特征；4）引入注意力机制增强小血管区域的权重。
AI.result: Claw U-Net在巩膜血管数据集上优于其他UNet变体，实现了更精确的血管分割效果。
AI.conclusion: Claw U-Net通过多尺度特征融合与注意力机制，有效提升了巩膜血管分割的准确性，为SWS的计算机辅助诊断提供了可靠工具。

authors_text: Shivali Agarwal,Shubham Atreja,Vikas Agarwal
title: Extracting Procedural Knowledge from Technical Documents
title_zh: 从技术文档中提取程序知识
abstract: Procedures are an important knowledge component of documents that can be leveraged by cognitive assistants for automation, question-answering or driving a conversation. It is a challenging problem to parse big dense documents like product manuals, user guides to automatically understand which parts are talking about procedures and subsequently extract them. Most of the existing research has focused on extracting flows in given procedures or understanding the procedures in order to answer conceptual questions. Identifying and extracting multiple procedures automatically from documents of diverse formats remains a relatively less addressed problem. In this work, we cover some of this ground by -- 1) Providing insights on how structural and linguistic properties of documents can be grouped to define types of procedures, 2) Analyzing documents to extract the relevant linguistic and structural properties, and 3) Formulating procedure identification as a classification problem that leverages the features of the document derived from the above analysis. We first implemented and deployed unsupervised techniques which were used in different use cases. Based on the evaluation in different use cases, we figured out the weaknesses of the unsupervised approach. We then designed an improved version which was supervised. We demonstrate that our technique is effective in identifying procedures from big and complex documents alike by achieving accuracy of 89%.
summary: Procedures are an important knowledge component of documents that can be leveraged by cognitive assistants for automation, question-answering or driving a conversation. It is a challenging problem to parse big dense documents like product manuals, user guides to automatically understand which parts are talking about procedures and subsequently extract them. Most of the existing research has focused on extracting flows in given procedures or understanding the procedures in order to answer conceptual questions. Identifying and extracting multiple procedures automatically from documents of diverse formats remains a relatively less addressed problem. In this work, we cover some of this ground by -- 1) Providing insights on how structural and linguistic properties of documents can be grouped to define types of procedures, 2) Analyzing documents to extract the relevant linguistic and structural properties, and 3) Formulating procedure identification as a classification problem that leverages the features of the document derived from the above analysis. We first implemented and deployed unsupervised techniques which were used in different use cases. Based on the evaluation in different use cases, we figured out the weaknesses of the unsupervised approach. We then designed an improved version which was supervised. We demonstrate that our technique is effective in identifying procedures from big and complex documents alike by achieving accuracy of 89%.
abstract_zh: 程序是文档的重要知识组成部分，认知助手可以利用它来实现自动化、问答或推动对话。解析产品手册、用户指南等大而密集的文档以自动理解哪些部分正在讨论程序并随后提取它们是一个具有挑战性的问题。大多数现有研究都集中在提取给定程序中的流程或理解程序以回答概念性问题。从不同格式的文档中自动识别和提取多个过程仍然是一个相对较少解决的问题。在这项工作中，我们通过以下方式涵盖了其中一些内容：1) 提供有关如何对文档的结构和语言属性进行分组以定义过程类型的见解，2) 分析文档以提取相关的语言和结构属性，以及 3) 将过程识别表述为利用从上述分析得出的文档特征的分类问题。我们首先实现并部署了用于不同用例的无监督技术。根据不同用例的评估，我们找出了无监督方法的弱点。然后我们设计了一个改进版本并进行监督。我们证明，我们的技术能够有效地从大型且复杂的文档中识别程序，准确率达到 89%。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在从多种格式的技术文档中自动识别和提取多个过程知识。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注流程提取或回答概念性问题，但自动识别和提取不同格式文档中的多个过程仍存在不足。
AI.method: 通过分析文档结构和语言特征定义过程类型，提取相关属性并构建分类模型，先采用无监督方法后改进为监督方法。
AI.result: 在不同场景下实现89%的准确率，有效识别大型复杂文档中的过程。
AI.conclusion: 该方法解决了现有技术的不足，为认知助手提供了高效的过程提取方案。

authors_text: Zhongxiang Dai,Kian Hsiang Low,Patrick Jaillet
title: Federated Bayesian Optimization via Thompson Sampling
title_zh: 通过 Thompson 采样进行联合贝叶斯优化
comment: Accepted to 34th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2020), Extended version with proofs and additional experimental details and results, 25 pages
comments: Accepted to 34th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2020), Extended version with proofs and additional experimental details and results, 25 pages
abstract: Bayesian optimization (BO) is a prominent approach to optimizing expensive-to-evaluate black-box functions. The massive computational capability of edge devices such as mobile phones, coupled with privacy concerns, has led to a surging interest in federated learning (FL) which focuses on collaborative training of deep neural networks (DNNs) via first-order optimization techniques. However, some common machine learning tasks such as hyperparameter tuning of DNNs lack access to gradients and thus require zeroth-order/black-box optimization. This hints at the possibility of extending BO to the FL setting (FBO) for agents to collaborate in these black-box optimization tasks. This paper presents federated Thompson sampling (FTS) which overcomes a number of key challenges of FBO and FL in a principled way: We (a) use random Fourier features to approximate the Gaussian process surrogate model used in BO, which naturally produces the parameters to be exchanged between agents, (b) design FTS based on Thompson sampling, which significantly reduces the number of parameters to be exchanged, and (c) provide a theoretical convergence guarantee that is robust against heterogeneous agents, which is a major challenge in FL and FBO. We empirically demonstrate the effectiveness of FTS in terms of communication efficiency, computational efficiency, and practical performance.
summary: Bayesian optimization (BO) is a prominent approach to optimizing expensive-to-evaluate black-box functions. The massive computational capability of edge devices such as mobile phones, coupled with privacy concerns, has led to a surging interest in federated learning (FL) which focuses on collaborative training of deep neural networks (DNNs) via first-order optimization techniques. However, some common machine learning tasks such as hyperparameter tuning of DNNs lack access to gradients and thus require zeroth-order/black-box optimization. This hints at the possibility of extending BO to the FL setting (FBO) for agents to collaborate in these black-box optimization tasks. This paper presents federated Thompson sampling (FTS) which overcomes a number of key challenges of FBO and FL in a principled way: We (a) use random Fourier features to approximate the Gaussian process surrogate model used in BO, which naturally produces the parameters to be exchanged between agents, (b) design FTS based on Thompson sampling, which significantly reduces the number of parameters to be exchanged, and (c) provide a theoretical convergence guarantee that is robust against heterogeneous agents, which is a major challenge in FL and FBO. We empirically demonstrate the effectiveness of FTS in terms of communication efficiency, computational efficiency, and practical performance.
abstract_zh: 贝叶斯优化 (BO) 是优化评估成本高昂的黑盒函数的一种重要方法。移动电话等边缘设备的海量计算能力，加上隐私问题，引发了人们对联邦学习 (FL) 的兴趣激增，联邦学习专注于通过一阶优化技术对深度神经网络 (DNN) 进行协作训练。然而，一些常见的机器学习任务（例如 DNN 的超参数调整）无法访问梯度，因此需要零阶/黑盒优化。这暗示了将 BO 扩展到 FL 设置 (FBO) 的可能性，以便代理在这些黑盒优化任务中进行协作。本文提出了联合汤普森采样（FTS），它以原则性的方式克服了 FBO 和 FL 的许多关键挑战：我们（a）使用随机傅立叶特征来近似 BO 中使用的高斯过程代理模型，该模型自然地生成要在代理之间交换的参数，（b）基于 Thompson 采样设计 FTS，这显着减少了要交换的参数数量，以及（c）提供了对异构代理具有鲁棒性的理论收敛保证，这是 FL 和 FL 中的主要挑战固定基地运营基地。我们通过实证证明了 FTS 在通信效率、计算效率和实际性能方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种联邦贝叶斯优化方法（FTS），通过汤普森采样解决联邦学习中的黑盒优化问题。
AI.motivation: 传统联邦学习依赖梯度信息，但超参数调优等任务需黑盒优化。现有贝叶斯优化（BO）难以适应联邦学习的隐私和通信约束，需设计新型联邦优化框架。
AI.method: 采用随机傅里叶特征近似高斯过程模型，基于汤普森采样设计参数交换机制，并提供异构代理鲁棒的收敛性理论保证。
AI.result: 实验验证了FTS在通信效率、计算效率及实际性能上的有效性，尤其在参数交换量和收敛速度上优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: FTS通过理论分析与实证相结合，为联邦黑盒优化提供了可扩展且高效的解决方案，推动了联邦学习在超参数调优等场景的应用。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种联邦贝叶斯优化方法（FTS），通过汤普森采样解决联邦学习中的黑盒优化问题。
ai_content.motivation: 传统联邦学习依赖梯度信息，但超参数调优等任务需黑盒优化。现有贝叶斯优化（BO）难以适应联邦学习的隐私和通信约束，需设计新型联邦优化框架。
ai_content.method: 采用随机傅里叶特征近似高斯过程模型，基于汤普森采样设计参数交换机制，并提供异构代理鲁棒的收敛性理论保证。
ai_content.result: 实验验证了FTS在通信效率、计算效率及实际性能上的有效性，尤其在参数交换量和收敛速度上优于基线方法。
ai_content.conclusion: FTS通过理论分析与实证相结合，为联邦黑盒优化提供了可扩展且高效的解决方案，推动了联邦学习在超参数调优等场景的应用。

search_text: Federated Bayesian Optimization via Thompson Sampling 通过 Thompson 采样进行联合贝叶斯优化 Bayesian optimization (BO) is a prominent approach to optimizing expensive-to-evaluate black-box functions. The massive computational capability of edge devices such as mobile phones, coupled with privacy concerns, has led to a surging interest in federated learning (FL) which focuses on collaborative training of deep neural networks (DNNs) via first-order optimization techniques. However, some common machine learning tasks such as hyperparameter tuning of DNNs lack access to gradients and thus require zeroth-order/black-box optimization. This hints at the possibility of extending BO to the FL setting (FBO) for agents to collaborate in these black-box optimization tasks. This paper presents federated Thompson sampling (FTS) which overcomes a number of key challenges of FBO and FL in a principled way: We (a) use random Fourier features to approximate the Gaussian process surrogate model used in BO, which naturally produces the parameters to be exchanged between agents, (b) design FTS based on Thompson sampling, which significantly reduces the number of parameters to be exchanged, and (c) provide a theoretical convergence guarantee that is robust against heterogeneous agents, which is a major challenge in FL and FBO. We empirically demonstrate the effectiveness of FTS in terms of communication efficiency, computational efficiency, and practical performance. 贝叶斯优化 (BO) 是优化评估成本高昂的黑盒函数的一种重要方法。移动电话等边缘设备的海量计算能力，加上隐私问题，引发了人们对联邦学习 (FL) 的兴趣激增，联邦学习专注于通过一阶优化技术对深度神经网络 (DNN) 进行协作训练。然而，一些常见的机器学习任务（例如 DNN 的超参数调整）无法访问梯度，因此需要零阶/黑盒优化。这暗示了将 BO 扩展到 FL 设置 (FBO) 的可能性，以便代理在这些黑盒优化任务中进行协作。本文提出了联合汤普森采样（FTS），它以原则性的方式克服了 FBO 和 FL 的许多关键挑战：我们（a）使用随机傅立叶特征来近似 BO 中使用的高斯过程代理模型，该模型自然地生成要在代理之间交换的参数，（b）基于 Thompson 采样设计 FTS，这显着减少了要交换的参数数量，以及（c）提供了对异构代理具有鲁棒性的理论收敛保证，这是 FL 和 FL 中的主要挑战固定基地运营基地。我们通过实证证明了 FTS 在通信效率、计算效率和实际性能方面的有效性。 本文提出了一种联邦贝叶斯优化方法（FTS），通过汤普森采样解决联邦学习中的黑盒优化问题。 Zhongxiang Dai,Kian Hsiang Low,Patrick Jaillet cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Sashank Santhanam,Wei Ping,Raul Puri,Mohammad Shoeybi,Mostofa Patwary,Bryan Catanzaro
title: Local Knowledge Powered Conversational Agents
title_zh: 本地知识驱动的对话代理
abstract: State-of-the-art conversational agents have advanced significantly in conjunction with the use of large transformer-based language models. However, even with these advancements, conversational agents still lack the ability to produce responses that are informative and coherent with the local context. In this work, we propose a dialog framework that incorporates both local knowledge as well as users' past dialogues to generate high quality conversations. We introduce an approach to build a dataset based on Reddit conversations, where outbound URL links are widely available in the conversations and the hyperlinked documents can be naturally included as local external knowledge. Using our framework and dataset, we demonstrate that incorporating local knowledge can largely improve informativeness, coherency and realisticness measures using human evaluations. In particular, our approach consistently outperforms the state-of-the-art conversational model on the Reddit dataset across all three measures. We also find that scaling the size of our models from 117M to 8.3B parameters yields consistent improvement of validation perplexity as well as human evaluated metrics. Our model with 8.3B parameters can generate human-like responses as rated by various human evaluations in a single-turn dialog setting.
summary: State-of-the-art conversational agents have advanced significantly in conjunction with the use of large transformer-based language models. However, even with these advancements, conversational agents still lack the ability to produce responses that are informative and coherent with the local context. In this work, we propose a dialog framework that incorporates both local knowledge as well as users' past dialogues to generate high quality conversations. We introduce an approach to build a dataset based on Reddit conversations, where outbound URL links are widely available in the conversations and the hyperlinked documents can be naturally included as local external knowledge. Using our framework and dataset, we demonstrate that incorporating local knowledge can largely improve informativeness, coherency and realisticness measures using human evaluations. In particular, our approach consistently outperforms the state-of-the-art conversational model on the Reddit dataset across all three measures. We also find that scaling the size of our models from 117M to 8.3B parameters yields consistent improvement of validation perplexity as well as human evaluated metrics. Our model with 8.3B parameters can generate human-like responses as rated by various human evaluations in a single-turn dialog setting.
abstract_zh: 最先进的会话代理与基于大型变压器的语言模型的使用相结合取得了显着的进步。然而，即使有了这些进步，对话代理仍然缺乏产生信息丰富且与当地环境一致的响应的能力。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个对话框架，该框架结合了本地知识以及用户过去的对话，以生成高质量的对话。我们引入了一种基于 Reddit 对话构建数据集的方法，其中出站 URL 链接在对话中广泛可用，并且超链接文档可以自然地包含为本地外部知识。使用我们的框架和数据集，我们证明整合当地知识可以在很大程度上提高使用人类评估的信息性、一致性和现实性衡量标准。特别是，我们的方法在所有三个指标上始终优于 Reddit 数据集上最先进的对话模型。我们还发现，将模型大小从 117M 参数扩展到 8.3B 参数可以使验证困惑度以及人类评估指标得到持续改善。我们的模型具有 8.3B 参数，可以根据单轮对话设置中的各种人类评估来生成类似人类的响应。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合本地知识与用户历史对话的对话框架，以提升对话代理生成内容的信息量、连贯性和真实感。
AI.motivation: 尽管现有对话模型依赖大型语言模型，但仍难以生成符合本地上下文的高质量响应，需引入本地知识增强对话质量。
AI.method: 构建基于Reddit对话的数据集（利用超链接作为本地知识），设计融合用户历史对话与外部知识的对话框架，并通过扩展模型参数规模（117M至8.3B）验证效果。
AI.result: 在Reddit数据集上，所提方法在信息量、连贯性及真实性三项指标上均优于现有模型，8.3B参数版本在单轮对话中可生成接近人类水平的响应。
AI.conclusion: 整合本地知识显著提升对话质量，且模型规模扩大可进一步优化性能，为构建更贴近真实场景的对话系统提供新方向。

authors_text: Matthias Hoppe,Yannick Weiß,Marinus Burger,Thomas Kosch
title: Don't Drone Yourself in Work: Discussing DronOS as a Framework for Human-Drone Interaction
title_zh: 不要在工作中使用无人机：讨论 DronOS 作为人机交互框架
abstract: More and more off-the-shelf drones provide frameworks that enable the programming of flight paths. These frameworks provide vendor-dependent programming and communication interfaces that are intended for flight path definitions. However, they are often limited to outdoor and GPS-based use only. A key disadvantage of such a solution is that they are complicated to use and require readjustments when changing the drone model. This is time-consuming since it requires redefining the flight path for the new framework. This workshop paper proposes additional features for DronOS, a community-driven framework that enables model-independent automatisation and programming of drones. We enhanced DronOS to include additional functions to account for the specific design constraints in human-drone-interaction. This paper provides a starting point for discussing the requirements involved in designing a drone system with other researchers within the human-drone interaction community. We envision DronOS as a community-driven framework that can be applied to generic drone models, hence enabling the automatisation for any commercially available drone. Our goal is to build DronOS as a software tool that can be easily used by researchers and practitioners to prototype novel drone-based systems.
summary: More and more off-the-shelf drones provide frameworks that enable the programming of flight paths. These frameworks provide vendor-dependent programming and communication interfaces that are intended for flight path definitions. However, they are often limited to outdoor and GPS-based use only. A key disadvantage of such a solution is that they are complicated to use and require readjustments when changing the drone model. This is time-consuming since it requires redefining the flight path for the new framework. This workshop paper proposes additional features for DronOS, a community-driven framework that enables model-independent automatisation and programming of drones. We enhanced DronOS to include additional functions to account for the specific design constraints in human-drone-interaction. This paper provides a starting point for discussing the requirements involved in designing a drone system with other researchers within the human-drone interaction community. We envision DronOS as a community-driven framework that can be applied to generic drone models, hence enabling the automatisation for any commercially available drone. Our goal is to build DronOS as a software tool that can be easily used by researchers and practitioners to prototype novel drone-based systems.
abstract_zh: 越来越多的现成无人机提供了支持飞行路径编程的框架。这些框架提供了用于飞行路径定义的依赖于供应商的编程和通信接口。然而，它们通常仅限于户外和基于 GPS 的使用。这种解决方案的一个主要缺点是使用起来很复杂，并且在改变无人机型号时需要重新调整。这是非常耗时的，因为它需要为新框架重新定义飞行路径。本研讨会论文提出了 DronOS 的附加功能，DronOS 是一个社区驱动的框架，可实现独立于模型的无人机自动化和编程。我们增强了 DronOS，添加了额外的功能，以解决人机交互中的特定设计限制。本文为与人机交互社区中的其他研究人员讨论设计无人机系统的要求提供了一个起点。我们将 DronOS 设想为一个社区驱动的框架，可应用于通用无人机模型，从而实现任何商用无人机的自动化。我们的目标是将 DronOS 构建为一种软件工具，研究人员和从业人员可以轻松使用它来构建新颖的无人机系统原型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DronOS框架，旨在解决现有无人机编程框架的局限性，提供一种模型无关的自动化编程方案以促进人机交互。
AI.motivation: 现有商用无人机框架依赖厂商特定接口，使用复杂且仅支持户外GPS场景，更换机型需重新定义飞行路径，效率低下。
AI.method: 通过增强DronOS框架，新增适配人机交互设计约束的功能，构建社区驱动的通用化编程工具。
AI.result: 为研究者提供讨论无人机系统设计需求的起点，并确立DronOS作为可应用于任意商用无人机的原型开发工具愿景。
AI.conclusion: DronOS致力于成为社区协作的开源工具，降低无人机系统开发门槛，推动人机交互领域创新研究。

conclusion: DronOS致力于成为社区协作的开源工具，降低无人机系统开发门槛，推动人机交互领域创新研究。
search_text: Don't Drone Yourself in Work: Discussing DronOS as a Framework for Human-Drone Interaction 不要在工作中使用无人机：讨论 DronOS 作为人机交互框架 More and more off-the-shelf drones provide frameworks that enable the programming of flight paths. These frameworks provide vendor-dependent programming and communication interfaces that are intended for flight path definitions. However, they are often limited to outdoor and GPS-based use only. A key disadvantage of such a solution is that they are complicated to use and require readjustments when changing the drone model. This is time-consuming since it requires redefining the flight path for the new framework. This workshop paper proposes additional features for DronOS, a community-driven framework that enables model-independent automatisation and programming of drones. We enhanced DronOS to include additional functions to account for the specific design constraints in human-drone-interaction. This paper provides a starting point for discussing the requirements involved in designing a drone system with other researchers within the human-drone interaction community. We envision DronOS as a community-driven framework that can be applied to generic drone models, hence enabling the automatisation for any commercially available drone. Our goal is to build DronOS as a software tool that can be easily used by researchers and practitioners to prototype novel drone-based systems. 越来越多的现成无人机提供了支持飞行路径编程的框架。这些框架提供了用于飞行路径定义的依赖于供应商的编程和通信接口。然而，它们通常仅限于户外和基于 GPS 的使用。这种解决方案的一个主要缺点是使用起来很复杂，并且在改变无人机型号时需要重新调整。这是非常耗时的，因为它需要为新框架重新定义飞行路径。本研讨会论文提出了 DronOS 的附加功能，DronOS 是一个社区驱动的框架，可实现独立于模型的无人机自动化和编程。我们增强了 DronOS，添加了额外的功能，以解决人机交互中的特定设计限制。本文为与人机交互社区中的其他研究人员讨论设计无人机系统的要求提供了一个起点。我们将 DronOS 设想为一个社区驱动的框架，可应用于通用无人机模型，从而实现任何商用无人机的自动化。我们的目标是将 DronOS 构建为一种软件工具，研究人员和从业人员可以轻松使用它来构建新颖的无人机系统原型。 本文提出DronOS框架，旨在解决现有无人机编程框架的局限性，提供一种模型无关的自动化编程方案以促进人机交互。 Matthias Hoppe,Yannick Weiß,Marinus Burger,Thomas Kosch cs.HC

authors_text: Shufan Shen,Ran Miao,Yi Wang,Zhihua Wei
title: Tongji University Undergraduate Team for the VoxCeleb Speaker Recognition Challenge2020
title_zh: 同济大学本科生队参加2020年VoxCeleb演讲者识别挑战赛
abstract: In this report, we discribe the submission of Tongji University undergraduate team to the CLOSE track of the VoxCeleb Speaker Recognition Challenge (VoxSRC) 2020 at Interspeech 2020. We applied the RSBU-CW module to the ResNet34 framework to improve the denoising ability of the network and better complete the speaker verification task in a complex environment.We trained two variants of ResNet,used score fusion and data-augmentation methods to improve the performance of the model. Our fusion of two selected systems for the CLOSE track achieves 0.2973 DCF and 4.9700\% EER on the challenge evaluation set.
summary: In this report, we discribe the submission of Tongji University undergraduate team to the CLOSE track of the VoxCeleb Speaker Recognition Challenge (VoxSRC) 2020 at Interspeech 2020. We applied the RSBU-CW module to the ResNet34 framework to improve the denoising ability of the network and better complete the speaker verification task in a complex environment.We trained two variants of ResNet,used score fusion and data-augmentation methods to improve the performance of the model. Our fusion of two selected systems for the CLOSE track achieves 0.2973 DCF and 4.9700\% EER on the challenge evaluation set.
abstract_zh: 在本报告中，我们描述了同济大学本科生团队在 Interspeech 2020 上参加 VoxCeleb 说话人识别挑战赛 (VoxSRC) 2020 CLOSE 赛道的情况。我们将 RSBU-CW 模块应用到 ResNet34 框架中，以提高网络的去噪能力，更好地完成复杂环境下的说话人验证任务。我们训练了 ResNet 的两种变体，使用分数融合和数据增强方法来提高模型。我们为 CLOSE 赛道选择的两个系统的融合在挑战评估集上实现了 0.2973 DCF 和 4.9700% EER。

AI.tldr: 同济大学本科生团队针对VoxSRC 2020挑战赛CLOSE track，提出改进的ResNet34框架以提升复杂环境下的说话人验证性能。
AI.motivation: 为解决复杂环境下的噪声干扰问题，提升说话人验证的准确性。
AI.method: 基于ResNet34框架集成RSBU-CW去噪模块，训练两种ResNet变体，结合分数融合与数据增强技术优化模型性能。
AI.result: 在挑战赛测试集上达到0.2973 DCF和4.9700% EER的验证结果。
AI.conclusion: 融合策略有效提升模型性能，验证了改进模型在复杂环境下的优越性。

authors_text: Alan F. Smeaton,Naveen Garaga Krishnamurthy,Amruth Hebbasuru Suryanarayana
title: Keystroke Dynamics as Part of Lifelogging
title_zh: 按键动态作为生活记录的一部分
comment: Accepted to 27th International Conference on Multimedia Modeling, Prague, Czech Republic, June 2021
comments: Accepted to 27th International Conference on Multimedia Modeling, Prague, Czech Republic, June 2021
abstract: In this paper we present the case for including keystroke dynamics in lifelogging. We describe how we have used a simple keystroke logging application called Loggerman, to create a dataset of longitudinal keystroke timing data spanning a period of more than 6 months for 4 participants. We perform a detailed analysis of this data by examining the timing information associated with bigrams or pairs of adjacently-typed alphabetic characters. We show how there is very little day-on-day variation of the keystroke timing among the top-200 bigrams for some participants and for others there is a lot and this correlates with the amount of typing each would do on a daily basis. We explore how daily variations could correlate with sleep score from the previous night but find no significant relation-ship between the two. Finally we describe the public release of this data as well including as a series of pointers for future work including correlating keystroke dynamics with mood and fatigue during the day.
summary: In this paper we present the case for including keystroke dynamics in lifelogging. We describe how we have used a simple keystroke logging application called Loggerman, to create a dataset of longitudinal keystroke timing data spanning a period of more than 6 months for 4 participants. We perform a detailed analysis of this data by examining the timing information associated with bigrams or pairs of adjacently-typed alphabetic characters. We show how there is very little day-on-day variation of the keystroke timing among the top-200 bigrams for some participants and for others there is a lot and this correlates with the amount of typing each would do on a daily basis. We explore how daily variations could correlate with sleep score from the previous night but find no significant relation-ship between the two. Finally we describe the public release of this data as well including as a series of pointers for future work including correlating keystroke dynamics with mood and fatigue during the day.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了将击键动态纳入生活记录的案例。我们描述了如何使用名为 Loggerman 的简单击键记录应用程序来创建 4 名参与者跨越 6 个多月时间段的纵向击键计时数据数据集。我们通过检查与双字母组或相邻键入的字母字符对相关的计时信息来对该数据进行详细分析。我们展示了对于某些参与者来说，前 200 个二元组中的击键时间每天变化很小，而对于其他参与者来说，击键时间的变化很大，这与每个人每天的打字量相关。我们探讨了每日变化如何与前一天晚上的睡眠得分相关，但发现两者之间没有显着关系。最后，我们描述了这些数据的公开发布，并包括对未来工作的一系列指导，包括将击键动态与白天的情绪和疲劳相关联。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨将键盘敲击动态纳入生活日志（lifelogging）的可行性，并通过长期数据收集与分析验证其潜力。
AI.motivation: 通过分析键盘敲击模式，可揭示用户行为特征与健康状态（如睡眠、疲劳）的关联，为生活日志研究提供新维度。
AI.method: 使用名为Loggerman的工具，连续6个月记录4名参与者的键盘敲击时序数据，重点分析字母对（bigrams）的时序特征及其日间变化规律。
AI.result: 部分参与者前200个高频字母对的敲击时序日间波动极小，而另一些参与者则存在显著波动，且波动幅度与每日打字量相关；但未发现与前一晚睡眠评分存在显著关联。
AI.conclusion: 公开数据集并提出未来研究方向，如探索键盘动态与情绪、疲劳等状态的关联，以拓展生活日志的应用场景。

authors_text: Hartmut Koenitz,Mirjam Palosaari Eladhari,Sandy Louchart,Frank Nack
title: INDCOR white paper 1: A shared vocabulary for IDN (Interactive Digital Narratives)
title_zh: INDCOR 白皮书 1：IDN（交互式数字叙事）共享词汇表
abstract: COST Action 18230 INDCOR (Interactive Narrative Design for Complexity Representations) is an interdisciplinary network of researchers and practitioners intended to further the use of interactive digital narratives (IDN1) to represent highly complex topics. IDN possess crucial advantages in this regard, but more knowledge is needed to realize these advantages in broad usage by media producers and the general public. The lack of a shared vocabulary is a crucial obstacle on the path to a generalized, accessible body of IDN knowledge. This white paper frames the situation from the perspective of INDCOR and describes the creation of an online encyclopedia as a means to overcome this issue. Two similar and successful projects (The Living Handbook of Narratology and the Stanford Encyclopedia of Philosophy) serve as examples for this effort, showing how community-authored encyclopedias can provide high-quality content. The authors introduce a taxonomy based on an overarching analytical framework (SPP model) as the foundational element of the encyclopedia, and detail editorial procedures for the project, including a peer-review process, designed to assure high academic quality and relevance of encyclopedia entries. Also, a sample entry provides guidance for authors.
summary: COST Action 18230 INDCOR (Interactive Narrative Design for Complexity Representations) is an interdisciplinary network of researchers and practitioners intended to further the use of interactive digital narratives (IDN1) to represent highly complex topics. IDN possess crucial advantages in this regard, but more knowledge is needed to realize these advantages in broad usage by media producers and the general public. The lack of a shared vocabulary is a crucial obstacle on the path to a generalized, accessible body of IDN knowledge. This white paper frames the situation from the perspective of INDCOR and describes the creation of an online encyclopedia as a means to overcome this issue. Two similar and successful projects (The Living Handbook of Narratology and the Stanford Encyclopedia of Philosophy) serve as examples for this effort, showing how community-authored encyclopedias can provide high-quality content. The authors introduce a taxonomy based on an overarching analytical framework (SPP model) as the foundational element of the encyclopedia, and detail editorial procedures for the project, including a peer-review process, designed to assure high academic quality and relevance of encyclopedia entries. Also, a sample entry provides guidance for authors.
abstract_zh: COST Action 18230 INDCOR（复杂性表示的交互式叙事设计）是一个由研究人员和从业者组成的跨学科网络，旨在进一步使用交互式数字叙事 (IDN1) 来表示高度复杂的主题。 IDN 在这方面拥有至关重要的优势，但需要更多的知识来实现​​这些优势并被媒体制作人和公众广泛使用。缺乏共享词汇是通向通用、可访问的 IDN 知识体系的一个关键障碍。本白皮书从 INDCOR 的角度阐述了这一情况，并描述了创建在线百科全书作为解决这一问题的一种手段。两个类似且成功的项目（《叙事学生活手册》和《斯坦福哲学百科全书》）就是这项工作的例子，展示了社区创作的百科全书如何提供高质量的内容。作者介绍了一种基于总体分析框架（SPP 模型）的分类法作为百科全书的基本要素，并详细介绍了该项目的编辑程序，包括同行评审过程，旨在确保百科全书条目的高学术质量和相关性。此外，示例条目为作者提供了指导。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过创建在线百科全书，解决交互式数字叙事（IDN）领域缺乏共享词汇表的问题，推动其在复杂主题表达中的广泛应用。
AI.motivation: IDN在表现复杂主题方面具有优势，但因缺乏统一术语体系导致知识传播受限，阻碍了媒体制作方和公众的广泛使用。
AI.method: 基于SPP模型构建分类体系，借鉴《叙事学活用手册》等成功案例，采用社区协作模式并建立同行评审机制确保内容质量。
AI.result: 提出了百科全书的编辑流程与质量保障方案，包含示例条目指导作者，并确立了以学术严谨性为核心的编纂框架。
AI.conclusion: 通过构建共享知识体系与质量管控机制，该百科全书有望成为IDN领域标准化建设的里程碑，促进复杂议题的数字化叙事实践。
